c57b58c5.title: Lead Customer Program Manager
c57b58c5.description:
**About MISUMI Americas**


MISUMI Americas, a division of MISUMI Group, is a leading provider of standard, configurable, and custom manufacturing solutions. By integrating a vast catalog of components with a world\-class digital manufacturing platform, MISUMI Americas empowers engineers and procurement teams to accelerate innovation across the entire product lifecycle. With operations in the San Francisco Bay Area and Chicago, the company serves as a vital partner for the most innovative companies in the Americas.


**\*\*Work Hours:** **7:30 PM – 3:30 AM IST, Monday through Friday (aligned with US Eastern business hours)\*\***


**Impact in this Role**


At Fictiv/MISUMI Americas, we are building the operating system for custom mechanical parts and assembly \- enabling Fortune 500 companies to scale production across India, Mexico, China, and the US. We deliver highly complex, high\-quality hardware for autonomous vehicles, surgical systems, industrial robots, and beyond.


The Lead Customer Program Manager is a people leader role within the Customer Program Management team. You will build, manage, and grow a team of CPMs who are responsible for owning customer programs and projects end\-to\-end \- from initial scoping and kickoff through delivery, escalation management, and long\-term account health.


This role sits at the intersection of three disciplines: customer success, project management, and manufacturing expertise. Your team’s job is to be the trusted partner for our customers \- understanding their manufacturing needs deeply, keeping programs on track, and ensuring every commitment we make is one we keep. Your job as Lead CPM is to make sure your team does that exceptionally well, consistently.


You will coach and develop your team, set standards for how programs are run and how customers are managed, resolve escalations, and partner cross\-functionally to remove blockers. You bring both the credibility of deep program management and manufacturing experience and the leadership maturity to develop others and elevate the team around you.


You will report to the Manager of Customer Program Management. This role has a hybrid model (Monday, Tuesday and Wednesday in office, Thursday and Friday remote).


**What you will be doing**


**1\. Team Leadership \& People Management**


* Directly manage a team of Customer Program Managers (Junior to Mid Level), owning their performance, development, and day\-to\-day effectiveness
* Set clear goals and performance expectations for each direct report; conduct regular 1:1s and formal reviews
* Build structured development plans for each team member, identifying skill gaps, creating growth opportunities, and actively coaching toward them with the goal of accelerating each individual's potential, not just managing their current performance
* Serve as the first line of escalation for your team: step in on complex programs, difficult customer situations, or cross\-functional blockers as needed
* Create and maintain onboarding frameworks, training materials, and capability\-building resources for new and growing CPMs
* Actively participate in recruiting, interviewing, and onboarding new team members as the team scales
* Foster a high\-accountability, high\-support team environment rooted in the MISUMI Americas values: Not Afraid to Fail, Empowerment, Open to Change, Speed / Bias Toward Action, and Grit

**2\. Customer Program \& Project Oversight**


* Maintain visibility across your team’s full portfolio of customer programs and projects \- monitoring health, tracking risks, and ensuring nothing falls through the cracks
* Set and uphold team standards for how programs are planned, communicated, and executed: scope management, change control, risk identification, and status reporting
* Step in directly on strategic, high\-complexity, or at\-risk customer accounts to guide recovery, lead customer conversations, or provide senior presence
* Partner with Sales and Account Management to ensure smooth program onboarding, renewals, and escalation resolution
* Champion a consistent customer experience across the team \- ensuring customers always have a responsive, knowledgeable, proactive point of contact

**3\. Customer Success \& Relationship Management**


* Model and coach a customer success mindset within the team: proactive communication, anticipating needs, building trust, and driving long\-term account health
* Ensure the team is measuring the right things \- on\-time delivery, customer satisfaction, escalation rate, response time \- and improving over time
* Guide your team in navigating difficult customer conversations: how to deliver bad news, manage expectations, and turn friction into stronger relationships
* Build relationships with senior customer stakeholders on key accounts; represent the CPM team in strategic customer interactions as needed

**4\. Supply Chain \& Customer Operations**


* Maintain a working understanding of supply chain operations \- supplier management, lead times, procurement constraints, and fulfillment workflows \- to help your team navigate program risks and set accurate customer expectations
* Oversee customer operations health across the portfolio: order management, delivery performance, issue resolution timelines, and escalation response
* Partner with Supply Chain, Operations, and Quality teams to resolve cross\-functional blockers affecting customer programs and ensure your team has the right internal connections to act effectively
* Coach your team to think beyond program execution \- understanding how supply chain and operational decisions upstream directly impact customer experience downstream
* Identify systemic supply chain or operations issues that recur across programs and work with leadership to address root causes, not just individual incidents

**5\. Team Effectiveness \& Execution Consistency**


* Stay close to how standards and tooling are evolving across the CPM team, and make sure your team is aligned, trained, and applying them consistently
* Own adoption. When new processes or tools are introduced, drive uptake within your team \- close gaps, address resistance, and follow through until it becomes standard practice
* Coach individuals toward stronger execution habits. Where gaps are recurring, treat them as a development opportunity before escalating
* Keep a pulse on execution quality across your team's programs and bring that ground\-level visibility into broader team conversations about what is working and what needs attention

**Experience**


**Required**


* 7–13 years of total work experience, with a minimum of 5 years managing customer\-facing programs or projects in a fast\-paced hardware product development or contract manufacturing environment
* Bachelor’s degree in Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering or Manufacturing Engineering required
* Minimum 2 years in a team lead, senior lead, or people management role with direct reports \- owning performance reviews, development plans, and day\-to\-day team management
* Proven track record of running complex, multi\-stakeholder customer programs end\-to\-end, with full accountability for scope, cost, timeline, and customer satisfaction
* Direct experience working with US\-based or European\-based customers from India on a US business hours schedule

**Preferred**


* Experience at a contract manufacturer, digital manufacturing platform, or hardware supply chain company
* Exposure to low\-volume / prototype builds and high\-mix, high\-velocity manufacturing environments
* Familiarity with the hardware product development lifecycle: EVT, DVT, PVT, MP
* Experience with CRM/ERP tools (Salesforce, Odoo), project management tools (Jira, Asana), and data platforms like Sigma

**Core Skills \& Competencies**


* People Leadership: Demonstrated ability to build, manage, and grow a team; sets clear expectations, holds accountability, invests in development, and creates a culture of performance and support
* Customer Success Mindset: Deep instinct for what makes customers stay, grow, and refer; coaches the team to be proactive, solutions\-oriented, and relationship\-driven
* Project \& Program Management: Strong command of program fundamentals \- scope, risk, timeline, change management \- and the ability to set and enforce standards across a team
* Manufacturing Expertise: Enough technical depth to guide the team through complex manufacturing decisions, support difficult customer conversations, and build credibility with engineering and operations
* Communication: Exceptional written and verbal English; able to communicate at the right level for the audience \- from a customer VP to a junior CPM to an internal engineering team
* Judgment \& Escalation: Knows when to delegate, when to coach, and when to step in directly; trusted by the team and by leadership to make the right call
* Agility, Adaptability \& Grit: Thrives in fast\-paced, ambiguous environments; sets the tone for the team when things get hard
* Data\-Driven: Use metrics to evaluate team performance, catch risks early, and drive continuous improvement
* Individual Coaching \& Development: Goes beyond performance management: actively invests in helping each team member realize their potential faster; identifies what holds people back, creates the right conditions, and adjusts coaching style per individual
* Agility / Succeeding in the Fictiv Environment: Fictiv moves fast, changes direction often, and rewards people who figure things out without waiting to be told; the right candidate has thrived in environments like this, they do not need certainty to act, do not wait for a perfect process to exist, and are energized rather than frustrated by ambiguity and pace
* People Skills in a Non\-Hierarchical Culture: Fictiv's culture is direct, candid, and non\-hierarchical; traditional command\-and\-control or deferential work styles do not fit
* The Lead CPM must be comfortable giving and receiving direct feedback, speaking up in cross\-functional settings, pushing back with data, and empowering their team to do the same, regardless of seniority or title in the room
* Urgency \& Firefighting Under Pressure: Able to stay effective and keep the team grounded when multiple things are on fire simultaneously; knows how to triage, reprioritize quickly, and help the team navigate constant urgency without burning out or dropping the ball
* Converts chaos into clarity for the people around them

**Interested in learning more? We look forward to hearing from you soon.**


We’re actively seeking teammates who:


* Bring diverse perspectives and experience to our culture and company.
* Excel at being part of a strong, empathetic team.
* Thrive in an environment emphasizing respect, honesty, collaboration, and growth.
* Have an ‘always learning’ mindset that celebrates learning, not just wins.
* Help us continue to build a world\-class organization that values the contributions of all of our teammates

We encourage applications from members of underrepresented groups, including but not limited to women, members of the LGBTQ community, people of color, people with disabilities, and veterans.

6b930e19.title: Delivery Manager - .NET/Java
6b930e19.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are seeking an accomplished **Delivery Manager with expertise in .NET/Java** to lead end\-to\-end project delivery, ensuring collaboration across teams, client satisfaction, and business success.

**Responsibilities**

* Oversee end\-to\-end delivery across multiple teams to ensure client requirements and quality standards are met
* Track project milestones, deadlines and deliverables, resolving any deviations
* Understand the technical and business aspects of the solutions being delivered
* Identify, track and manage inter\-team and external dependencies
* Escalate critical risks and issues to stakeholders with clear impact analysis and recommendations
* Provide regular updates, progress reports and risk assessments to clients and stakeholders
* Manage client expectations, gather feedback and ensure high client satisfaction
* Define and monitor software development processes for Scrum teams
* Act as a liaison between clients and teams for daily or weekly status updates, risks and issues
* Lead multiple cross\-functional Scrum teams across Product, Design, Development and Sprint Demos
* Create and manage project plans with an understanding of SDLC phases
* Drive Agile estimation techniques and Agile Metrics implementation
* Execute projects from backlog identification to production deployment

**Requirements**

* 13 to 15 years of overall professional experience
* 10\+ years of work experience in delivery management
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science or similar; a Master's degree in Computer Science is preferred
* Expertise in .NET and Java technologies
* Successful experience in managing mid\-sized to large projects and Agile transformations
* Strong leadership, communication and decision\-making skills to engage with key stakeholders
* Flexibility to oversee cross\-functional teams and program dependencies effectively
* Proficiency in Agile methodologies with competency in facilitation, conflict resolution and continuous improvement
* Capability to measure Agile metrics and drive transparency within Scrum teams
* Background in Financial Services or Wealth Management is preferred
* SAFe certification

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)

c6f37162.title: Senior Technical Program Manager-2
c6f37162.description:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Senior Technical Program Manager\-2
   

  

**Job Description Summary**
 Who is Mastercard?
   

  

 Mastercard is a global technology company in the payments industry. Our mission is to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential.
   

  

 Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. With connections across more than 210 countries and territories, we are building a sustainable world that unlocks priceless possibilities for all.
   

  

**Overview**
 Are you a technical program manager who wants to focus on analytic platforms and data needs? Are you passionate about coordinating and clearly communicating across teams while also managing risk and priorities for your team? Do you want to work in an inclusive and nurturing culture that encourages your own professional learning and development?
   

  

 We are currently seeking a Technical Program Manager for the Clearing Program. You will own the end\-to\-end delivery of engineering projects
   

  

* Responsible for planning, execution, and delivery, from inception to completion, for an existing technology product or program
* Proactively manages the end\-to\-end delivery of engineering work though the engineering team and all dependent organizations
* Reports on progress, ensuring dependencies are covered


 Operates between teams and architectures overseeing the gaps between teams, processes, and systems, while removing all blocking issues leading to a successful delivery
   

  

 Role
   

  

* Plan and manage a group of related technology projects or activities in a coordinated way from inception through successful delivery
* Deep understanding of the design approaches and technologies utilized in your area


 Focus on the customer experience, the build and delivery processes and the problems to be solved
   

  

* Work across multiple scrum teams (may be cross\-cutting across products, scrum teams, and/or technologies or work may be vertically focused on a single product or feature set)
* Align dependent organizations and remove/mitigate all blocking issues
* Work directly with external to the organization or external to Mastercard technology providers and customers
* Work with limited guidance, seeking guidance as needed because the product and delivery strategy is defined.
* Deep understanding of the business and technical requirements for the solutions being built
* Understand the needs of the engineers and technical operations teams who have to build, maintain, and operate the system for the life of the system
* Recognize complex designs and propose simplified solutions by working with software design engineers, principals and TPMs
* Help customers and the engineering teams make trade\-off decisions by considering all of the data including business goals, technical platform strategy, customer experience and maintainability.
* You identify blocking issues and manage their resolution.
* Identify, assess, track and mitigate issues and risks at multiple levels
* Write documentation as required
* Partner with industry vendors that provide technology or user experience design components that support our architecture and work with vendors on our implementation plans and roadmaps identifying partnership opportunities to increase our development velocity and our learnings
* Communicate role up of project issues and status in a concise, accurate, and professional manner for senior leadership consumption, escalating blocking issues when appropriate
* Communicate progress, anticipate bottlenecks, provide escalation management, identify, assess, track and mitigate issues/risks at multiple levels
* Work across teams to optimize processes
* Regularly review metrics and proactively seek out new and improved data/mechanisms for visibility ensuring your program stays aligned with organization objectives
* Anticipate bottlenecks and adequately factor in contingency for unplanned delays
* Determine if success metrics are in place and if not, you work to define them
* Recognize discordant views and take part in constructive dialog to resolve them
* Continuously assess development processes, test plans, and operations. You work with teams to improve concurrent project delivery.
* Streamline and/or eliminate excess process in any area of the architecture, production operations environment, or business area where the same efforts (or issues) are repeated year\-over\-year


**All About You**
* Deep understanding of the design approaches, technologies and business drivers in your area
* Demonstrated understanding of Project Management processes, strategies and methods
* Expert level knowledge of software development processes and Agile practices
* Experience working in a high\-level collaborative environment and promoting a teamwork mentality
* Experience applying analytical thinking and problem\-solving skills
* Ability to predict challenges and seek to proactively head\-off obstacles
* Excellent time management and organizational skills
* Experience in all things data – writing SQL queries, researching data discrepancies, data reporting
* Strong communications skills \- both verbal and written \- ability to communicate critical points efficient across a wide range of audiences
* You have passion and experience in working on customer facing emerging products and services.
* You have a strong sense of personal accountability regarding decision\-making and supervising scrum teams
* You are results driven with proven ability to effectively define and communicate project status, risks, and solutions in a proactive manner. Also able to manage support issues to drive to root cause and resolution.
* You are high\-energy, detail\-oriented, proactive and adaptive and can work in a dynamic environment.
* You have an ability to simultaneously manage short\-term priorities and long\-term initiatives and have experience working with agile software development processes, ideally as a scrum master.
* You build solid and trust\-based relationships within the team and various stakeholders and become a valued thought partner.
* You can exercise influence outside your own teams to achieve results for the entire organization.


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

46c991ee.title: Senior Program Manager
46c991ee.description:
"Primary Job Function :
   

  

* End\-to\-end program governance
* Focus on execution excellence and compliance
* Vendor \& Field Force Governance
* Strong stakeholder management
* Strong Data, Reporting \& Analytics
* Strong Startegy and Innovation


 Core Job Responsibilities :
   

  

* Program Leadership
* Own end\-to\-end delivery of Pill Plus service programs
* Drive program expansion, efficiency, and scalability
* Cascade objectives to Program Managers and ensure last\-mile execution
* Vendor \& Field Force Governance
* Manage multiple vendors (Medibiz, Virhona, etc.) across programs
* Drive productivity and utilization of 100\+ field resources
* Ensure Program Managers effectively track and manage field performance
* Compliance \& Risk Management
* Ensure 100% adherence to CSR, compliance, and audit requirements
* Drive governance through both direct and indirect teams
* Maintain audit\-ready systems and documentation
* Stakeholder Management
* Interface with senior stakeholders across functions
* Enable Program Managers to manage day\-to\-day coordination
* Ensure strategic alignment and execution discipline
* Data, Reporting \& Analytics
* Establish performance dashboards
* Review Program Manager reports and ensure accuracy
* Drive actionable insights from program data
* Strategy \& Innovation
* Build future\-ready PSP models
* Introduce digital and hybrid solutions
* Scale programs sustainably


 Supervisory/Management Responsibilities
   

  

  Execution Excellence
   

  

* ≥ 95% activity execution as per plan
* ≥ 90% technician utilization rate


  Compliance
   

  

* BCC reports adherence to 100%
* Zero critical audit observations


  Vendor Performance
   

  

* ≥ 95% SLA adherence


  Program Impact
   

  

* Growth in patient reach and adherence outcomes


  Operational Efficiency
   

  

* 5–10% reduction in cost per patient served


  Team Effectiveness
   

  

* Strong delivery through Program Managers with clear accountability
* High team engagement and performance rating


 Position Accountability / Scope
   

  

 Limited to Area/Geography of operation
   

  

 Education \& experience :
   

  

* Preferred from BSc/BPharma background
* Graduate/post Graduate from pharma/healthcare background with sound therapy knowledge and performance track record
* Candidate with prior/current experience of 8 to 12 Years of experience in pharma/healthcare management
* Experience managing Program Managers \+ large outsourced teams
* Strong exposure to PSP, vendor ecosystems, and compliance frameworks
* Strong control over both team and vendor ecosystem
* High execution discipline with no compliance gaps
* Scalable, efficient patient programs with measurable impact"

fe33bc1e.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
fe33bc1e.description:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Senior Technical Program ManagerWho is Mastercard?
   

  

 We work to connect and power an inclusive, digital economy that benefits everyone, everywhere, by making transactions safe, simple, smart, and accessible. Using secure data and networks, partnerships, and passion, our innovations and solutions help individuals, financial institutions, governments, and businesses realize their greatest potential. Our decency quotient, or DQ, drives our culture and everything we do inside and outside of our company. We cultivate a culture of inclusion for all employees that respects their individual strengths, views, and experiences. We believe that our differences enable us to be a better team – one that makes better decisions, drives innovation, and delivers better business results.
   

  

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

 Technology at Mastercard
   

  

 What we create today will define tomorrow. Revolutionary technologies that reshape the digital economy to be more connected and inclusive than ever before. Safer, faster, more sustainable.
   

  

 And we need the best people to do it. Technologists who are energized by the challenges of a truly global network. With the talent and vision to create the critical systems and products that power global commerce and connect people everywhere to the vital goods and services they need every day.
   

  

 Working at Mastercard means being part of a unique culture. Inclusive and diverse, a rich collaboration of ideas and perspectives. A place that celebrates your strengths, values your experiences, and offers you the flexibility to shape a career across disciplines and continents. And the opportunity to work alongside experts and leaders at every level of the business, improving what exists, and inventing what’s next.
   

  

 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

**All About You**
 Are you a technical program manager who wants to work for a company that offers above\-and\-beyond benefits including paid parental leave, flexible work hours, gift matching, and even volunteer incentives?
   

  

 Do you want to work in an inclusive and nurturing culture that encourages your professional learning and development?
   

  

 The ideal candidate is passionate about the customer experience journey, highly motivated, intellectually curious, analytical, and possesses an entrepreneurial mindset.
   

  

 Knowledge / Experience
   

  

* 8\+ years leading large scale, end to end technical programs across multiple teams with complex dependencies in enterprise environments.
* Strong expertise in portfolio and initiative level program management, including governance, execution tracking, reporting, and operational readiness.
* Hands on experience with Agile (Scrum), SAFe, and blended delivery models, with strengths in work decomposition, sprint planning, backlog management, and delivery acceleration.
* Solid understanding of software engineering, system design, and architecture, with the ability to engage engineers on trade offs, scalability, and constraints.
* Proven ability to drive business and customer outcomes through technical execution, measured via metrics and results.
* Demonstrated strength in risk management, ambiguity handling, stakeholder influence, and executive communication.
* Experience building and leading TPM organizations, mentoring leaders, shaping practices, and influencing technology roadmaps.


 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

**About The Role**
* Drive transformational change in end to end product delivery, applying technical program management and engineering best practices across agile and hybrid environments.
* Lead large enterprise technical programs and products from inception to delivery, operating autonomously in ambiguous problem spaces.
* Maintain deep understanding of business domains, systems, and architectural decisions, translating complexity into clarity and execution.
* Provide thought leadership, drive problem decomposition, accelerate delivery, and ensure predictable outcomes under tight deadlines.
* Establish trusted partnerships with engineering, business, and executive stakeholders, influencing decisions and aligning execution.
* Build, lead, and mature a high performing TPM function, fostering strong delivery culture, empathy, and accountability.


 \_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_\_
   

  

 Major Accountabilities
   

  

* Own program and portfolio execution, optimizing processes, aligning teams and technologies, and ensuring efficient use of resources.
* Drive delivery from planning through production, proactively managing risks, dependencies, escalations, and blockers.
* Establish clear governance, metrics, and reporting, enabling transparency, timely decisions, and continuous improvement.
* Foster cross team collaboration, accountability for results, and organizational learning.
* Act as primary program representative, providing clear communication, accurate status, and stakeholder alignment.
* Stay current on technology trends, evaluate designs, and influence long term organizational and technical direction.


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
**Responsibilities**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

04f1d3c9.title: Lead Technical Program Manager
04f1d3c9.description:
**Our Purpose**
*Mastercard powers economies and empowers people in 200\+ countries and territories worldwide. Together with our customers, we’re helping build a sustainable economy where everyone can prosper. We support a wide range of digital payments choices, making transactions secure, simple, smart and accessible. Our technology and innovation, partnerships and networks combine to deliver a unique set of products and services that help people, businesses and governments realize their greatest potential.*
**Title And Summary**
 Lead Technical Program ManagerOverview
   

  

 The Prepaid team is looking for a Lead Technical Program Manager to drive our customer experience strategy forward by consistently innovating and problem\-solving. The ideal candidate is passionate about the customer journey, highly motivated, intellectually curious, analytical, and possesses an entrepreneurial mindset.
   

  

 Role
   

  

**In This Position, You Will Need To**
* Plan, execute, and deliver projects from inception to completion related to a known technology, product, or program
* Proactively manage the end\-to\-end delivery of engineering work through the organization and all dependent organizations, reporting out progress, ensuring dependencies are covered, overseeing the gaps between teams, processes, and systems, while removing all blocking issues leading to a successful delivery
* Build and maintain integrated project schedules that account for internal/external dependencies, differing delivery approaches, numerous constraints, and adequately factor in contingency for unplanned delays
* Learn how to negotiate features and associated priority and help the team and their customers reach consensus
* Collaborate with engineering managers to secure resources, scope efforts, set priorities and establish delivery milestones
* Figure out the sequencing of the work so that engineering execution can be optimized
* Identify blocking issues and manage their resolution
* Manage project communications, and may be the first point of contact for the team
* Run effective meetings
* Clearly articulate scope, timelines, dependencies, owners, actions, risks, and mitigations
* Own project communications and ensure the right information about the status of a project is delivered to the right audience at the right time
* Have good working relationships with engineers, managers, and peers


**All About You**
* Overall, 9\-14 years of experience int a similar role or field
* Participate in the definition and development of project requirements and analyze requirements to provide a recommended solution. Ensure a successful delivery, which may include: development and management of overall project plan, schedule \& budget adherence, status reporting, escalations, testing, user approval, final corrections, and methodology compliance. Manage relationship with project team which may include the project requesters. Provide senior management level status reports. Log, track, and resolve project, business or release related issues. Coordinate multiple project efforts.
* Recognize discordant views and take part in constructive dialog to resolve them
* Verbal and written communication is clear and concise
* Improve team processes that accelerate delivery, drive innovation, lower costs, and improve quality
* Knowledge / Experience:
* Demonstrated expertise in the areas of strategy, planning and project management required.
* Strong analytical/problem solving and planning skills.
* Strong leadership, interpersonal, communication, and negotiation skills required with a solid track record for developing internal and external relationships.
* Advanced knowledge of SAFe Agile, project management processes and techniques.
* Advanced experience with structured methodology and project planning tools. Skills/ Abilities:
* Leadership Skills including conflict and resource management, financial management, process improvement orientation, relationship building and organizational and planning skills.
* Communication Skills – listening, verbal, presentation and written.
* Proficient in PowerPoint, Excel and Word.
* Demonstrate individual and team ethics.


**Corporate Security Responsibility**
**Responsibilities**
 All activities involving access to Mastercard assets, information, and networks comes with an inherent risk to the organization and, therefore, it is expected that every person working for, or on behalf of, Mastercard is responsible for information security and must:
   

  

* Abide by Mastercard’s security policies and practices;
* Ensure the confidentiality and integrity of the information being accessed;
* Report any suspected information security violation or breach, and
* Complete all periodic mandatory security trainings in accordance with Mastercard’s guidelines.

68dc8470.title: Senior Technical Program Manager
68dc8470.description:
Come work at a place where innovation and teamwork come together to support the most exciting missions in the world!
   

  

* As a Senior Technical Program Manager at Qualys, you will drive the execution of complex, cross\-functional programs at the intersection of Threat Research, Product, and Platform Engineering. You will own end\-to\-end program delivery, translate deep technical work into measurable business outcomes, and ensure operational excellence in a high\-velocity cybersecurity environment.


 This role demands strong technical acumen, rigorous execution discipline, and the ability to influence across engineering, research, and executive leadership.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Program Planning \& Execution**
* Define program scope, success criteria, and dependencies; create and execute detailed quarterly and multi\-quarter program plans.
* Drive on\-time delivery of complex technical initiatives across research, engineering, and platform teams.
* Own program governance, milestone tracking, and execution cadence, including sprint planning and reviews.
* Cross\-Functional Leadership
* Act as the primary interface (“API”) between Threat Research, Product Management, Platform Engineering, and Executive stakeholders.
* Identify downstream dependencies early, negotiate timelines, and resolve conflicts to prevent execution bottlenecks.
* Hold engineering and research teams accountable to commitments while fostering strong collaboration and trust.
* Risk, Dependency \& Incident Management
* Proactively identify technical, operational, and delivery risks; define mitigation strategies and contingency plans.
* Translate technical blockers and security risks into clear business impact statements for leadership and product stakeholders.
* Demonstrate resilience and decisiveness in high\-pressure environments such as SOC, Threat Research, or Incident Response operations.
* Technical Ownership \& Domain Expertise
* Own and manage the Threat Research execution queue, ensuring alignment with product and platform priorities.
* Apply a strong understanding of the cybersecurity threat landscape, including CVEs, CVSS scoring, exploit maturity (PoC vs. weaponized exploits), and vulnerability lifecycle.
* Ensure seamless handoff of research outputs into productization and engineering workflows.
* Metrics, Dashboards \& Reporting
* Define and track KPIs to measure program health, delivery performance, risk posture, and operational efficiency.
* Design, script, and maintain automated dashboards using tools such as JIRA, Salesforce, Tableau, APIs, SQL, or Python.
* Deliver clear, data\-driven insights to technical teams and executive leadership.
* Process Excellence \& Tooling
* Configure, maintain, and optimize program management tools (JIRA, Salesforce, Confluence) to support scalable execution.
* Drive continuous improvement of workflows, operating models, and Agile practices to enhance efficiency and quality.
* Own the team’s information architecture in Confluence, enforcing a “documentation\-first” culture—no operational process exists unless it is documented.
* Required Qualifications
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related technical field.
* 8\+ years of experience in Technical Program Management or Project Management within technology\-driven organizations.
* Strong expertise in SDLC, Agile methodologies, and program execution at scale.
* Hands\-on experience with tools such as JIRA, Confluence, and reporting platforms.
* Exceptional communication, stakeholder management, and leadership skills.
* Proven ability to operate effectively in fast\-paced, evolving, and high\-stakes environments.
* Preferred Qualifications
* Experience working in the cybersecurity domain, including vulnerability management, threat research, SOC, or incident response.
* Familiarity with SQL and/or Python for data extraction, analysis, and reporting.
* Experience supporting or leading programs involving security research, platform engineering, or cloud\-scale products.

1d3c199a.title: Senior Program Manager, ECR, NOC ECR
1d3c199a.description:
The Executive Customer Relations Team operates within Amazon India's Network Operations Center (NOC), serving as the critical bridge between senior leadership escalations and systemic customer experience improvement. The team manages direct escalations from L10\+ leaders requiring comprehensive investigation, root cause analysis, executive\-level communications, and cross\-functional action item ownership. This team aims to transform every executive escalation into a systemic improvement opportunity by conducting rigorous root cause analysis, driving timely CAPA closures, and identifying thematic defect patterns that convert to programmatic interventions — ultimately reducing repeat defects and elevating the end\-to\-end customer experience across Amazon India's operations.
   

  

 The individual in this role will collaborate across a team of program, product, tech, BI and Science leaders to plan, execute, validate, and deploy complex customer experience capabilities. This role will partner will partner with teams across IN Ops to launch and drive impact through bespoke product solutions. The ideal candidate will obsess over customers and have a proven track record of delivering results while managing high level of complexity. Successful candidates will have experience with Program Management, have experience working with a variety of cross\-organizational stakeholders, and be able to juggle competing priorities.
   

  

 As a Program Manager, you will be responsible for identifying, scoping, and delivering large end to end programs.You will have the opportunity to engage with experienced cross\-disciplinary teams to conceive of and design innovative customer facing initiatives.You thrive through creating a vision, building consensus and driving teams towards results.You will anticipate bottlenecks, provide escalation management, anticipate and make trade\-offs, and balance the business needs versus technical constraints.An ability to take large, significantly complex projects and break them down into manageable pieces, develop functional specifications, then deliver them in a successful and timely manner is expected.Maturity, high judgment, negotiation skills, ability to influence are essential to success in this role.This role will require the candidate be self\-sufficient to analyze large amounts of data. So, working knowledge of SQL is critical for success.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* They will be responsible for working with all Miles(LM,MM,FC), Multiple Program teams( ACES, DSP, IHS, FC), Multiple Product teams( ROW APEX, DEX, RCX) to identify pain points and scope out large high impact solutions to improve Delivery Experience
* They will be responsible for driving VP inquiries to closure within SLA with clear articulation of issue and recommended initiatives to arrest the root cause of the defect.
* The program manager will develop a roadmap and metrics to measure progress of the Action Items provided during VP inquiry. They will also own writing reports that detail the progress to leadership on a frequent basis
* They will liaise across functions to drive their project and help clear issues and bottlenecks.
* They will work with technology teams to scope out and drive any tech changes that are needed Basic Qualifications: \- 5\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* 5\+ years of delivering cross functional projects experience
* Experience owning program strategy, end to end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership Preferred Qualifications: \- Master's degree, or MBA in BI, finance, engineering, statistics, computer science, mathematics, finance or equivalent quantitative field
* 2\+ years of driving process improvements experience


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

f32a62b6.title: Presales Solutions Architect
f32a62b6.description:
**About The Role**
 This is a highly technical sales role. You will act as the technical co\-pilot for our Account Executives during complex enterprise pitches.
   

  

 You will translate high\-level business problems into concrete software architectures, building trust with the client's CTO/Engineering teams.
   

  

**About URTech Computers:** 
 We are a leading IT solutions provider specializing in custom software development, digital transformation, and scalable enterprise architecture. By joining our team, you will be part of an innovative environment that values technical excellence and delivers cutting\-edge digital products to clients globally.
   

  

 What You'll Do
   

  

* Partner with Sales Directors on high\-value enterprise deals to provide deep technical expertise.
* Conduct technical discovery workshops with prospective clients to uncover their true infrastructure and software needs.
* Design high\-level system architectures, cloud topologies, and data flow diagrams for proposed solutions.
* Author the technical sections of proposals, RFPs, and Statement of Work (SOW) documents.
* Build and deliver custom Proof of Concepts (PoCs) or technical product demonstrations.
* Act as the seamless handover bridge between the sales team and the project delivery/engineering team.


 What We're Looking For
   

  

* 6\+ years of experience, ideally transitioning from a Senior Software Engineer/Architect role into Presales/Client\-facing work.
* Deep, hands\-on knowledge of cloud platforms (AWS/Azure), microservices, and modern web frameworks.
* Incredible ability to explain highly complex technical concepts to non\-technical business stakeholders.
* Experience writing detailed technical specifications and SOWs.
* High emotional intelligence and a natural consultative approach to problem\-solving.
* Willingness to travel for critical in\-person client workshops.


 Tech Stack \& Tools
   

  

 Lucidchart / Draw.ioAWS Architecture ToolPostmanGitHub
   

  

 Benefits \& Perks
   

  

 Comprehensive Health \& Wellness Coverage
   

  

 Flexible Work Hours \& Location Independence
   

  

 Annual Learning \& Development Budget ($2,000\+)
   

  

 Premium Hardware (MacBook Pro, 4K Monitors)
   

  

 Unlimited Paid Time Off (PTO)
   

  

 Annual Company Retreats
   

  

 The Interview Process
   

  

 1
   

  

 Technical Screen
   

  

 2
   

  

 Mock Client Discovery Call
   

  

 3
   

  

 Architecture Whiteboarding Session
   

  

 4
   

  

 Final Round

3531cb42.title: Cloud Pre-sales Architect
3531cb42.description:
**Title:** 
 Cloud Pre\-sales architect
 



  





 The Senior Cloud Pre\-sales Architect is responsible for complex cloud\-based solutions that meet client’s business and technical requirements. This position supports and influences sales teams by providing deep expertise in cloud computing technologies and architectures ensuring the effective design, deployment and operation of our cloud\-based systems to meet client needs.
 



  





**Key Roles and Responsibilities:** 



* Collaborate with stakeholders to understand business requirements and translate them into scalable, secure, and cost\-effective cloud solutions.
* Viewed as a trusted advisor to the client and ensure technical solutions will accomplish the client's objectives
* Provide pre\-sales technical support and expertise in analysing client requirements, in conjunction with the client’s current collaboration capabilities.
* Assess existing systems and develop migration strategies to transition on\-premises applications and infrastructure to the cloud.
* Work on solutions to enable seamless data flow between cloud and on\-premises environments.
* Advanced experience as a Cloud Pre\-sales Architect or a similar role, designing and implementing cloud architectures for complex systems and applications.
* Advanced experience in cloud\-based solutions, preferably using leading cloud platforms such as Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).
* Advise on security best practices and compliance standards for cloud\-based systems.
* Act as trusted advisor on cloud governance frameworks, policies, and procedures.
* Provide guidance and support to development teams to ensure adherence to cloud architecture standards and best practices.
* Working with the relevant internal stakeholders, participate or lead in scope of work determination, product pricing and RFP/RFI responses.
* Assist with the determination of outsourcing, product pricing and collaborates with others to develop an implementation solution.
* Responsible for influencing and guiding members of the Sales team and to ensure that they are equipped to close deals and maintain visibility of forecasting and sales pipeline in order to influence potential deals.
* Manage client proof of concept (POC) initiatives, which will require the involvement of the appropriate resources, and setup and delivery of the POC.
* On all assigned engagements, owns the proposed solution and transitions the build / implementation to the delivery team.
* Serve as a subject matter expert on cloud technologies and architectures.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including developers, operations, and project managers, to ensure alignment of technical solutions with business objectives.
* Evaluate each opportunity for alignment with NTT capabilities and business policy
* Prepare the executive summary that outlines all of the information gathered from the client in regards to their needs, as understood
* Document the proposed technology solution
* Document the statement of work along with all labour requirements
* Work with the relevant internal stakeholders to prepare the pricing format that will be supplied to the customer.
* Perform the actual solution design and prepare a parts list outlining equipment to be provided.
* Develop and manage a proof\-of\-concept as such may be required
* Engage all technical resources required for an accurate solution design
* Document all deliverables and what constitutes a successful completion.
* Review the final parts list as supplied and submit all information to the applicable bid team for final assembly
* Verify the proposal’s accuracy and sign off on the final documents to be presented to the client
* Assist during the final presentation to the client as appropriate
* Understanding cloud design patterns, microservices, serverless computing, containers, and hybrid cloud deployments
* Deep knowledge such as Amazon Web Services (AWS), Microsoft Azure, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), or other providers, understanding the specific services offered by each platform, including compute, storage, databases, networking, and security



  





**Academic Qualifications and Certifications:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in relevant field of study (Computer Science, Information Technology, etc)
* Vendor product, sales and technology certifications
* Relevant cloud certifications such as AWS Certified Solutions Architect, Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect or Google Cloud Certified \- Professional Cloud Architect.



  





**Required Experience:** 



* Advanced demonstrable professional technical experience within a large scale (preferably multi\-national) technology services environment

bc8625c8.title: SOLUTION ARCHITECT L2
bc8625c8.description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
 Role Purpose
 



 The purpose of this role is to define secure integration strategies, devise solution frameworks for enterprise systems, and identify infrastructure dependencies to enable efficient and compliant implementation.
 


 ͏
 
 Area of Responsibility
 



 Requirement Analysis\-Collaborate with business leaders and technical teams to define solution strategies that align with enterprise IT roadmap, security, and risk management requirements, ensuring implementation feasibility across multiple systems.
 



 Designing\-Create design frameworks for enterprise systems, review implementation across applications, and assist in creating reusable patterns and governance processes to ensure proper integration and risk control.
 



 Integration assessment and support\-Define integration framework, manage infrastructure dependencies, and create strategies for secure and efficient integration across enterprise systems.
 



 Troubleshooting\-Assess the solution in the client environment and address any issues identified during the troubleshooting process through appropriate remediation steps.
 



 Risk Analysis and Assessment\-Identify potential risks, potential impact and define governance processes for risk management and compliance across enterprise solutions and review its adherence.
 



 RFPs\-"Collaborate with sales and delivery teams to contribute to proposals by providing inputs on the interoperability of multiple applications within an enterprise system, identification of change areas, and integration approaches aligned with business needs."
 


 ͏ ͏ ͏
 
 Mandatory Skills: Hyperion Planning .
 



  
 



 Experience: \>10 YEARS
   

 .
 



  
 



 Reinvent your world. We are building a modern Wipro. We are an end\-to\-end digital transformation partner with the boldest ambitions. To realize them, we need people inspired by reinvention. Of yourself, your career, and your skills. We want to see the constant evolution of our business and our industry. It has always been in our DNA \- as the world around us changes, so do we. Join a business powered by purpose and a place that empowers you to design your own reinvention.

9c131295.description:
Job description:
   

  

 Job Description
 
 Role Purpose
 



 The purpose of this role is to design solution architecture for cross\-system interactions and business logic integration, ensuring seamless interoperability across multiple applications.
 


 ͏
 
 Area of Responsibility
 



 Requirement Analysis\-Participate in requirement discussions with client stakeholders to define solution and implementation level needs basis the business requirements.
 



 Designing\-Create solution architecture designs to meet cross\-system interactions and business logic integration requirements, ensuring system cohesion across multiple applications.
 



 Integration assessment and support\-Assess and evaluate interactions across multiple applications by evaluating implementation dependencies and integration requirements.

95b73f72.title: Sr Solution Architect
95b73f72.description:
**Overview**
* Blue Yonder is a leading AI\-driven Digital Supply Chain and Cognitive Planning Solutions company, enabling global enterprises to transform end\-to\-end supply chain operations through intelligent, autonomous, scalable, and cloud\-native planning platforms.
* Leveraging advanced AI, Machine Learning, Optimization, and Agentic AI, Blue Yonder empowers smarter, faster, and more resilient decision\-making across Demand Planning, Supply Planning, Inventory Optimization, Fulfillment, Logistics, and Manufacturing.
* We are seeking highly skilled Solution Architects / Sr. Solution Architects with deep expertise in Supply Chain Planning implementations, strong consulting and solutioning capabilities, and proven customer engagement experience.


**Scope**
* Lead end\-to\-end implementations of Blue Yonder Supply Chain Planning solutions (ESP, DSP, IO, OP, S\&OP/IBP, Production Planning, Supply Planning). Architect scalable, high\-performance planning solutions aligned with customer business objectives and industry best practices.
* Drive solution lifecycle from requirements gathering, design, configuration, integration, SIT/UAT, Go\-live, and Hypercare. Provide thought leadership on supply chain transformation initiatives and AI\-enabled planning journeys.
* Mentor consultants and guide implementation teams across functional and solution architecture areas.
* Support integration with ERP, APS, MES, WMS, TMS, Data Lakes, and Cloud platforms.


**What You’ll Do**
* Lead customer workshops for business process discovery, blueprinting, gap analysis, and future\-state operating model design.
* Design and validate complex supply planning models (multi\-echelon, constrained planning, deployment, inventory optimization, sourcing prioritization, capacity planning, scenario modeling).
* Handle challenges involving solver behavior, planning trade\-offs, data quality, performance optimization, and scalability.
* Develop solution design documents, functional specifications, data mapping, and testing strategies.
* Communicate business cases to Product Management and Development for future product enhancements.
* Support customer success initiatives, driving adoption of advanced planning capabilities.
* Act as a trusted advisor, enabling faster deployments and improved customer adoption through AI\-enabled methodologies.


**What We’re Looking For**
* 10\+ years of hands\-on experience in Supply Chain Planning implementations and consulting.
* Proven expertise in Blue Yonder ESP, DSP, IO, OP, and advanced planning solutions.
* Experience with other platforms (Kinaxis, o9, OMP, SAP APO/IBP, Oracle SCP) is an advantage.
* Strong domain expertise across industries such as CPG, Hi\-Tech, Automotive, Process Manufacturing, and Industrial Manufacturing.
* Excellent customer\-facing consulting and stakeholder management skills.
* Technical exposure to SQL, Python, Oracle, Snowflake, APIs, cloud\-native architectures, and BY Data Cloud.
* Understanding of AI/ML\-driven planning, intelligent forecasting, and Agentic AI accelerators.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, and communication skills; APICS or supply chain certifications preferred.
* Ability to independently lead customer discussions, architect scalable solutions, and deliver measurable business value.


**Our Values**
 If you want to know the heart of a company, take a look at their values. Ours unite us. They are what drive our success – and the success of our customers. Does your heart beat like ours? Find out here: Core Values
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

3efd9303.title: Senior Techno-Functional Consultant – Adobe Experience Cloud
3efd9303.description:
Lead / Senior Techno\-Functional Consultant – Adobe Experience Cloud

**Experience:** 8–10 Years  
**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

Job Summary

We are looking for an experienced **Lead / Senior Techno\-Functional Consultant – Adobe Experience Cloud** to drive digital transformation initiatives across customer experience, marketing automation, and content operations. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Adobe Experience Cloud solutions, with the ability to bridge business and technical teams to design, implement, and optimize scalable customer engagement solutions.

Key ResponsibilitiesSolution Design \& Architecture

* Translate business requirements into scalable Adobe Experience Cloud solutions.
* Design integrated architectures across Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO), Adobe Experience Platform (AEP)/Real\-Time CDP, AEM Assets, Adobe Workfront, and Adobe GenStudio.
* Define data flows, system integrations, and customer journey orchestration frameworks.
* Build and optimize content supply chain models aligned with business objectives.

Customer Journey \& Personalization

* Design and implement real\-time customer journeys using Adobe Journey Optimizer.
* Configure audience segmentation, decisioning rules, and personalization strategies.
* Enable multi\-channel engagement across email, web, SMS, and push notifications.
* Monitor and optimize campaign performance using analytics and experimentation.

Customer Data Platform (CDP)

* Develop unified customer profiles by integrating data from multiple sources.
* Implement identity resolution, audience segmentation, and real\-time activation strategies.
* Ensure data quality, governance, compliance, and best practices across the customer data platform.

Digital Asset \& Content Management

* Manage digital assets using Adobe Experience Manager (AEM Assets).
* Define content governance, asset lifecycle management, and content reuse strategies.
* Collaborate with marketing and content teams to improve campaign efficiency and asset utilization.

Marketing Operations

* Implement and optimize Adobe Workfront for campaign planning and workflow management.
* Automate approval processes and improve marketing operations.
* Integrate Workfront with Adobe Experience Cloud solutions to streamline campaign execution.

AI\-Driven Content Innovation

* Support AI\-powered content creation using Adobe GenStudio or similar platforms.
* Identify opportunities for automated content generation and personalized marketing.
* Collaborate with stakeholders to improve campaign performance through AI\-enabled solutions.

Integration \& Enterprise Collaboration

* Design integrations between Adobe platforms and enterprise applications such as CRM, ERP, and eCommerce systems.
* Work with engineering teams on APIs, middleware, and cloud\-based deployments.
* Ensure solutions align with enterprise architecture, security, and governance standards.

Stakeholder Management

* Partner with business, marketing, and technology teams to gather requirements and deliver scalable solutions.
* Conduct workshops, solution demonstrations, and architecture discussions.
* Provide technical guidance and best practices across the Adobe Experience Cloud ecosystem.
* Drive continuous improvement and support digital transformation initiatives.

Required Skills

* 8–10 years of experience in Digital Platforms, Marketing Technology, or Enterprise Applications.
* Strong hands\-on experience with **Adobe Journey Optimizer (AJO)**.
* Expertise in **Adobe Experience Platform (AEP) / Real\-Time CDP**.
* Experience with **Adobe Experience Manager (AEM Assets/DAM)**.
* Hands\-on experience with **Adobe Workfront** and **Adobe GenStudio** (or similar AI\-powered content platforms).
* Strong understanding of customer journey orchestration, personalization, and marketing automation.
* Experience integrating Adobe solutions with CRM, ERP, and enterprise platforms.
* Knowledge of APIs, middleware, cloud platforms (Azure, AWS, or GCP), and enterprise integration patterns.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and problem\-solving skills.

Preferred Qualifications

* Experience delivering enterprise\-scale Adobe Experience Cloud implementations.
* Strong understanding of content supply chain, digital asset management, and customer data platforms.
* Experience working in Agile environments and collaborating with cross\-functional teams.
* Adobe Experience Cloud certifications are a plus.

If you're passionate about delivering innovative digital experiences and leveraging Adobe Experience Cloud to drive business transformation, we'd love to hear from you.

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Noida, Uttar Pradesh (Noida)

ca3800cf.title: Cloud Infrastructure Lead/Architect
ca3800cf.description:
**Cloud Infrastructure Lead/Architect**

**Location:** Remote  
**Employment Type:** C2C / Full\-Time (FTE)  
**Experience:** 10\+ Years

**Job Summary**

We are seeking an experienced **Cloud Infrastructure Lead/Architect** to design, implement, and manage scalable, secure, and highly available cloud infrastructure solutions. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience with **Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code (IaC)**, along with strong technical leadership and client\-facing experience.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, architect, and implement scalable, highly available, and secure cloud infrastructure on GCP and/or AWS.
* Develop and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform.
* Deploy and manage Kubernetes workloads using Helm and Kustomize.
* Design and implement CI/CD pipelines using GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Cloud Build, Harness, or similar tools.
* Implement rolling, canary, and blue/green deployment strategies.
* Ensure infrastructure security, compliance, auditability, and observability.
* Troubleshoot and resolve complex infrastructure and platform issues.
* Provide technical leadership, mentoring, and architectural guidance to engineering teams.
* Collaborate with clients to understand technical and business requirements and deliver effective cloud solutions.
* Participate in Agile planning, backlog management, and sprint activities.
* Support pre\-sales engagements by providing technical expertise when required.

**Required Skills**

* 10\+ years of experience in Cloud Infrastructure, Platform Engineering, or a similar role.
* Strong hands\-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or Amazon Web Services (AWS).
* Expertise in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform).
* Strong experience with Kubernetes, Helm, and Kustomize.
* Experience designing and managing CI/CD pipelines and deployment automation.
* Knowledge of cloud security, governance, compliance, and best practices.
* Experience with monitoring, logging, and infrastructure observability tools.
* Strong understanding of high availability, scalability, disaster recovery, and cloud architecture.
* Experience leading technical teams and mentoring engineers.
* Excellent communication, analytical, and stakeholder management skills.

**Preferred Skills**

* Python or other scripting languages.
* Experience with Machine Learning infrastructure.
* Experience with GitHub, GitLab, Bitbucket, Cloud Build, or Harness.
* Experience working in Agile environments.
* Client\-facing consulting experience.

**Preferred Certifications**

* Google Cloud Professional Cloud Architect
* Certified Kubernetes Administrator (CKA)
* Google Cloud Security or Networking Certifications
* AWS Solutions Architect Certification

**Education**

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

**Must\-Have Skills**

* Google Cloud Platform (GCP) and/or AWS
* Terraform
* Kubernetes
* Helm \& Kustomize
* Infrastructure as Code (IaC)
* CI/CD Pipelines
* Cloud Security \& Compliance
* Cloud Architecture
* Technical Leadership
* Client Engagement

Pay: ₹90,000\.00 \- ₹120,000\.00 per month

Experience:

* Cloud Infrastructure: 10 years (Required)

Work Location: Remote

d1c9774d.title: Cloud Platform Engineer
d1c9774d.description:
**Project Role :** 
 Cloud Platform Engineer
   

  

**Project Role Description :** 
 Designs, builds, tests, and deploys cloud application solutions that integrate cloud and non\-cloud infrastructure. Can deploy infrastructure and platform environments, creates a proof of architecture to test architecture viability, security and performance.
   

  

**Must have skills :** 
 ServiceNow IT Service Management (ITSM)
   

  

**Good to have skills :** 
 NA
   

  

**Minimum 3 Year(s) Of Experience Is Required**
**Educational Qualification :** 
 15 years full time education
   

  

 Summary:
   

  

 As a Cloud Platform Engineer, a typical day involves designing and developing cloud\-based application solutions that seamlessly integrate both cloud and traditional infrastructure components. The role includes building and testing these solutions to ensure they meet performance and security standards. Additionally, the engineer deploys infrastructure and platform environments and creates proof of architecture models to validate the feasibility and robustness of the proposed designs. Collaboration with various teams to align technical solutions with business needs is also a key part of the daily activities.
   

  

 Roles \& Responsibilities:
   

  

* Expected to perform independently and become an SME.
* Required active participation/contribution in team discussions.
* Contribute in providing solutions to work related problems.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure smooth deployment and integration of cloud solutions.
* Continuously monitor and optimize cloud infrastructure for performance and cost efficiency.
* Document architecture designs and deployment processes to support knowledge sharing and future maintenance.
* Assist junior team members by providing guidance and support in technical tasks.


 Professional \& Technical Skills:
   

  

* Must To Have Skills: Proficiency in ServiceNow IT Service Management.
* Experience with cloud infrastructure deployment and management.
* Strong understanding of cloud security principles and best practices.
* Ability to design and implement scalable and reliable cloud architectures.
* Familiarity with automation tools and scripting for cloud environment management.
* Knowledge of integration techniques between cloud and on\-premises systems.


 Additional Information:
   

  

* The candidate should have minimum 3 years of experience in ServiceNow IT Service Management.
* This position is based at our Gurugram office.
* A 15 years full time education is required.


 , 15 years full time education

52b810a2.title: Solution Architect - Supply Chain Engineering
52b810a2.description:
**Key Responsibilities**
* Define and maintain solution architectures supporting Supply Chain functions, including demand planning, procurement, manufacturing, inventory management, warehousing, logistics, and order fulfillment.
* Collaborate with business leaders and product owners to understand strategic priorities and translate them into scalable technology solutions.
* Develop architecture blueprints, integration designs, data flows, and technical specifications that align with enterprise architecture principles.
* Lead solution design across ERP, WMS, TMS, MES, APS, integration platforms, cloud services, and analytics solutions.
* Ensure seamless integration between enterprise applications using APIs, middleware, event\-driven architectures, and data platforms.
* Evaluate emerging technologies and recommend innovative solutions that improve operational efficiency, visibility, and business agility.
* Provide technical leadership during project delivery, ensuring adherence to architecture standards, security policies, and quality requirements.
* Conduct architecture reviews, design validations, risk assessments, and technical governance throughout the project lifecycle.
* Partner with cybersecurity, infrastructure, data, and application teams to ensure secure, reliable, and high\-performing solutions.
* Support vendor evaluations, technology selection, proof\-of\-concepts, and solution roadmaps.
* Mentor development teams on architecture best practices, design patterns, and technical standards.
* Maintain architecture documentation and contribute to continuous improvement of architecture frameworks and governance processes.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline. Master's degree is preferred.
* 8 to 12 years of experience in enterprise application architecture, solution design, or systems engineering, with significant experience in Supply Chain technology.
* Proven experience designing solutions using ERP platforms such as SAP S/4HANA, Oracle, Microsoft Dynamics, or equivalent enterprise applications.
* Strong understanding of Supply Chain processes, including procurement, planning, manufacturing, warehouse management, transportation, and distribution.
* Experience with cloud platforms, enterprise integration technologies, APIs, microservices, and event\-driven architectures.


**Required Skills**
* Strong expertise in enterprise and solution architecture methodologies.
* Experience with application integration, middleware, ETL, messaging platforms, and API management.
* Knowledge of cloud technologies (Azure, AWS, or Google Cloud), DevOps, CI/CD, and containerization technologies.
* Familiarity with data architecture, analytics platforms, and master data management.
* Excellent analytical, problem\-solving, and decision\-making skills.
* Strong communication, stakeholder management, and presentation abilities.
* Ability to influence cross\-functional teams and drive technical alignment across multiple projects.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with Industry 4\.0, IoT, AI/ML, digital manufacturing, automation, or advanced analytics solutions.
* Certifications such as TOGAF, SAP Solution Architect, Azure Solutions Architect, AWS Certified Solutions Architect, or equivalent.
* Experience in global manufacturing, consumer goods, life sciences, or industrial organizations.
* Knowledge of Agile methodologies, SAFe, and architecture governance frameworks.
