****Senior Program Manager\- RDT Hyderabad****
**Work Location \- Hyderabad**
 As the Senior Program Manager, you are the operational architect of Roche Digital Technology’s (RDT) most critical strategic evolution: the transformation of our global external ecosystem and the establishment of the RDT Tech Hub in Hyderabad. You will bridge the gap between high\-level executive vision and on\-the\-ground execution, orchestrating a large\-scale, time\-bound initiative that fundamentally redefines how Roche harnesses digital talent.
   

  

 Operating with significant autonomy, you will manage the roadmap, rigorous financial tracking, and value\-realization targets of a unified workforce strategy. This is a "legacy\-building" role designed for a transformative leader capable of driving cultural change and operational excellence across a global multinational matrix.
   

  

**Key Accountabilities**
* Strategic Hub Orchestration: Lead the end\-to\-end delivery of the "RDT Hyderabad Tech Hub." Define the multi\-year roadmap, establish KPIs, and ensure the seamless integration of this new capability into the global RDT ecosystem
* Ecosystem \& Value Optimization: Execute a program strategy that leverages deep market insights to drive cost efficiencies and value creation. You will move the organization toward a more effective digital delivery model by optimizing external partner engagements
* Governance \& Workforce Policy: Implement a consistent governance framework and "Total Workforce Management" policies. Ensure RDT functions are aligned with how we attract, manage, and retain talent in a hybrid global model
* Executive Stakeholder Management: Act as the primary liaison for the RDT Leadership Team. Prepare executive\-level briefings, influence senior decision\-makers to remove roadblocks, and ensure cross\-functional alignment with Finance, P\&C (HR), Legal, and Procurement
* Change Leadership: Drive the cultural shift required for a successful transformation. You will guide global teams through the adoption of new operational processes and foster a "partnership\-first" mindset with strategic vendors
* Financial \& Data Integrity: In partnership with Financial Enterprise Partners, oversee the program budget. You will be responsible for the "Planned vs. Actual" tracking of costs and the synthesis of complex data into actionable insights for the CDTO and leadership


**Key Leadership Competencies And Skills**
* Market Intelligence: Knowledge of the Indian Global Capability Center (GCC) landscape, including talent trends, vendor ecosystems, and operational best practices
* Strategic Program Leadership: Proven track record of managing $10M\+ digital transformation portfolios. You are adept at using Agile and Waterfall methodologies to manage complex, cross\-functional workstreams
* Executive Presence \& Influence: Exceptional ability to navigate a complex matrix organization. You can persuade C\-suite\-level stakeholders and build consensus across disparate global regions
* Business \& Financial Acumen: Ability to translate operational data into clear P\&L impacts. You possess a "business\-owner" mindset regarding budget management and resource allocation
* Analytical Problem Solving: A pragmatic approach to troubleshooting large\-scale organizational hurdles, with the ability to simplify complex information into clear strategic choices


 \#RDT2026
   

  

 Who we are
   

  

 A healthier future drives us to innovate. Together, more than 100’000 employees across the globe are dedicated to advance science, ensuring everyone has access to healthcare today and for generations to come. Our efforts result in more than 26 million people treated with our medicines and over 30 billion tests conducted using our Diagnostics products. We empower each other to explore new possibilities, foster creativity, and keep our ambitions high, so we can deliver life\-changing healthcare solutions that make a global impact.
   

  

 Let’s build a healthier future, together.
   

  

**Roche is an Equal Opportunity Employer.**

c5788649.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Amazon MGM Studios Tech
c5788649.description:
**Description**
 We are looking for a Senior Technical Program Manager (TPM) to drive complex,
   

  

 cross\-functional programs across the Sales \& Licensing technology portfolio. In this
   

  

 role, you will partner closely with engineering, product, business, legal, and finance
   

  

 stakeholders to deliver programs that accelerate deal velocity, improve content
   

  

 distribution efficiency, and scale our monetization capabilities.
   

  

 You will own end\-to\-end program delivery for initiatives spanning platform integrations,
   

  

 agentic AI automation, API modernization, and multi\-team migration programs — operating
   

  

 with a high degree of autonomy and leading through ambiguity at scale.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end technical program delivery for one or more workstreams within the


 Sales \& Licensing technology portfolio, from requirements definition through
   

  

 production launch and post\-launch measurement.
   

  

* Define and maintain program plans, milestones, risk registries, and escalation paths;


 drive weekly program reviews and executive status reporting (WBR, QBR, MBR).
   

  

* Partner with SDMs and engineering leads to identify dependencies, surface blockers,


 and coordinate across 5\+ concurrent workstreams spanning multiple time zones.
   

  

* Drive alignment between technical teams and business stakeholders — including Sales,


 Finance, Legal, and Distribution Operations — on requirements, trade\-offs, and
   

  

 delivery commitments.
   

  

* Build and maintain the operational rhythm for program execution: sprint planning


 cadences, decision logs, RACI matrices, and DRI accountability mechanisms.
   

  

* Identify systemic process gaps and design scalable mechanisms to address them,


 including tooling improvements, runbooks, and automation of manual reporting workflows.
   

  

* Contribute to OP1/OP2 planning cycles by owning headcount justification narratives,


 investment ask documentation, and program\-level cost\-benefit analysis.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience building and evaluating system\-level technical design
* Experience developing and executing/delivering product and technical roadmaps


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

028fda06.title: Sr Technical Infrastructure Program Mgr, Operations Infrastructure Solutions
028fda06.description:
**Description**
 Amazon Operations Infrastructure Solutions (OIS) is seeking an experienced Sr Technical Infrastructure Program Manager (TIPM) for our team. Amazon teams and systems create a complex ecosystem with coordination challenges for large initiatives. As the Sr TIPM of Engineering, you will need to coordinate across this network of teams and own delivery of cross organization initiatives. Using your technical background, you will need to understand implementation challenges of each organization and team, and find solutions while also earning trust with senior management to drive adoption from the top down.
   

  

**A Successful Candidate Will Also Demonstrate**
* High attention to detail
* Ability to think strategically and execute methodically
* Demonstrated ability to influence management
* Ability to work in a fast\-paced environment where continuous innovation is desired
* Committed to learning and expanding professional and technical knowledge
* Demonstrated analytical and quantitative skills and ability to use hard data and metrics to back up assumptions and develop business cases
* Ability to clearly communicate data insights to others
* Willingness to roll up your sleeves and do whatever is necessary; owner mentality
* Demonstrated ability to dive deep in understanding the product, our business, and the market landscape


 Key job responsibilities
   

  

**In This Role**
* You manage complex infrastructure builds, delivering critical solutions, significant improvements, new mechanisms, or deprecating processes that are no longer needed. These efforts require you to work with multiple teams in and/or across organizations.
* You are accountable for the overall strategy of a large program. You successfully manage all stages (from concept to delivery). Your program meets business goals and/or shows measurable improvements in your customer’s experience, business or employee efficiency or execution, compliance adherence, financial or other metrics, etc.
* You understand the interdependencies and functionality of the technologies you work with (e.g. customer requirements, deployment constraints, design limitations, operational support requirements). You influence team priorities and business strategy through data\-supported contributions. You are able to make a case for project priorities, resource allocation, and/or appropriate program adoption, to achieve a desired business outcome, resolve a technical deficiency, or unblock delivery.
* You communicate ideas effectively, verbally and in writing, to a wide range of audiences including Directors and VPs. You foster a constructive dialogue, harmonize discordant views, and lead the resolution of contentious issues (build consensus). You partner successfully with customers, stakeholders, and engineering teams.
* Your program management practices set a great example to others. You routinely and efficiently deliver the right things. You define clear goals and objectives. You drive crisp decisions in your program area about what projects move forward and in what priority order. You proactively identify risks and bring them to the attention of your team and stakeholders with plans for mitigation before they become roadblocks.
* You are a simplifier. You judiciously add, refine, and remove procedures. By applying project management best practices, you increase the productivity and effectiveness of the teams you work with.
* You actively participate in the hiring process as well as mentor others \- improving their skills and ability to get things done.


 A day in the life
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at Amazon, we embrace our differences. We are committed to furthering our culture of inclusion. We have ten employee\-led affinity groups, reaching 40,000 employees in over 190 chapters globally. We have innovative benefit offerings, and host annual and ongoing learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon (diversity) conferences. Amazon’s culture of inclusion is reinforced within our 16 Leadership Principles, which remind team members to seek diverse perspectives, learn and be curious, and earn trust.
   

  

 Work/Life Balance
   

  

 Our team puts a high value on work\-life balance. It isn’t about how many hours you spend at home or at work; it’s about the flow you establish that brings energy to both parts of your life. We believe striking the right balance between your personal and professional life is critical to life\-long happiness and fulfillment. We offer flexibility in working hours and encourage you to find your own balance between your work and personal lives.
   

  

 Mentorship \& Career Growth
   

  

 Our team is dedicated to supporting new members. We have a broad mix of experience levels and tenures, and we’re building an environment that celebrates knowledge sharing and mentorship. We care about your career growth and strive to assign projects based on what will help each team member develop into a better\-rounded professional and enable them to take on more complex tasks in the future.
   

  

 Amazon offers a full range of benefits that support you and eligible family members, including domestic partners and their children. Benefits can vary by location, the number of regularly scheduled hours you work, length of employment, and job status such as seasonal or temporary employment.
   

  

 If you are not sure that every qualification on the list above describes you exactly, we'd still love to hear from you!
   

  

 At Amazon, we value people with unique backgrounds, experiences, and skillsets. If you’re passionate about this role and want to make an impact on a global scale, please apply!
   

  

**About The Team**
 This role is specifically to manage cross cutting program for the Amazon Robotics/AFT/OpsTechIT organizations. It is a large multi\-year initiative, involving 30\+ teams, and with significant technical complexity and visibility.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of program management or technical project management experience
* Bachelor's degree or equivalent in a related technical field
* Experience in project/program management
* Knowledge of information technology infrastructure domains such as compute server platforms, storage server platforms, server components, network devices, technologies and architectures, IT service delivery principles and best practices
* Experience managing conflict, escalations, negotiating compromise, influencing others and problem solving with engineering teams
* Experience participating in continuous improvement projects in your team to scale and improve controllership with measurable results, or experience communicating results to senior leadership
* Experience communicating across technical and non\-technical audiences, including executive level stakeholders or clients
* Experience managing large\-scale projects from end to end


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience in one or more of the following areas: data center or network capacity planning, data center or network infrastructure program/project management, or related technical fields
* project management certification (e.g., APM, CSM, PMI\-ACP, PRINCE2\)
* Experience owning program strategy, end\-to\-end delivery, and communicating results to senior leadership
* Experience in core project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, risk management, and critical path management


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10471203

c5211574.title: Senior Presales Sales Engineer
c5211574.description:
Cohesity is the leader in AI\-powered data security. Over 13,600 enterprise customers, including over 85 of the Fortune 100 and nearly 70% of the Global 500, rely on Cohesity to strengthen their resilience while providing Gen AI insights into their vast amounts of data. Formed from the combination of Cohesity with Veritas’ enterprise data protection business, the company’s solutions secure and protect data on\-premises, in the cloud, and at the edge. Backed by NVIDIA, IBM, HPE, Cisco, AWS, Google Cloud, and others, Cohesity is headquartered in Santa Clara, CA, with offices around the globe.
   

  

 We’ve been named a Leader by multiple analyst firms and have been globally recognized for Innovation, Product Strength, and Simplicity in Design , and our culture.
   

  

**Want to join the leader in AI\-powered data security?**
 As a Senior Pre\-Sales Engineer, you will leverage your deep expertise in data protection, including enterprise backup and recovery solutions like Cohesity DataProtect and NetBackup, along with strong knowledge of cybersecurity, enterprise storage, networking, virtualization, and cloud infrastructure (IaaS/PaaS). Experience with emerging AI/ML technologies in the context of data management or security is a plus. You will harness Cohesity’s expanded post\-merger portfolio – spanning data security, modern backup and recovery, cloud\-native protection, ransomware recovery, cyber resilience, and AI\-powered data management – to solve complex IT challenges and deliver unparalleled value to customers. We also expect you to bring a strong network and credibility within the India tech market, leveraging your relationships and reputation as a go\-to expert to accelerate Cohesity’s growth.
   

  

**HOW YOU’LL SPEND YOUR TIME HERE:**
* Uncover and drive new customer opportunities by providing sales and technical assistance, effectively articulating Cohesity technology to both business and technical users.
* Enable customers to seamlessly integrate Cohesity products into their production environments, ensuring flawless operation and meeting their specific needs.
* Develop and lead the secondary storage technology strategy for our largest customers and partners, establishing Cohesity as the primary solution provider in the market.
* Communicate Cohesity's vision by delivering engaging product demonstrations, workshops, white papers, and proposals.
* Identify customer needs and craft proof of concepts to showcase the value and capabilities of Cohesity technology.
* Collaborate closely with product management as a field representative, providing valuable insights and conveying customer requirements for product development and improvements.
* Provide project management and post\-sales technical support as required, ensuring customer satisfaction throughout the entire lifecycle.


**WE’D LOVE TO TALK TO YOU IF YOU HAVE MANY OF THE FOLLOWING:**
* Extensive Pre\-Sales Success: 8\+ years of demonstrable success in a customer\-facing pre\-sales engineering or solutions architect role, proposing and delivering enterprise IT solutions at all levels of a customer organization. You have a track record of influencing decision\-makers and winning strategic deals with your technical leadership.
* Experience working with both clients and technology partners, fostering strong relationships and driving successful outcomes.
* Demonstrated experience in selling and implementing Enterprise Hardware or Software, Cloud Platforms, IaaS, PaaS, or Virtual Infrastructure software.
* Comfortable engaging with multiple decision\-makers to drive proposals and secure business opportunities.
* Exceptional presentation skills, with the ability to effectively communicate technical and business concepts to both small and large groups.
* Excellent written, verbal, and interpersonal communication skills, enabling clear and concise interactions with all parties involved.
* Self\-motivated and a self\-starter, capable of working remotely and autonomously to achieve targets.
* Willingness to travel as required by the role.
* Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Mathematics, or a related field, or equivalent experience.
* Demonstrated experience leveraging AI tools to streamline workflows, enhance productivity, and support high\-quality decision\-making.


**Data Privacy Notice for Job Candidates:
   

  

 For information on personal data processing, please see our* 
 Privacy Policy
 *.**
**Equal Employment Opportunity Employer (EEOE)
   

  

 Cohesity is an Equal Employment Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status or any other category protected by law.
   

  

 If you are an individual with a disability and require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are limited in the ability or unable to access or use this online application process and need an alternative method for applying, you may contact us at 1\-855\-9COHESITY or* 
 talent@cohesity.com
 *for assistance.**
**In\-Office Expectations
   

  

 Cohesity employees who are within a reasonable commute (e.g. within a forty\-five (45\) minute average travel time) work out of our core offices 2\-3 days a week of their choosing.**

a958c59b.title: IND HCS Rewards Solutions Senior Associate Consultant
a958c59b.description:
**Title \-** 
 Senior Associate Consultant
   

  

**Business \-** 
 Talent Solutions Consulting
   

  

**Role Type \-** 
 Core Client Facing
   

  

**Work Mode \-** 
 In Office
   

  

**Location \-** 
 Gurgaon/Bangalore
   

  

**Cab Facility \-** 
 No
   

  

**Shift Timings \-** 
 Flexible
   

  

**Education**
* Graduates from “A” grade institutes in related discipline (Statistics, Math’s, Economics, Commerce, Engineering and Business Administration)


**Technical Skills**
* Proficiency in MS Excel, PowerPoint, Analytics, Data skills.
* R, VBA, Macros, Predictive Analytics, Statistical Modelling, Linear Regression (Preferable)


**About AON**
**Aon plc (NYSE: AON)** 
 (formerly known as Aon Hewitt) is the world’s pre\-eminent firm offering broad range of solutions to clients in the area of risk, retirement, health, wealth and human capital solutions.
   

  

 Our singular focus is on our clients: We deliver distinctive value, top\-rated customer service, and measurable business impact.
   

  

**Aon’s Talent Solutions consulting** 
 practice is one of the largest full spectrum HR consulting practices and is home to firm’s rewards, talent assessment, and talent strategy practices. We apply this expertise, and our market\-leading workforce data, to help clients tackle transformational projects requiring integrated solutions to client problems. We develop insights on performance and people analytics \- driven by our proprietary data, technology, and advisory services \- to help clients reduce volatility and improve outcomes.
   

  

 We have more than 300 consultants serving India market helping clients with their most complex challenging problems using deep insights and analytics. We are trusted advisors for wide variety of organizations including BSE500 and work with largest set of early\-stage technology organizations in the country.
   

  

 Typical areas in which we help clients across variety of industries are:
   

  

* Rewards Design Management
* Performance Management
* Sales and Executive Compensation
* Incentive Design (STI and LTI)
* Job Evaluation and Grading
* Organizational Structuring
* Careers and Job Architecture
* Talent and Digital Transformation
* Pay Equity
* Workforce Analytics
* Compensation benchmarking
* Rewards Strategy


 Assessment Solutions Practice Take The Objective Measurement Of Candidate Information To The Next Level. Our Solutions Are Brand\-supporting, Innovative, Engaging And Employ The Best Of AI And Psychometric Advancements That Help Our Clients Achieve Game\-changing Results. Some Of The Projects Will Cut Across Below Areas
   

  

* Talent Selection Process Design
* Person Job Fit Analysis
* Success Profile Creation
* Succession Planning Design \& Recommendation
* Hi\-pot Talent Identification \& Development
* Assessment Center Design and Deployment


**Aon HR Learning Center** 
 is geared to shape the future of HR with its highly specialized learning journeys for HR and business professionals. Incubated in 2012, we are spread over 15 countries globally, and have an alumni base of 10,000\+ professionals.
   

  

 Above solutions are tools we use to solve our clients most stressing problems which are at the cusp of business and talent. We pride ourselves in being the best in these areas while continuing to be able to innovate and incubate newer solution areas which allow us to continuously add values to our clients.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
 You begin with us as somebody who is able to pull deep insights from our data, create compelling presentations and tell our clients stories they cannot forget. We expect to show ownership, accountability, and extreme learning agility. We would love for you to show us depth not only in solution areas but also in your understanding of how client organization function.
   

  

 You will be a part of highly energized team in consulting and depending on projects you will wear different hats ranging from performing complex analytics, wowing our clients, managing small projects to bringing in sales.
   

  

* Client/Relationship Management: Fosters long term mutually beneficial relationship between client organizations and Aon. Is seen as a trusted advisor to mid\-level client touchpoints. Is able to fulfil client requests in a timely manner and can co\-ordinate with other internal stakeholders to provide an end\-to\-end solution for client problems.
* Project Delivery: Works on projects of Mid to Large complexity as a team member. Focuses on delivering client value on time with zero re\-work. Strives to exceed client expectations in terms of quality of output.
* Project Management: Manages projects of small to mid\-complexity. Co\-ordinates with team members to plan and execute project delivery. Ensures project is delivered on time.
* Thought Leadership: To contribute to thought leadership in the FI sector for India. McLagan is seen as a leading thought leader in the sector with timely articles, white papers, roundtables, client events. The incumbent will contribute to this through content development, research, marketing events and other such activities.
* Business Development: Focuses on client sales opportunities across hunting and farming. Understands client requirements, is able to explain to the client the solutions being proposed and customizes basis feedback.


**Skills \& Experience**
* Develop proposal and execute projects.
* Problem Solving Ability
* Ability to work independently and on a team across multiple projects.
* Independent, proactive with solution thinking \& design
* People who have interest ranging from macroeconomics to MCU.
* Creative data junkies who enjoy solving impossible
* People with sharp analytical skills who can enthrall clients with stories
* Willingness to stretch
* Openness to travel


**Desired Candidate Profile**
 You Bring a Strong Analytical Ability But a ‘people\-focused’ Approach As Well As The Ability To See Things From An End\-user Perspective. You Will Also Have
   

  

* A strong passion for translating people data into meaningful insights that can ‘tell a story’,
* Intermediate to Advanced skillset with MS Excel and other MS office tools.
* Commitment to ongoing learning.
* Project \& Client Relationship Management
* Insights and report quality
* Ability to visualize large sets of data and build stories around it.
* Passion for driving results and focused on outcome and process
* Deal with immense ambiguity and navigate oneself from problem to the solution.


 2580712

6f68901e.title: Digital Solutions - NetSuite - Senior Consultant II (Inventory & Manufacturing) (Location: India)
6f68901e.description:
***We’re looking at you—high\-achievers, challenge\-seekers, and innovation\-chasers.***
 Professionals who never shy away from complex problems. We hire the top 1% and let your talents soar.
   

  

**Preferred Skillset** 
 : Inventory \& Manufacturing
   

  

**Location** 
 : HYBRID \- Pune, Bangalore, Mumbai, Delhi (NCR)
   

  

**Shift Timing** 
 : 3pm\-11:30pm IST
   

  

**Level** 
 : Senior Consultant II (3\-5 years of experience)
   

  

 Are you an intellectually curious, deal oriented professional who enjoys coming up with innovative solutions to complex business issues? Connor Group is seeking professionals who want to build off their existing accounting, operational, and industry experience. We execute finance projects and digital solutions projects that add value to our clients within their finance, accounting, and operations, and technology departments. From complex technical accounting and financial reporting issues to implementing modern technologies to finance software implementation and automation, joining Connor Group will help you exponentially to further develop your career and expand your experience base.
   

  

 Connor Group is a specialized professional services firm of Big 4 alumni, and industry executives and technology architects. Our team of highly experienced professionals assists financial executives with their most complex business needs, including Accounting Advisory, Digital Solutions, Financial Operations, IPO, M\&A, and Managed Services.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Work in a team environment on NetSuite related projects including new implementations, enhancements, integrations, support, and other special projects
* Meet with business leaders, decision makers and end users to define business requirements and systems goals
* Document and develop business processes flows, requirements and design
* Create, customize, and manage NetSuite fields, workflows, roles/permissions, custom objects, custom records, scripts, reports, saved searches, dashboards, etc.
* Identify test criteria and test new functionality/enhancements
* Provide training to end users
* Assist with preparation of the project status report, project timeline and project budget


**Requirements**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, Accounting, or the equivalent
* 3\-5 years of NetSuite experience
* Strong knowledge of key financial processes such as Quote to Cash, Procure to Pay, Record to Report, etc.
* Excellent interpersonal, presentation, writing and communication skills
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills; intellectual curiosity
* Entrepreneurial nature, self\-motivated, ethical, and dependable
* Willingness to travel up to 25%, including international travel


**Preferred Qualifications**
* CPA and/or Master’s degree
* NetSuite certification


 Connor Group is committed to celebrating the value of diversity in a globally connected business world. Our team culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take initiative. Our professionals are committed to excellence, growth, and integrity. By focusing on innovation, we continue to raise the bar on excellence and deliver greater value to our clients.
   

  

 At Connor Group, our professionals are provided with resources and opportunities to help achieve their professional goals while maintaining a healthy and happy work life balance. From health insurance packages and wellness programs to our one\-on\-one coaching program and career development opportunities, we empower our professionals by investing in their growth, health, and happiness.
   

  

 \#Remote
   

  

*"We know that difficult problems attract some of the brightest and most courageous people in the world."*
**Jeff Pickett**
 Connor Group Founder and Chair

* Excellent interpersonal, presentation, writing and communication skills
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills; intellectual curiosity

**Preferred Qualifications**

 Connor Group is committed to celebrating the value of diversity in a globally connected business world. Our team culture is collaborative and encourages team members to take initiative. Our professionals are committed to excellence, growth, and integrity. By focusing on innovation, we continue to raise the bar on excellence and deliver greater value to our clients.
   

  

 At Connor Group, our professionals are provided with resources and opportunities to help achieve their professional goals while maintaining a healthy and happy work life balance. From health insurance packages and wellness programs to our one\-on\-one coaching program and career development opportunities, we empower our professionals by investing in their growth, health, and happiness.

**Jeff Pickett**

709330bf.title: Architect
709330bf.description:
Position: Architect

**Location:** Auckland Place, AJC Bose Road, Kolkata  
**Department:** Design \& Projects  
**Industry:** Real Estate \& Construction

Job Summary

We are seeking a talented and experienced **Architect** to join our Design \& Projects team. The Architect will be responsible for planning, designing, coordinating, and monitoring architectural aspects of residential, commercial, and mixed\-use developments. The role involves preparing and reviewing architectural drawings, coordinating with consultants and project teams, ensuring compliance with statutory regulations, and maintaining the highest standards of design quality throughout the project lifecycle.

The ideal candidate should possess strong technical expertise, sound knowledge of construction practices, and the ability to coordinate effectively with internal departments, consultants, contractors, and regulatory authorities.

Key Responsibilities

* Develop architectural concepts, layouts, and detailed designs in line with project requirements.
* Prepare, review, and coordinate architectural drawings, working drawings, construction details, and specifications.
* Coordinate with Structural, MEP, Landscape, and Interior Design consultants to ensure seamless integration of all building services.
* Review consultant drawings and ensure compliance with project objectives, applicable codes, and statutory regulations.
* Coordinate with project execution teams to resolve design\-related issues during construction.
* Conduct site visits to monitor architectural work and ensure execution aligns with approved drawings and specifications.
* Review material samples, finishes, façade details, and mock\-ups before implementation.
* Participate in design review meetings and provide technical solutions for architectural challenges.
* Liaise with local authorities, consultants, and external agencies for approvals and statutory compliance.
* Prepare design presentations, concept reports, and architectural documentation for management and clients.
* Coordinate with the Procurement team regarding architectural materials, finishes, and technical specifications.
* Monitor project timelines related to architectural deliverables and ensure timely completion.
* Maintain all architectural records, drawings, revisions, and project documentation.
* Stay updated on modern architectural trends, sustainable design practices, and innovative construction materials.

Qualifications

* Bachelor's Degree in Architecture (B.Arch.) from a recognized university.
* Registration with the Council of Architecture (COA) is preferred.
* A Master's Degree in Architecture, Urban Design, or Sustainable Design will be an added advantage.

Experience

* **Minimum 5 years of relevant experience is mandatory** in architectural design and project coordination within the Real Estate \& Construction industry.
* Experience in residential, commercial, mixed\-use, hospitality, or township projects is preferred.
* Proven experience in coordinating projects from concept design through construction and final handover.
* Strong understanding of building by\-laws, development regulations, and statutory approval processes.

Technical Skills

* AutoCAD
* Revit Architecture
* SketchUp
* Lumion (Preferred)
* Adobe Photoshop
* Adobe Illustrator
* Microsoft Office
* BIM Coordination (Preferred)
* Knowledge of the National Building Code (NBC), local building by\-laws, and construction standards.

Key Competencies

* Architectural Design \& Planning
* Design Coordination
* Working Drawing Preparation
* Site Coordination
* Construction Documentation
* Material \& Finish Selection
* Design Review \& Quality Assurance
* Consultant Coordination
* Project Planning \& Time Management
* Problem Solving \& Decision Making
* Communication \& Presentation Skills
* Attention to Detail

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)

* Timely completion of architectural deliverables.
* Accuracy and quality of architectural drawings.
* Effective coordination with consultants and project teams.
* Compliance with project schedules and statutory requirements.
* Reduction in design\-related site issues and rework.
* Successful management of design revisions and documentation.
* Adherence to company quality standards and design objectives.

Compensation

Compensation will be commensurate with the candidate's qualifications, relevant experience, technical expertise, and overall skill set, in accordance with the company's compensation policy.

Pay: From ₹25,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Paid sick time
* Paid time off

Application Question(s):

* WHAT IS YOUR CURRENT SALARY?

Experience:

* REAL ESTATE OR CONSTRUCTION: 2 years (Preferred)
* ARCHITECT: 2 years (Preferred)

Work Location: In person

76c8d69b.title: Presales Engineer
76c8d69b.description:
StarcSec is an AI\-driven unified exposure management platform built to cut through alert noise and surface the exposures that truly matter. By ingesting telemetry from code repositories, CI/CD pipelines, cloud environments, and runtime sensors, the platform builds a live asset graph that delivers a single, continuously updated view of an organization’s attack surface and security posture. Advanced AI capabilities provide NLP\-enhanced summaries of scan outputs, dynamic risk scoring, predictive threat analysis, and guided remediation — helping teams prioritize and eliminate the exposures most likely to be exploited. StarcSec supports complex environments, from microservices architectures to global DevSecOps pipelines, enabling teams to move faster without compromising protection.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 The Presales Engineer role at StarcSec is a full\-time position based in India. The Presales Engineer will work closely with prospective customers to understand their exposure management, application security, and DevSecOps requirements, demonstrate how StarcSec unifies and prioritizes findings across their code, cloud, and runtime environments, and design tailored solution architectures.
 



**Day\-to\-day activities include:** 




 • Conducting technical presentations and product demos that showcase unified exposure management use cases — asset graph visibility, risk\-based prioritization, and AI\-guided remediation
 



 • Responding to RFPs and technical questionnaires
 



 • Supporting proof\-of\-concept and pilot implementations, including mapping customer telemetry sources into the platform
 



 • Collaborating with sales colleagues to build compelling proposals and business cases centered on exposure reduction and alert\-noise consolidation
 



 • Providing technical guidance on integration with customer environments (scanners, CI/CD, cloud, ticketing, and developer tooling)
 



 • Gathering product feedback from the field and partnering with engineering and product teams to refine features and use cases
 



  





**Qualifications** 




 • Strong presales and sales skills, including solution consulting, requirements discovery, and stakeholder communication
 



 • Technical support skills, such as troubleshooting, environment analysis, and customer\-facing problem resolution
 



 • Integration skills, with experience connecting security platforms to CI/CD pipelines, cloud services, and developer tooling
 



 • Security expertise, ideally spanning exposure management, attack surface management, vulnerability management and prioritization, application security, DevSecOps practices, or cloud security; familiarity with CTEM (Continuous Threat Exposure Management) concepts is a strong advantage
 



 • Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Security, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience
 



 • Experience in SaaS, cybersecurity, or developer tools, along with familiarity with APIs, scripting, and modern software development workflows, is highly beneficial
 



 • Strong communication and presentation abilities, comfort engaging with both technical and business stakeholders (from AppSec engineers to CISOs), and the capacity to work in a fast\-paced startup environment
 



 • Professional certifications in security or cloud (such as CISSP, CCSP, OSCP, or vendor\-specific credentials) are a plus

5d381de9.description:
**Job Summary**
 Responsible for analyzing and gathering business and technical requirements to design and document fit\-for\-purpose solutions. Contributes to solution development, design, integration and testing, and configuration of technology solutions ensuring that delivered solutions adhere to defined architecture and security standards. Works closely with with cross\-functional teams, vendors, and business partners to ensure smooth execution and continuous improvement in solution performance and quality. Ensure seamless solution implementation and effective issue resolution.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Supports the design of fit\-for\-purpose solutions by collaborating with stakeholders to identify integration points and ensure alignment with business processes and goals. Supports technical analysis, design and customization of potential solutions including evaluating the technical fit and viability of commercial\-off\-the\-shelf products versus custom built solution. Develops and maintains technical design documents, workflows, and architecture diagrams. Assists in defining and executing the test strategy and validating solutions against business objectives. Ensures smooth interoperability by validating integrations and documenting configuration steps. Identifies and communicates potential technical dependencies and risks. Works with vendors and IT service providers to address technical issues, evaluate and improve product functionality and ensure proper configuration according to design specifications. Designs and implements data migration solutions to ensure data accuracy and reliability. Develops, designs, tests, maintains and configures solutions and systems as needed. Serves as subject matter expert and point of contact on content, processes, procedures and functionality associated with assigned applications for projects and application support (as needed). Documents recommendations to enhance business process efficiency and increase adoption of standard application features and capabilities, aligning solutions with enterprise standards. Supports continuous improvement initiatives by following established design standards and learning to identify potential enhancements in solution design or workflow efficiency. Assists technical and infrastructure groups in understanding the solution design and specifications. Works closely with IT technical service providers to ensure outsourced work packages are delivered to specifications, meeting key parameters of quality, schedule, cost, data privacy, security, performance, and scalability. Participates in formal design reviews, cybersecurity reviews and code reviews (where applicable) to ensure the detailed design specifications have been understood and coding standards and cybersecurity regulations have been adhered to by the development team(s).

8332a342.title: Solution Engineer (ETL, Cloud)
8332a342.description:
**Application and Interview Impersonation Notice
 
 :** 
 Impersonating another individual when applying for employment, and/or participating in an interview process to assist another individual in obtaining employment, with Precisely Software Incorporated (“Precisely”) is unlawful.  If Precisely identifies such fraudulent conduct, then as applicable and to the extent permitted by law, the application will be rejected, an offer (if made) will be rescinded, or the employment will be terminated, and legal action may be taken against the impersonators.
 



 Precisely is the leader in data integrity. We empower businesses to make more confident decisions based on trusted data through a unique combination of software, data enrichment products and strategic services. What does this mean to you? For starters, it means joining a company focused on delivering outstanding innovation and support that helps customers increase revenue, lower costs and reduce risk. In fact, Precisely powers better decisions for more than 12,000 global organizations, including 95 of the Fortune 100\. Precisely's 2500 employees are unified by four company core values that are central to who we are and how we operate: Openness, Determination, Individuality, and Collaboration. We are committed to career development for our employees and offer opportunities for growth, learning and building community. With a "work from anywhere" culture, we celebrate diversity in a distributed environment with a presence in 30 countries as well as 20 offices in over 5 continents. Learn more about why it's an exciting time to join Precisely!
 



 Precisely is an AI\-first organization. All employees are expected to demonstrate proficiency in applying AI tools to accelerate their work, improve output quality, and eliminate low\-value tasks. Candidates should be comfortable using generative AI tools (e.g., Microsoft Copilot, ChatGPT) in their day\-to\-day workflows, able to evaluate AI\-generated outputs critically, and open to continuously adopting new AI capabilities as they emerge.
 







**Overview:** 
 The Solution Engineer is a technically skilled professional who plays a critical role in enabling the Sales Engineering organisation to operate at maximum effectiveness. This role focuses on delivering high‑quality technical support for Sales Engineers by ensuring all assets and environments are maintained and ready for use, to advance and close opportunities efficiently. Proactively research and build innovative solutions and work closely with Solution Architects and Sales Engineers to ensure alignment, strengthen knowledge sharing and drive enablement  
 



**What you will do:** 



* Collaborate with Solution Architects and Sales Engineers to identify relevant strategic solutions
* Design, build and maintain reuseable product demos, environments, solutions and technical assets
* Effectively communicate the value and/or advantages of solutions in both technical and business context
* Provide high\-quality technical support to Sales and Sales Engineering as required



**What we are looking for:** 



* Experience supporting geographically distributed Sales Engineering teams
* Proficiency in creating custom demos, POCs and technical environments
* Minimum of two\-years of experience in customer\-facing technical roles
* Experience using LLMs (e.g. Claude, GPT, Gemini)
* Programing experience, any language
* Knowledge of hyperscalers (AWS, GCP, Azure) and Linux/Windows
* Minimum of two\-years of experience working with data\-management cloud applications such as Databricks or Snowflake
* Working knowledge of data\-intensive applications including Matillion, Informatica, Talend
* Familiarity with data disciplines; Governance, Quality, MDM, Observability
* Experience with major DBMS systems such as Oracle, DB2, SQL Server, Cassandra, MongoDB
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to translate technical concepts into customer‑friendly language
* Travel is required: No
* Bachelor of Science in Computer Science, Computer Engineering, Information Systems, Electrical Engineering, or other related technology disciplines. (Candidates with other degrees will be considered if they are able to demonstrate sufficient technical proficiency and expertise.)







 The personal data that you provide as a part of this job application will be handled in accordance with relevant laws. For more information about how Precisely handles the personal data of job applicants, please see the Precisely Candidate Privacy Notice

3122e21e.title: Senior Solution Architect (Java | Spring Boot | React | Enterprise Applications)
3122e21e.description:
**About the Role**

We are looking for an experienced **Solution Architect** to lead the architecture and technical design of a large\-scale enterprise application involving inspection management, workflow automation, external system integrations, cloud deployment, security, reporting, and enterprise portals.

decb9870.title: Microsoft Security Architect / Engineer
decb9870.description:
**Location:** Remote  
**Experience:** 6–10 Years  
**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

Job Summary

We are seeking a highly skilled Microsoft Security Architect / Engineer to design, implement, and govern enterprise cloud security solutions across the Microsoft ecosystem. The ideal candidate will have hands\-on expertise in Microsoft Defender, Microsoft Entra ID, Microsoft Purview, and Microsoft 365 Security, with experience implementing security controls based on audit findings and compliance requirements.

Key Responsibilities

* Implement and manage Microsoft security solutions across Microsoft 365 and Azure environments.
* Configure and administer Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps (MDCA/MCAS) to enhance cloud application security.
* Design and implement identity and access management solutions using Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD) and Conditional Access policies.
* Implement and manage Microsoft Purview for Data Loss Prevention (DLP), data classification, sensitivity labels, and information protection.
* Strengthen Microsoft 365 Security and Compliance posture by implementing security best practices.
* Develop automation scripts using PowerShell and Microsoft Graph API to streamline security administration.
* Translate security audit findings into actionable implementation plans and remediation activities.
* Collaborate with IT, Security, and Compliance teams to improve the organization's overall security posture.
* Monitor security controls, investigate issues, and ensure continuous compliance with organizational policies.
* Prepare security documentation, governance reports, and implementation guidelines.

Required Skills

* 6–10 years of experience in Microsoft Security, Cloud Security, or Cybersecurity.
* Strong expertise in Microsoft Defender for Cloud Apps (MDCA/MCAS).
* Hands\-on experience with Microsoft Entra ID (Azure AD), Conditional Access, Identity Protection, and Privileged Identity Management (PIM).
* Strong knowledge of Microsoft Purview, including:
* Data Loss Prevention (DLP)
* Data Classification
* Sensitivity Labels
* Information Protection
* Experience with Microsoft 365 Security and Compliance Center.
* Proficiency in PowerShell scripting and Microsoft Graph API.
* Understanding of Microsoft Secure Score and security governance best practices.
* Experience implementing enterprise cloud security policies and governance frameworks.
* Strong troubleshooting, analytical, and documentation skills.

Preferred Skills

* Experience with SOC 2 and PCI DSS v4 compliance frameworks.
* Knowledge of SaaS Security Governance and Cloud Security best practices.
* Familiarity with Microsoft Sentinel, Defender XDR, and Microsoft Intune.
* Experience with Zero Trust Architecture and Identity Security.
* Microsoft Security certifications such as SC\-100, SC\-200, SC\-300, SC\-400, AZ\-500, or equivalent are highly preferred.

Preferred Candidate

* Strong communication and stakeholder management skills.
* Ability to work independently in a remote environment.
* Experience working in enterprise\-scale Microsoft cloud environments.
* Immediate joiners or candidates available to join at short notice will be preferred.

Pay: From ₹500,000\.00 per year

Work Location: Remote

6b612f89.title: Deployment Architect
6b612f89.description:
### **Description**

  

We are looking for a Deployment Architect to lead customer deployments for Velocity Operations within the Infor Velocity Suite. In this role, you will own the architectural approach for deploying Velocity capabilities into customer environments, ensuring each rollout is secure, scalable, supportable, and aligned with enterprise operational needs. You will define deployment standards, reference architectures, environment strategy, governance guardrails, and operational readiness criteria that enable consistent execution across customers. The role requires strong leadership in evaluating deployment risks, establishing non\-functional requirements, guiding technical decisions, and ensuring solutions are ready for adoption, sustainment, and long\-term value realization. The ideal candidate brings deep experience in deployment architecture, customer\-facing engagement, and enterprise platform readiness, with a practical understanding of Infor OS, CloudSuite, and the operational considerations required to successfully run Velocity solutions at scale.### **A Typical Day in the Life Includes:**

  

* Own the deployment architecture for Velocity Operations engagements, defining the target architecture and deployment approach for customer environments.
* Establish reference architectures, deployment standards, and environment design principles to ensure repeatable, scalable, and supportable rollouts across customers.
* Define non\-functional architecture requirements covering security, reliability, observability, scalability, resiliency, and operational supportability.
* Architect end\-to\-end deployment patterns across Infor CloudSuite, Infor OS, APIs, data flows, and third\-party systems, ensuring alignment with enterprise constraints and operational objectives.
* Lead architecture reviews for environment readiness, integration readiness, migration readiness, and production cutover, ensuring solutions are fit for go\-live and sustainment.
* Evaluate deployment risks, identify architectural gaps, and define mitigation strategies to improve rollout success and long\-term platform stability.
* Provide architecture governance for key technical decisions, design exceptions, scope boundaries, and operational guardrails throughout the deployment lifecycle.
* Partner with product, engineering, delivery, and support teams to align deployment architecture with product capabilities, implementation realities, and operational best practices.
* Promote reusable deployment patterns, automation assets, and standardized operating models that accelerate adoption and improve consistency across Velocity deployments.
* Create and maintain architecture artifacts, deployment blueprints, decision records, readiness criteria, and customer\-facing technical guidance to support successful execution at scale.

  


### **Basic Qualifications:**

  

* 10\+ years of experience in enterprise software deployment architecture, solution architecture, platform engineering, or customer\-facing technical consulting, with strong ownership of production rollout readiness.
* Strong understanding of Infor OS, Infor CloudSuite deployment models, integration architecture, APIs, event\-driven patterns, and enterprise platform dependencies.
* Proven experience defining reference architectures, deployment standards, environment strategies, and governance guardrails for repeatable and scalable customer rollouts.
* Deep knowledge of non\-functional architecture requirements, including security, scalability, resiliency, observability, reliability, and operational supportability.
* Experience evaluating deployment risks, assessing platform and environment readiness, and guiding architecture decisions through migration, testing, cutover, and post\-go\-live stabilization.
* Hands\-on experience with REST APIs, integration frameworks, data flows, troubleshooting distributed systems, and resolving deployment and production readiness issues.
* Experience with process automation and operational improvement technologies such as RPA, process mining, GenAI\-enabled workflows, or related transformation solutions is preferred.
* Working knowledge of architecture documentation, decision records, delivery governance, and collaboration tools such as Jira and Confluence/Wiki.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and workshop facilitation skills, with the ability to engage customer, delivery, product, engineering, and leadership teams on architecture direction and deployment readiness.

  


### **About Infor**

**About Infor**
Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn't just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real\-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you're not just building a career. you're helping to build what's next.
  

Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business\-wide digital transformation.  

  

For more information visit www.infor.com **About Infor**
Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn't just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real\-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you're not just building a career. you're helping to build what's next.
  

Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business\-wide digital transformation.  

  

For more information visit www.infor.com
  

**Our Values**
At Infor, we strive for an environment that is founded on a business philosophy called Principle Based Management™ (PBM™) and eight Guiding Principles: integrity, stewardship \& compliance, transformation, principled entrepreneurship, knowledge, humility, respect, self\-actualization.  


  

We have a relentless commitment to a culture based on PBM™. Informed by the principles that allow a free and open society to flourish, PBM™ prepares individuals to innovate, improve, and transform while fostering a healthy, growing organization that creates long\-term value for its clients and supporters and fulfillment for its employees.
  

Infor is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. Infor does not discriminate against candidates or employees because of their sex, race, gender identity, disability, age, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, veteran status, or any other protected status under the law. If you require accommodation or assistance at any time during the application or selection processes, please submit a request by following the directions located in the FAQ section.  

**Fraud Awareness**

3081a5bd.title: Deployment Architect
3081a5bd.description:
### **Description**

  

We are looking for a Deployment Architect to lead customer deployments for Velocity Operations within the Infor Velocity Suite. In this role, you will own the architectural approach for deploying Velocity capabilities into customer environments, ensuring each rollout is secure, scalable, supportable, and aligned with enterprise operational needs. You will define deployment standards, reference architectures, environment strategy, governance guardrails, and operational readiness criteria that enable consistent execution across customers. The role requires strong leadership in evaluating deployment risks, establishing non\-functional requirements, guiding technical decisions, and ensuring solutions are ready for adoption, sustainment, and long\-term value realization. The ideal candidate brings deep experience in deployment architecture, customer\-facing engagement, and enterprise platform readiness, with a practical understanding of Infor OS, CloudSuite, and the operational considerations required to successfully run Velocity solutions at scale.### **A Typical Day in the Life Includes:**

  

* Own the deployment architecture for Velocity Operations engagements, defining the target architecture and deployment approach for customer environments.
* Establish reference architectures, deployment standards, and environment design principles to ensure repeatable, scalable, and supportable rollouts across customers.
* Define non\-functional architecture requirements covering security, reliability, observability, scalability, resiliency, and operational supportability.
* Architect end\-to\-end deployment patterns across Infor CloudSuite, Infor OS, APIs, data flows, and third\-party systems, ensuring alignment with enterprise constraints and operational objectives.
* Lead architecture reviews for environment readiness, integration readiness, migration readiness, and production cutover, ensuring solutions are fit for go\-live and sustainment.
* Evaluate deployment risks, identify architectural gaps, and define mitigation strategies to improve rollout success and long\-term platform stability.
* Provide architecture governance for key technical decisions, design exceptions, scope boundaries, and operational guardrails throughout the deployment lifecycle.
* Partner with product, engineering, delivery, and support teams to align deployment architecture with product capabilities, implementation realities, and operational best practices.
* Promote reusable deployment patterns, automation assets, and standardized operating models that accelerate adoption and improve consistency across Velocity deployments.
* Create and maintain architecture artifacts, deployment blueprints, decision records, readiness criteria, and customer\-facing technical guidance to support successful execution at scale.

  

### **Basic Qualifications:**

  

* 10\+ years of experience in enterprise software deployment architecture, solution architecture, platform engineering, or customer\-facing technical consulting, with strong ownership of production rollout readiness.
* Strong understanding of Infor OS, Infor CloudSuite deployment models, integration architecture, APIs, event\-driven patterns, and enterprise platform dependencies.
* Proven experience defining reference architectures, deployment standards, environment strategies, and governance guardrails for repeatable and scalable customer rollouts.
* Deep knowledge of non\-functional architecture requirements, including security, scalability, resiliency, observability, reliability, and operational supportability.
* Experience evaluating deployment risks, assessing platform and environment readiness, and guiding architecture decisions through migration, testing, cutover, and post\-go\-live stabilization.
* Hands\-on experience with REST APIs, integration frameworks, data flows, troubleshooting distributed systems, and resolving deployment and production readiness issues.
* Experience with process automation and operational improvement technologies such as RPA, process mining, GenAI\-enabled workflows, or related transformation solutions is preferred.
* Working knowledge of architecture documentation, decision records, delivery governance, and collaboration tools such as Jira and Confluence/Wiki.
* Excellent communication, stakeholder management, and workshop facilitation skills, with the ability to engage customer, delivery, product, engineering, and leadership teams on architecture direction and deployment readiness.

  


### **About Infor**

**About Infor**
Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn't just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real\-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you're not just building a career. you're helping to build what's next.
  

Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business\-wide digital transformation.  

  

For more information visit www.infor.com **About Infor**
Infor is where ambition meets impact. Join a global community of bold thinkers and innovators, where your expertise doesn't just solve problems. it shapes industries, unlocks opportunities, and creates real\-world impact for billions of people. At Infor, you're not just building a career. you're helping to build what's next.
  

Infor is a global leader in business cloud software products for companies in industry specific markets. Infor builds complete industry suites in the cloud and efficiently deploys technology that puts the user experience first, leverages data science, and integrates easily into existing systems. Over 60,000 organizations worldwide rely on Infor to help overcome market disruptions and achieve business\-wide digital transformation.  

  

For more information visit www.infor.com
  

**Our Values**
At Infor, we strive for an environment that is founded on a business philosophy called Principle Based Management™ (PBM™) and eight Guiding Principles: integrity, stewardship \& compliance, transformation, principled entrepreneurship, knowledge, humility, respect, self\-actualization.  


  

We have a relentless commitment to a culture based on PBM™. Informed by the principles that allow a free and open society to flourish, PBM™ prepares individuals to innovate, improve, and transform while fostering a healthy, growing organization that creates long\-term value for its clients and supporters and fulfillment for its employees.
  

Infor is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We are committed to creating a diverse and inclusive work environment. Infor does not discriminate against candidates or employees because of their sex, race, gender identity, disability, age, sexual orientation, religion, national origin, veteran status, or any other protected status under the law. If you require accommodation or assistance at any time during the application or selection processes, please submit a request by following the directions located in the FAQ section.  

**Fraud Awareness**
We have been made aware of unauthorized individuals posing as Infor recruiters, including some who have made fraudulent offers of employment. Please read our guidelines and protect yourself from recruitment scams.  

**Fraud Privacy Policy**
We value your privacy at Infor. You may access our privacy policy here.
