You will translate business needs into practical solution designs, guide customization and deployment decisions, and ensure the platform is built for quality, performance, and long\-term maintainability.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

* Lead the design and architecture of ServiceMax solutions aligned with business goals and best practices.
* Partner with stakeholders to gather requirements and turn them into clear technical specifications.
* Oversee ServiceMax customization, configuration, and deployment activities.
* Design and implement integrations between ServiceMax and other enterprise systems.
* Improve workflows and remove inefficiencies to support better service delivery and customer satisfaction.
* Provide technical guidance, coaching, and mentorship to development and delivery teams.
* Support testing, validation, troubleshooting, and issue resolution during implementation and after go\-live.
* Create and maintain technical documentation such as solution designs, architecture diagrams, and user guides.
* Stay current on ServiceMax capabilities and related technologies to recommend improvements and future\-ready solutions.


 How You Will Do It
   

  

* Work closely with business and technical partners to stay grounded in real service processes and deliver solutions that solve the right problems.
* Own the quality of the architecture by making sound design decisions, addressing risks early, and keeping implementations secure, stable, and maintainable.
* Use a continuous\-improvement mindset to question inefficiencies, simplify complex workflows, and strengthen the platform over time.
* Collaborate across teams with openness and trust, bringing different perspectives together to reach the best solution.
* Keep documentation, design rationale, and technical handoffs clear so teams can implement and support the solution effectively.
* Provide practical guidance to delivery teams and help them stay aligned on standards, timelines, and expected outcomes.


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Systems, IT, or a related field.
* 10\+ years of experience in technical architecture, solution architecture, development, or technical analysis.
* Strong experience with ServiceMax and Salesforce Service Cloud.
* Proven experience designing, developing, and deploying ServiceMax solutions, including custom workflows and integrations.
* Strong understanding of field service management processes and cloud\-based architectures.
* Experience translating business requirements into technical designs and solution specifications.
* Experience supporting testing, troubleshooting, and production issue resolution.
* Excellent problem\-solving, communication, and stakeholder management skills.


 Nice to Have
   

  

* Experience integrating ServiceMax with ERP or other enterprise systems.
* Exposure to MuleSoft or Oracle Integration Cloud.
* Knowledge of Oracle and SQL Server.
* Experience with TrueContext.
* A Master’s degree in a related field.


 Why Join Us
   

  

 You will join a collaborative environment where technical expertise helps improve service outcomes and customer experience. This role offers the opportunity to work on meaningful platform architecture, partner with cross\-functional teams, and contribute to solutions that support business growth and continuous improvement.
   

  

 If you are ready to shape ServiceMax solutions that make an impact, we invite you to apply.

3caafe7d.title: Senior Staff Engineer (AI Solution Design)
3caafe7d.description:
**Company Description**
**👋🏼We're Nagarro.**
 We are a Digital Product Engineering company that is scaling in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences that inspire, excite, and delight. We work at a scale — across all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist everywhere in the world (18500\+ experts across 40 countries, to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and non\-hierarchical. We are looking for great new colleagues. That is where you come in!
   

  

**Requirements**
 Job Description
   

  

* Experience : 7\.5\+ years
* Relevasnt experience in a Solutions Architect, Principal Engineer, or equivalent technical leadership role.
* Proven experience designing and delivering enterprise\-scale AI/ML solutions from concept through production deployment.
* Strong expertise in AI application solution design, enterprise architecture, and scalable distributed systems.
* Hands\-on experience designing and implementing Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG) workflows, vector databases, prompt engineering, and LLM evaluation frameworks.
* Strong understanding of Design Systems and the ability to architect scalable, reusable, and user\-centric AI platforms.
* Experience in data science solutioning, including model selection, classification, anomaly detection, clustering, deployment, monitoring, and optimization.
* Strong knowledge of enterprise data architecture, data pipelines, data lakes, batch and real\-time processing, and data quality frameworks.
* Experience with Databricks, Delta Lake, or similar modern data platforms is preferred.
* Proficiency in Python with working knowledge of Java, Go, or Node.js.
* Experience designing REST APIs, event\-driven architectures, and integrating enterprise applications such as ERP systems.
* Good understanding of MLOps practices, including MLflow, model registries, model serving, inference optimization, and AI observability.
* Experience with distributed tracing, logging, monitoring, and alerting for production AI systems.
* Strong analytical, problem\-solving, documentation, and stakeholder management skills.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to translate complex business requirements into scalable technical architectures.
* Experience in fintech, compliance, tax technology, SAP data models, GSTN integrations, or explainable AI solutions is an advantage.


**Responsibilities**
* Lead discovery workshops with business, compliance, assurance, and IT stakeholders to understand business processes, data flows, and existing technology landscapes.
* Analyze enterprise data ecosystems, identify integration opportunities, technical constraints, and delivery risks, and define scalable solution approaches.
* Design end\-to\-end AI application architectures encompassing data ingestion, machine learning, LLMs, RAG workflows, APIs, and application layers.
* Define architecture blueprints, component designs, API contracts, technology stack selections, and end\-to\-end data flow documentation.
* Evaluate business use cases and determine the most appropriate implementation approach using AI, machine learning, LLMs, or rule\-based solutions.
* Establish architecture standards, design principles, and technical governance for enterprise AI platforms.
* Provide technical leadership by conducting architecture reviews, guiding engineering teams, and ensuring adherence to architectural standards.
* Resolve technical challenges, manage architectural risks, and balance technical debt with project delivery objectives.
* Design scalable data ingestion and integration architectures connecting ERP systems, banking platforms, government portals, supplier systems, and enterprise applications.
* Define real\-time and batch data processing strategies to support operational and compliance\-driven business requirements.
* Architect integration frameworks that seamlessly incorporate AI outputs into existing enterprise systems while implementing fallback mechanisms for low\-confidence predictions.
* Collaborate closely with engineering, data science, product, and business teams to ensure successful solution delivery.
* Design AI solutions with scalability, security, explainability, observability, and regulatory compliance as core architectural principles.
* Drive adoption of engineering best practices, reusable design patterns, and modern AI development methodologies across the organization.
* Mentor engineering teams and provide technical guidance throughout the solution lifecycle, from architecture through pilot deployment and production rollout.


**Qualifications**
 Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.

6eefe3d6.title: Technical Architect
6eefe3d6.description:
**About MRC Logistics** 




 MRC Logistics is a 50\-year\-old logistics company building the next generation of technology for Indian supply chains.
 



 We serve 500\+ customers through a nationwide network of 90\+ branches across India, operating across B2B FTL, PTL, warehousing, and supply chain management. We are expanding our in\-house engineering team to build modern backend systems that will become the foundation of our next phase of growth.
 



  





**Role Overview** 




 We are looking for a Technical Architect to design and deliver scalable, reliable and well\-engineered logistics systems.
 



 This role will work closely with the business and engineering teams to translate defined workflows and requirements into robust technical architecture and high\-quality implementation.
 



 This is a hands\-on technical leadership role requiring strong system design, backend engineering and team guidance capabilities.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Translate product requirements and workflows into scalable technical designs, data models and APIs.
* Define service boundaries, database schemas, event flows, permissions and integration patterns.
* Lead engineers through implementation, breaking down designs into execution plans and reviewing code and architecture decisions.
* Establish engineering best practices for quality, testing, deployment and monitoring.
* Create and maintain technical documentation including architecture diagrams, data models and API specifications.
* Define and maintain core logistics data models and reusable platform components like authentication, authorization and audit logs.
* Ensure system reliability, scalability, data consistency and interoperability across platforms.



  





**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering or related field.
* 5–10 years of software engineering experience, with at least 3 years in a System Architecture role, preferably designing large\-scale SaaS or enterprise software solutions.
* Strong understanding of database design, APIs, distributed systems and system architecture.
* Experience leading engineers or acting as a technical lead.

c6cd99d6.description:
**Description**
 We are seeking a highly skilled Java Architect with strong experience in Azure Cloud to design, develop, and implement scalable, secure, and high\-performing enterprise solutions. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in Java technologies, microservices architecture, and Azure cloud\-native services.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

 Architecture \& Design
   

  

 Define end\-to\-end architecture for enterprise\-grade applications using Java and Azure.
   

  

 Design scalable, resilient microservices and API\-based architectures.
   

  

 Lead technical design sessions and develop architecture artifacts (HLD, LLD, sequence diagrams, deployment models, etc.).
   

  

 Evaluate and recommend new tools, technologies, and frameworks for solution improvement.
   

  

 Cloud \& DevOps
   

  

 Architect and deploy applications on Microsoft Azure, leveraging PaaS and IaaS services.
   

  

 Utilize Azure services such as App Service, AKS, Azure Functions, Azure SQL, Service Bus, Event Grid, and Storage Accounts.
   

  

 Collaborate with DevOps teams to implement CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps or GitHub Actions.
   

  

 Ensure compliance with security and governance standards on Azure.
   

  

 Development Leadership
   

  

 Provide hands\-on technical guidance to development teams in Java, Spring Boot, and REST API development.
   

  

 Establish coding standards, best practices, and code review processes.
   

  

 Mentor and guide developers, ensuring adherence to architectural principles.

aae9cc30.title: Staff Software Architect
aae9cc30.description:
**About the Company** 




 Every minute of every day, Smiths Detection’s threat detection and security screening technology helps to protect people and infrastructure, making the world a safer place.
 



 Smiths Detection is a global leader in the development, manufacture and management of security and detection solutions designed to make the world a safer place. Our technology provides threat detection and screening solutions for customers in our key markets: aviation, ports and borders, defence, and urban security
 



  





**About the Role** 




 Define and drive the architectural vision and roadmap aligned with global software solutions. Partner with product and project managers to shape technology strategy and workload analysis. Lead system design, platform engineering, and governance across distributed, cloud\-native environments. Mentor teams, evangelize best practices, and integrate emerging innovations into scalable solutions.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Design and model application/system architecture for internal and external customers.
* Define vision and roadmap aligned with global software solutions.
* Support product/project managers in technology strategy and workload analysis.
* Harmonize and industrialize solution components, ensuring system interoperability.
* Lead architecture and platform\-oriented development projects; standardize tools and platforms.
* Coach teams on best practices and promote technical excellence.
* Conduct technology watch, anticipate innovations, and document technical knowledge.



  





**Qualifications** 



* Bachelor’s/Master’s in Electrical/Electronics/Computer Engineering or equivalent.
* 15\+ years’ experience in distributed systems, microservices, cloud\-native platforms, modernization, and architecture governance.



  





**Required Skills** 



* Advanced proficiency in object\-oriented design, design patterns, data structures, algorithms, and systems architecture
* Expert\-level proficiency in backend development using Java, Spring Framework, with demonstrated expertise in Spring Boot microservices
* Extensive hands\-on expertise with Kubernetes for container orchestration and scalable deployments in production environments
* Deep technical knowledge of SQL databases, with substantial experience in PostgreSQL
* Demonstrated experience with object storage technologies such as S3
* Proven expertise in designing and integrating REST APIs into enterprise systems
* Proficiency in frontend frameworks including HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Angular, React, D3, and jQuery
* Substantial experience with desktop and graphics frameworks including Java SE/EE, Swing, JSF/Primefaces, Motif, and OpenGL
* Proficient working in both Linux and Windows environments
* Demonstrated expertise in Agile methodologies, pair programming, coding standards, Git/Bitbucket, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
* Documented contributions to open source projects and toolchains
* Advanced knowledge of information security risks and secure coding practices
* Substantive exposure to project management techniques and governance frameworks



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Excellent communication and leadership skills.
* Strong ability to drive results, influence stakeholders, and manage cross\-functional teams.
* Skilled in negotiation, critical analysis, and presenting recommendations.
* Passionate about technology trends, with ability to explain architecture clearly to diverse teams.
* Comfortable working in international, multicultural environments.

7626db05.title: Services Delivery Manager (Professional services Team)
7626db05.description:
Why Join Us?
   

  

 Join Check Point Software Technologies as a Delivery Manager and be part of our global mission. As leaders in the Cyber Security industry, we tackle the most complex challenges head\-on. Our diverse team of passionate individuals is dedicated to innovation and excellence. We empower our clients with cutting\-edge solutions, serving a growing global customer base. By joining our team, you'll have the chance to make a meaningful impact in a remote\-friendly, fast\-paced, and fun environment.
   

  

 This role is responsible for leading operational delivery activities across the India Professional Services project delivery business, supporting consultants delivering enterprise security implementations, migrations, upgrades and customer escalations.
   

  

 The environment is highly dynamic and fast paced, requiring strong operational leadership, stakeholder management and delivery governance capabilities.
   

  

 Key Responsibilities
   

  

**Major Responsibilities**
* Create and execute efficient personnel management plans
* Keep consultants utilization at a high level to meet annual objectives
* Improve the skills of our Professional Services consultants
* Maintain and increase the technical certification of consultants on the team
* Maintain strong relationships with customers, partners, sales and SE teams
* Strive to continuously improve current service offerings and delivery governance
* Help develop additional service offerings to enhance customer value
* Own and lead customer escalations end\-to\-end, working directly with customers, sales, SEs, TAC and consultants to drive resolution
* Lead operational cadence calls and ensure actions are tracked through to completion
* Always strive to improve the project delivery process and reporting structure
* Conduct regular 1:1 meetings with consultants
* Identify current and future challenges relating to skills, promotion, utilization and role development
* Demonstrate strong leadership presence by driving discussions, decisions and outcomes
* Be proactive, innovative and operationally focused
* Help with consultant recruitment and hiring
* Act as the primary delivery partner to sales leadership, ensuring regular communication, alignment and execution
* Support management of critical customer cutovers, weekend activities and enterprise delivery requirements
* Drive operational forecasting, resource planning and escalation management across the India project delivery business


**Qualifications**
* Experience managing a team of technical consultants or engineers
* Strong customer service, project management and quality control skills
* Proven experience managing escalations and enterprise customer situations
* Strong resource planning and operational management skills
* Excellent leadership and stakeholder management capabilities
* Strong teamwork skills and attention to detail
* Experience with Check Point technologies is preferred
* Experience managing firewall migrations, enterprise implementations or large\-scale delivery engagements is highly desirable
* Familiarity with technologies such as Maestro, VSX, VPN, CloudGuard and enterprise security environments is advantageous
* Ability to manage conflicts and make strong operational decisions under pressure
* Capacity to mentor and develop team members
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills

c669653c.title: Program Manager - Urban Development, Odisha
c669653c.description:
**About Us**
 WRI India, an independent knowledge organization registered as India Resources Trust, provides objective information and practical proposals to foster environmentally sound and socially equitable development. Through research, analysis, and recommendations, WRI India puts ideas into action to build transformative solutions to protect the earth, promote livelihoods, and enhance human well\-being. Know more: wri\-india.org
   

  

**Program Overview For Sustainable Cities And Transport**
 WRI India's urban development work aims to transform the way cities are planned and designed to ensure that urban development benefits people, nature and climate. We focus on integrated solutions to long\-standing urban challenges, leveraging evidence\-based data, applied research and our network of partners and experts. We collaborate at all levels with the government, city administrations, urban stakeholders and partners to help cities become resilient, low\-carbon and liveable while balancing their socio\-economic goals. Our work seeks to shape a future where cities work better for everyone.
   

  

**Job Highlight**
 The WRI India Ross Center for Sustainable Cities is seeking to fill a full\-time position to advance the work of its initiatives under the Urban Development vertical in the state of Odisha. As part of this vertical, WRI India’s work has spanned areas such as urban planning and economic development, urban water and climate resilience, eco\-city regions, and neighbourhood improvement programmes across Indian cities.
   

  

 In Odisha, over the last five years, WRI India has led several key programmes focused on inclusive public space development, climate and water resilience, and climate finance, working closely with the Government of Odisha and Urban Local Bodies (ULBs) in Bhubaneswar, Baripada and Rourkela. WRI India now seeks to further expand its work in Odisha, particularly focusing on supporting cities and urban local bodies across the state in identifying, preliminary evaluation, developing, structuring, and packaging robust, urban infrastructure projects that are climate\-aligned, implementation\-ready and attractive to public and private sector investors.
   

  

 You will manage and coordinate these projects, primarily serving as the interface between the programme team and government counterparts. You will oversee the day\-to\-day coordination of project activities across team members, ensure timely delivery of outputs to partners, liaise with government departments and agencies, coordinate with local institutions and partners, and work closely with staff across WRI India and WRI Global offices.
   

  

 WRI globally, has deep experience in the urban development sector and is widely recognized as a leader in promoting sustainable cities. Currently, WRI India is supporting various government and private agencies to promote low carbon climate resilient development in Indian cities, ensuring decarbonization that is ‘just’ and ‘inclusive’.
   

  

**What Will You Do**
 The selected candidate will support the Sustainable Cities program at WRI India with the following:
   

  

* Lead engagements with City and State Departments in Odisha to identify opportunities within Odisha State for programmatic convergence through relevant programs, policies and schemes.
* Lead relationships with City and State leadership across Odisha, and across administrative heads, relevant line departments/ agencies/ parastatal organizations/ IFI’s / Bilat/Multilaterals/ CSOs/ NGOs/ local media/ local research institutes for various deliverables under the project.
* Lead the project team and coordinate project deliverables, laisse with relevant government agencies to obtain required data.
* Identify partners and ‘best practice’ consultants to support project activities and deliverables pertinent to each city, that meet WRI India’s high standards of innovation and technical assurance.
* Working closely with consultants in each city and city officials to lead, advise, facilitate and finalise the pre\-feasibility or Detailed Project Reports
* Facilitate collaborative design of projects that address climate challenges and community priorities, working with municipal governments/government departments, engineers, and citizen groups; thereby strengthening partnerships with peer organizations, and partners working on the ground.
* Provide thought leadership on the role of embedded platforms/cells within municipal governments to support the implementation of adaptation and resilience projects and explore innovative financing mechanisms for implementation and long\-term maintenance of nature\-based interventions
* Frequently travel to project relevant cities for all important milestone events during the process
* Support in formulating effective climate policies and regulations, and innovative approaches to mobilize urban climate finance at the local and state levels.


 Lead/contribute/participate in periodical internal project planning, and annual appraisals, results framework assurance, assisting in evidence from the field, setting necessary agendas, creating spaces for effective dialogue with the partners and Govt of Odisha
   

  

**What Will You Need**
* Post\-graduate in the related field of urban planning, urban design, energy, environment, climate change, sustainable development, economics, etc.
* Experience in project execution and knowledge of statutory processes.
* At least 6\-8 years of sectoral experience in the field of climate change; urban design, urban planning and infrastructure project management is a strong plus.
* Demonstrated experience of working with sub\-national governments in India on climate change and urban planning and development
* Knowledge of state\-led urban planning and development programs and initiatives, relevant low\-carbon policies and climate\-resilient development in Odisha
* Strong communication skills, ability to liaise with government and other stakeholders \- to enable data collection, communicate analysis \& findings, and seek feedback iteratively
* Proficiency in quantitative and/or qualitative data collection and analysis
* Demonstrated ability to work both independently as well as part of a team
* Ability to articulate and present complex information in a clear and concise manner
* Ability to think creatively, work calmly and enthusiastically under pressure
* Strong understanding of urban finance and climate finance architecture is a plus.
* Ability to speak, understand, read and write Odiya


**Salary and Benefits: I** 
 NR 18,00,000 to 24,00,000 Per annum
   

  

 Salary shall be commensurate with experience and skills. WRI offers a generous and comprehensive benefits package.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Bhubaneswar, Odisha India
   

  

**Duration** 
 : 1 years as term hire (extendable based on performance and project requirements)
   

  

**Start date:** 
 As soon as possible
   

  

**List Of Documents To Be Attached**
* Cover Letter
* Resume


 Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted for interview purpose.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 Qualified applicants should apply online at www.wri.org/careers. All applications must be submitted online through this career portal in order to be formally considered. Only select applicants will be contacted for interview. There will be a writing test conducted with final candidates. Please do not contact program staff directly for this position.
   

  

*Kindly note that WRI India’s recruitment process does not involve any payment at any stage. Applicants will never be asked to share bank account or financial information as part of the application. All official communication and offer letters are issued only through authorised WRI India email IDs.*
***Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI) @WRI India***
*WRI India values and promotes diversity, equity and inclusion across all areas of our work and workforce. Integrating these values into our actions fosters a progressive and collaborative culture and can also enhance our impact. It is our responsibility to create a welcoming working environment for people of diverse cultures, backgrounds and experience to learn together. We are responsible for fostering a safe and inclusive workplace where questions, concerns and information about diversity, equity and inclusion are part of our ongoing dialogue and development.*
***Learn more about WRI India’s commitment to Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DEI).***
**Click Here**
**People\-centric To The Core**
 We keep our people at the center of everything we do \- from a welcoming work environment to benefits and a culture that encourages staff to stay healthy, happy, engaged, and growing.
   

  

**Some Of The Non\-monetary Benefits That Our Staff Get**
**Health benefits:** 
 We cover health insurance for you and your loved ones for up to INR 8 lakhs
   

  

**Term Insurance:** 
 Our term insurance policy covers life coverage of 50 lakhs per staff member
   

  

**Employee Assistance program:** 
 Promoting mental well\-being and supporting staff in achieving a satisfying work\-life balance
   

  

**Health \& Nutrition:** 
 Personalized diet recommendation from a certified dietitian based on the physical health condition and lifestyle
   

  

**Flexible work schedule:** 
 Alternative work arrangements for all who are eligible by nature of their job
   

  

**Learning culture** 
 : Workshops and trainings to empower staff, encourage new learning opportunities
   

  

**Rest and Recharge weeks:** 
 We encourage staff to take time off to rest, rejuvenate, upskill, and pursue their interests.
   

  

**Our leave policy:** 
 Avail personal time off at 36 per year, along with public holidays, maternity, paternity, and adoption leaves.
   

  

 Click here to know more about our benefits
 **Careers \| WRI INDIA (wri\-india.org)**
**Equal employment @WRI India**
*We believe in equal employment, it is our policy to recruit and provide opportunities for advancement in all job classifications without regard to caste, religion, sex, age, marital status, sexual orientation, parental status, or disability.*

6e2c6f21.title: Solution Architect - Presales
6e2c6f21.description:
Are you a passionate and enthusiastic enterprise architect looking to build your career in solutioning, pre\-sales, and digital transformation?


**Join LevelShift as a Solution Architect Pre\-Sales,** where you'll design scalable enterprise solutions, drive business growth, and help customers achieve their digital transformation goals. You'll collaborate with sales teams, customers, and technical experts to architect innovative solutions across cloud, enterprise applications, AI, and automation technologies.


**What You'll Do**


**As a Solution Architect Pre\-Sales at LevelShift, you will:**


Engage with customers to understand business requirements, technical challenges, and transformation objectives while identifying value\-driven solution opportunities.


Collaborate with sales teams during RFP, RFI, and RFQ processes by preparing technical proposals, solution designs, and effort estimations.


Design end\-to\-end enterprise solution architectures across cloud platforms, CRM, ERP, AI, automation, and integration ecosystems.


Conduct client presentations, workshops, demos, and technical advisory sessions to communicate solution value and business outcomes.


Work closely with delivery and technical teams to ensure solution feasibility, smooth handover, and strategic alignment with customer goals.


**How this role uses AI**


Should be comfortable using AI tools to accelerate solution design, automate repetitive tasks, generate insights, and improve productivity while ensuring responsible AI adoption and governance.


Utilize AI\-assisted proposal generation, requirement analysis, architecture documentation, effort estimation, solution recommendations, and presentation preparation to enhance pre\-sales efficiency.


Leverage AI\-powered tools such as Microsoft Copilot, Azure AI Services, GitHub Copilot, Power Platform AI capabilities, and enterprise AI frameworks to build intelligent, future\-ready solutions.


**Your Skillset**


10\+ years of experience in Pre\-Sales, Solutioning, Enterprise Architecture, or Solution Consulting roles.


Bachelors or Masters degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business Administration, or a related field.


Strong expertise in enterprise technologies including Microsoft platforms, cloud solutions, CRM, ERP, AI, automation, and integration architectures.


Hands\-on experience with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure and AWS.


Strong understanding of enterprise applications including CRM and ERP solutions.


Experience designing AI\-driven, automation, and RPA\-enabled business solutions.


Proven expertise in preparing technical proposals, solution architecture documents, effort estimations, and architecture diagrams.


Strong client engagement skills with experience conducting workshops, presentations, demos, and advisory sessions.


Excellent stakeholder management, communication, and negotiation skills with the ability to influence decision\-making.


Ability to work with enterprise customers on large\-scale digital transformation programs and strategic initiatives.


Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with the ability to identify risks, dependencies, and optimization opportunities.


Passion for continuous learning and staying current with emerging technologies, industry trends, and competitive landscapes.


Relevant certifications in Azure, AWS, Enterprise Architecture, Dynamics 365, Salesforce, or cloud technologies are highly desirable.


**Why LevelShift?**


Accelerate your career growth by working on enterprise\-scale digital transformation and solutioning initiatives.


Gain hands\-on exposure to cloud platforms, enterprise applications, AI, automation, and modern integration technologies.

9ee037fe.title: Cyber Security Presales Consultant
9ee037fe.description:
**Location:** Mumbai  
**Experience:** 1–4 Years  
**Employment Type:** Full\-Time

Job Description

We are looking for a motivated **Cybersecurity Presales Consultant** with 1–4 years of experience in cybersecurity presales or solution consulting. The ideal candidate should have a strong technical understanding of cybersecurity solutions and be capable of supporting the complete presales lifecycle through **Discovery, Design, and Demonstration (3D)**.

Key Responsibilities

* Understand customer business and cybersecurity requirements.
* Design and recommend cybersecurity solutions based on customer needs.
* Prepare technical proposals, solution architectures, and Bill of Materials (BOM).
* Conduct product demonstrations, technical presentations, and Proof of Concepts (POCs).
* Support technical responses for RFPs, RFIs, and RFQs.
* Work closely with the sales team to position cybersecurity solutions effectively.
* Engage with enterprise customers, IT teams, and security stakeholders to provide technical guidance.

Required Skills

* 1–4 years of experience in Cybersecurity Presales, Solution Consulting, or Cybersecurity Engineering with customer\-facing responsibilities.
* Knowledge of Firewalls, EDR/XDR, SIEM, SOC, IAM, Endpoint Security, Network Security, and Cloud Security.
* Exposure to solution design, technical presentations, and POC execution.
* Understanding of RFP/RFI processes and technical documentation.
* Excellent communication, presentation, and stakeholder management skills.

Preferred Skills

* Exposure to OEM technologies such as CrowdStrike, Palo Alto, Fortinet, Cisco, Sophos, SentinelOne, Microsoft Security, or similar.
* Relevant cybersecurity certifications will be an added advantage.

**Location:** Mumbai (Work from Office)

Pay: ₹600,000\.00 \- ₹900,000\.00 per year

Work Location: In person

03ddfe16.title: Solution Consultant - Salesforce
03ddfe16.description:
**Company Overview**
 Milestone Technologies is a global IT managed services firm that partners with organizations to scale their technology, infrastructure and services to drive specific business outcomes such as digital transformation, innovation, and operational agility. Milestone is focused on building an employee\-first, performance\-based culture and for over 25 years, we have a demonstrated history of supporting category\-defining enterprise clients that are growing ahead of the market. The company specializes in providing solutions across Application Services and Consulting, Digital Product Engineering, Digital Workplace Services, Private Cloud Services, AI/Automation, and ServiceNow. Milestone culture is built to provide a collaborative, inclusive environment that supports employees and empowers them to reach their full potential.
   

  

 Our seasoned professionals deliver services based on Milestone’s best practices and service delivery framework. By leveraging our vast knowledge base to execute initiatives, we deliver both short\-term and long\-term value to our clients and apply continuous service improvement to deliver transformational benefits to IT. With Intelligent Automation, Milestone helps businesses further accelerate their IT transformation. The result is a sharper focus on business objectives and a dramatic improvement in employee productivity. Through our key technology partnerships and our people\-first approach, Milestone continues to deliver industry\-leading innovation to our clients. With more than 3,000 employees serving over 200 companies worldwide, we are following our mission of revolutionizing the way IT is deployed.
   

  

**Job Overview**
**Job Description: Salesforce Pre\-Sales Solution Consultant**
**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced and highly motivated
 **Salesforce Pre\-Sales Solution Consultant** 
 to join our growing Salesforce Practice based in
 **Kochi, India** 
 . The role will be responsible for leading pre\-sales solutioning activities and supporting business development pursuits across the
 **United States and European markets** 
 .
   

  

 The ideal candidate will combine deep Salesforce platform expertise with strong client\-facing consulting skills to help shape transformative customer solutions, respond to RFPs/RFIs, conduct discovery workshops, develop solution architectures, and support sales teams in securing new business opportunities.
   

  

 This role requires close collaboration with global sales, solution architecture, delivery, and practice leadership teams while engaging directly with enterprise customers and stakeholders.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Pre\-Sales \& Solutioning**
* Partner with Sales and Account Teams to understand client business challenges, objectives, and transformation needs.
* Lead solution discovery workshops and requirements discussions with prospective customers across North America and Europe.
* Design scalable Salesforce solutions leveraging Sales Cloud, Service Cloud, Experience Cloud, ITSM \& HR Ops, Marketing Cloud, Data Cloud, AI capabilities, and industry\-specific Salesforce offerings.
* Develop high\-quality solution proposals, presentations, architecture diagrams, and implementation roadmaps.
* Support RFP, RFI, and RFQ responses with comprehensive technical and functional solution designs.
* Estimate project scope, effort, timelines, delivery models, and resource requirements.
* Translate business requirements into end\-to\-end technology solutions aligned with Salesforce best practices.


**Client Engagement \& Consulting**
* Conduct executive\-level presentations and solution demonstrations.
* Act as a trusted advisor during customer evaluations and sales cycles.
* Present solution value propositions, transformation strategies, and ROI\-driven business cases.
* Facilitate customer workshops focused on business process optimization and digital transformation.


**Salesforce Solution Architecture**
* Define target\-state architectures integrating Salesforce with enterprise applications and third\-party platforms.
* Provide guidance on data migration, integrations, security, governance, and platform scalability.
* Align proposed solutions with Salesforce platform capabilities and product roadmaps.
* Collaborate with delivery architects to ensure seamless transition from pre\-sales to project execution.


**Practice \& Innovation**
* Contribute to development of reusable accelerators, industry offerings, solution templates, and demo assets.
* Stay current on Salesforce product innovations, AI capabilities, release updates, and industry trends.
* Support capability building initiatives within the Salesforce practice.
* Mentor junior consultants and participate in knowledge\-sharing sessions.


**Required Qualifications**
**Education**
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business, or related discipline.
* MBA or relevant postgraduate qualification is an added advantage.


**Experience**
* 8–12 years of overall IT consulting experience.
* Minimum 3–5 years of hands\-on Salesforce consulting, solutioning, or solution architecture experience.
* Proven experience supporting pre\-sales pursuits for enterprise customers.
* Experience working with clients across the US and European regions.
* Strong understanding of CRM transformation programs and cloud adoption initiatives.


**Salesforce Expertise**
**Hands\-on Experience In Multiple Salesforce Products Including**
* Sales Cloud
* Service Cloud
* Experience Cloud
* Marketing Cloud (preferred)
* Salesforce Platform
* Data Cloud
* Agentforce and Salesforce AI capabilities
* Industry Clouds (preferred)


**Technical Knowledge**
* Salesforce architecture and platform design
* Integration patterns and middleware platforms
* API\-led connectivity
* Data migration strategies
* Enterprise application architecture
* Security and governance models
* Agile and hybrid delivery methodologies


**Required Skills**
**Functional Skills**
* Solution consulting
* Business process mapping
* Digital transformation consulting
* Customer journey design
* Requirements analysis
* Executive stakeholder management


**Pre\-Sales Skills**
* Solution presentations and demos
* Proposal development
* RFP/RFI response management
* Effort estimation and pricing support
* Value proposition development
* Deal qualification and pursuit management


**Soft Skills**
* Excellent communication and presentation skills
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving capabilities
* Ability to engage with C\-level stakeholders
* Cross\-cultural collaboration experience
* Strong written and verbal English communication
* Ability to work in overlapping time zones with US and Europe


**Preferred Certifications**
 One or more Salesforce certifications such as:
   

  

* Salesforce Administrator
* Salesforce Advanced Administrator
* Salesforce Sales Cloud Consultant
* Salesforce Service Cloud Consultant
* Salesforce Experience Cloud Consultant
* Salesforce Platform App Builder
* Salesforce AI Associate
* Salesforce Agentforce Specialist
* Salesforce Application Architect
* Salesforce System Architect


**Success Metrics**
**The Successful Candidate Will Be Measured On**
* Pre\-sales support effectiveness and win\-rate contribution
* Quality and timeliness of solution proposals
* Customer satisfaction during pursuit phases
* Contribution to pipeline growth
* Solution innovation and reusable assets creation
* Collaboration with sales, delivery, and practice teams


**Why Join Us?**
* Opportunity to work on global Salesforce transformation initiatives.
* Exposure to Fortune 500 and enterprise clients across the US and Europe.
* Collaborative and innovation\-driven work environment.
* Access to continuous learning, Salesforce certifications, and emerging AI technologies.
* Strong career growth opportunities within a rapidly expanding Salesforce practice.


**Location:** 
 Kochi, India (Hybrid)
   

  

**Travel:** 
 Occasional international travel may be required based on customer engagements and business needs.
   

  

**Position Title:** 
 Salesforce Pre\-Sales Solution Consultant
   

  

**Location:** 
 Kochi, India
   

  

**Department:** 
 Digital Transformation / Salesforce Practice
   

  

**Employment Type:** 
 Full\-Time
   

  

**Experience Level:** 
 8–12 Years
   

  

**Working Hours:** 
 Flexibility to support US and European business hours.
   

  

**Compensation**
 Estimated Pay Range:
   

  

 Exact compensation and offers of employment are dependent on circumstances of each case and will be determined based on job\-related knowledge, skills, experience, licenses or certifications, and location.
   

  

****Our Commitment to Diversity \& Inclusion****
 At Milestone we strive to create a workplace that reflects the communities we serve and work with, where we all feel empowered to bring our full, authentic selves to work. We know creating a diverse and inclusive culture that champions equity and belonging is not only the right thing to do for our employees but is also critical to our continued success.
   

  

 Milestone Technologies provides equal employment opportunity for all applicants and employees. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against on the basis of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity, marital status, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, national origin, or any other category protected by applicable federal and state law, or local ordinance. Milestone also makes reasonable accommodations for disabled applicants and employees.
   

  

 We welcome the unique background, culture, experiences, knowledge, innovation, self\-expression and perspectives you can bring to our global community. Our recruitment team is looking forward to meeting you.
   

  

  

**\*\*\*Notice to Job Seekers Regarding Impersonation and Fraudulent Job Offers\*\*\***
 It has come to our attention that unauthorized individuals and entities are impersonating Milestone Technologies, Inc. on various job boards/portals,
 **specifically Naukri.com and Linkedin.com**
**Please be advised of the following official Milestone Technologies recruitment policies:**
**Official Communication Channels**
 All legitimate email communications from our recruitment team will originate ONLY from the domains:
 **@milestone.tech.** 
 We do not use generic email services (e.g. @gmail.com, @yahoo.com, @outlook.com) or unofficial third party messaging apps to conduct formal business.
   

  

**No Recruitment Fees**
 Milestone Technologies never requests any form of payment, "security deposit", "laptop/equipment fee", or "processing fee" at any stage of the recruitment or onboarding process. Any request for money in exchange for an interview or job offer is a scam.

874b38ff.title: Solution Architect - Presales
874b38ff.description:

 where you'll design scalable enterprise solutions, drive business growth, and help customers achieve their digital transformation goals. You'll collaborate with sales teams, customers, and technical experts to architect innovative solutions across cloud, enterprise applications, AI, and automation technologies.
 



**What You'll Do**

 ? Engage with customers to understand business requirements, technical challenges, and transformation objectives while identifying value\-driven solution opportunities.
 



 ? Collaborate with sales teams during RFP, RFI, and RFQ processes by preparing technical proposals, solution designs, and effort estimations.
 



 ? Design end\-to\-end enterprise solution architectures across cloud platforms, CRM, ERP, AI, automation, and integration ecosystems.
 



 ? Conduct client presentations, workshops, demos, and technical advisory sessions to communicate solution value and business outcomes.
 



 ? Work closely with delivery and technical teams to ensure solution feasibility, smooth handover, and strategic alignment with customer goals.
 



**How this role uses AI**

 ? Utilize AI\-assisted proposal generation, requirement analysis, architecture documentation, effort estimation, solution recommendations, and presentation preparation to enhance pre\-sales efficiency.
 



 ? Leverage AI\-powered tools such as Microsoft Copilot, Azure AI Services, GitHub Copilot, Power Platform AI capabilities, and enterprise AI frameworks to build intelligent, future\-ready solutions.
 



**Your Skillset** 




 ? 10\+ years of experience in Pre\-Sales, Solutioning, Enterprise Architecture, or Solution Consulting roles.
 



 ? Bachelor?s or Master?s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, Business Administration, or a related field.
 



 ? Strong expertise in enterprise technologies including Microsoft platforms, cloud solutions, CRM, ERP, AI, automation, and integration architectures.
 



 ? Hands\-on experience with cloud platforms such as Microsoft Azure and AWS.

 ? Strong client engagement skills with experience conducting workshops, presentations, demos, and advisory sessions.

**Why LevelShift?**

 ? Learn from experienced consultants, architects, and technology leaders in a collaborative and growth\-focused environment.

bdccc1f1.title: Senior Presales Solution Consultant
bdccc1f1.description:
**Company Overview:** 




  






 At Arya AI, we are revolutionizing the BFSI sector with our cutting\-edge enterprise AI solutions. Our platform empowers financial institutions to make smarter, faster, and more secure decisions using state\-of\-the\-art AI models for decisioning, document processing, fraud detection, and more.
 





 As pioneers in deep tech, we focus on delivering scalable, enterprise\-grade AI products that blend innovation with seamless user experiences. Our mission is to create intuitive, high\-performing interfaces that make AI adoption effortless and impactful for our clients, ranging from leading banks to fintech disruptors.
 





 Arya.ai’s team consists of highly experienced deep learning and machine learning researchers and data scientists. Since 2013, Arya.ai has worked with leading enterprises, such as banks, insurance companies, and financial service players, worldwide.
 




  





**Role Overview:** 




  






 As a Senior Presales Solutions Consultant, you will be the technical and solution engine behind our sales motion. You will translate complex banking and financial services challenges into compelling, credible AI solutions, owning discovery, solutioning, demos, proofs\-of\-concept, and technical proposals that move enterprise deals forward.
 




  






 You will sit at the intersection of sales, product, and engineering: the person who can hold a strategic conversation with a CxO, then go deep on architecture with a bank's engineering team, and translate both into a solution the client can buy with confidence.
 




  






 The ideal candidate combines strong command of modern AI tooling, LLMs, agentic systems, RAG, and orchestration,with sharp business intuition, enterprise storytelling, and the ability to win trust in high\-stakes, regulated environments.
 




  




**Responsibilities** 
* Own the technical presales cycle end\-to\-end, from discovery and qualification to solution design, demos, POCs, and deal closure support.
* Run structured discovery with prospects to uncover business problems, technical constraints, data realities, and success criteria across BFSI workflows.
* Design and present tailored AI solutions across decisioning, document processing (KYC/KYB, OCR), fraud, onboarding, and agentic automation.
* Build and deliver high\-impact product demonstrations and proof\-of\-concepts that map directly to client pain points and quantifiable outcomes.
* Lead responses to RFPs, RFIs, and security/compliance questionnaires,authoring solution documents, architecture narratives, and technical proposals.
* Develop business cases and ROI models that connect AI capabilities to measurable commercial impact for the client.
* Act as the trusted technical advisor to prospects, handling deep\-dive questions on model behavior, integration, deployment, security, and governance.
* Translate emerging AI paradigms: LLM applications, RAG, agentic workflows, MCP, and orchestration — into practical, enterprise\-ready solution narratives.
* Partner with sales to shape account strategy, qualify opportunities, and drive pipeline velocity through the technical sales stages.
* Collaborate with product and engineering to feed market and client signals back into the roadmap and to validate solution feasibility.
* Maintain and evolve the presales toolkit, demo environments, solution templates, competitive battlecards, and reusable collateral.
* Represent Arya.ai in client workshops, industry events, and technical briefings, positioning our platform against the competitive landscape.


- 

**Requirements** 
* 5\-8 years of experience in presales, solutions consulting, sales engineering, or a comparable client\-facing technical role.
* Strong working knowledge of modern AI tools and paradigms,LLMs, prompt engineering, RAG, agentic workflows, and AI orchestration.
* Solid conceptual understanding of machine learning, deep learning, and applied AI, with the ability to explain them credibly to technical and business audiences.
* Familiarity with enterprise AI integration patterns such as MCP, tool/function calling, and API\-based deployments.
* Demonstrated ability to design solutions across text, tabular, image, and document\-heavy data types.
* Experience selling or solutioning into BFSI (banking, insurance, or financial services) is strongly preferred.
* Proven track record of building demos, POCs, and solution documents that influence enterprise buying decisions.
* Comfort with enterprise procurement realities,RFPs, security reviews, compliance, and multi\-stakeholder decision processes.
* Awareness of the regulatory and governance landscape relevant to AI in financial services (e.g., data privacy, model governance, auditability).
* Exceptional communication and storytelling skills, with the ability to command a room from analyst to CxO.
* Strong ownership, problem\-solving, and cross\-functional collaboration skills.
* Ability to thrive in a fast\-evolving environment with shifting priorities and a high degree of autonomy.


- 


  





**What You’ll get:** 



* A competitive and meaningful compensation package
* One of the best health care plans that not only covers you but also your family
* A great team to thrive and learn
* Micro\-entrepreneurial tasks and responsibilities.
* Career development and leadership opportunities



  





**Why Us:** 




  






 Financial services face some of the most demanding, mission\-critical AI challenges: often underserved and unsolved. At Arya.ai, you’ll:
 



* Work directly with global financial institutions
* Pioneer first\-of\-its\-kind solutions in the industry
* 
* Operate in a culture that values openness, innovation, and people

bb17ec1d.title: Channel Solution Architect
bb17ec1d.description:
As a global leader in cybersecurity, CrowdStrike protects the people, processes and technologies that drive modern organizations. Since 2011, our mission hasn’t changed — we’re here to stop breaches, and we’ve redefined modern security with the world’s most advanced AI\-native platform. We work on large scale distributed systems, processing almost 3 trillion events per day and this traffic is growing daily. Our customers span all industries, and they count on CrowdStrike to keep their businesses running, their communities safe and their lives moving forward. We're proud to work for a mission\-driven company leveraging AI to transform the way we work. CrowdStrikers drive their careers through flexibility and autonomy while also being expected to contribute to a culture of responsible AI adoption, experimentation, and innovation. We use an AI\-first mindset as a force multiplier to proactively and continuously accelerate execution, build expertise, uncover insights, and solve complex problems. We’re always looking to add talented CrowdStrikers to the team who have limitless passion, a relentless focus on innovation and a fanatical commitment to our customers, our community and each other. Ready to join a mission that matters? The future of cybersecurity starts with you.
   

  

****About The Role:****
 CrowdStrike is seeking for a Channel Solution Architect to cover India and SAARC region. You will support a team of Alliances managers and their Solutions Providers and Managed Service partners, educating them on the value of CrowdStrike’s security platform and ensuring they will be technically ready to act as an extension of our internal technical and sales team. In this role you will build trusted relationships by articulating the next\-gen cloud\-delivered workload protection approach advantages and how traditional security solutions are failing, delivering compelling technical and sales training sessions, and driving initiatives to strengthen our partners’ offerings to ensure continual growth.
   

  

 As a CrowdStrike Channel Solution Architect you will be part of the team responsible for changing what our partners and the security market believe is possible with a next\-generation endpoint security platform.
   

  

*This role will be based in Mumbai only.*
****What You’ll Do:****
* Work closely with Alliance Managers to ensure the mutual growth of CrowdStrike business with Solution Providers and Managed Service partners
* Build relationships with our partner key technical and sales staff and develop as the trusted resource to support the CrowdStrike solution selling
* Technically enable partners to effectively pitch, position the value, demo, deploy and support active testing of current and new CrowdStrike solutions and ensure continual education for key partner staff
* Drive partners to achieve technical independence by effectively leveraging available partner resources, like the partner portal, scripted demo tools, compliant usage of NFR environments, POC / POV, etc.
* Consult on Partner Performance and provide technical enablement efforts to help partner in exceeding quarterly assigned quota
* Lead partners to achieve and exceed accreditation and certification requirements
* Consult with partners on effective testing and POC/POV methodologies providing guidance on the latest attacker methodologies, competitive landscape, industry news, and market development in the region
* Ensure partners knows how to identify, qualify, and lead joint opportunities with CrowdStrike and assist partner presales technical teams with opportunity guidance and resources when necessary to support partner\-led business
* Participate in partner events such as conferences, lunch \& learns, and other sponsored events, driving to lead demos and hands\-on sessions wherever possible
* Utilize technology integrations in the partner’s portfolio to create additional paths to growth
* Identify and develop opportunities to enable partner\-led and/or co\-branded professional services
* Act as liaison between partners and CrowdStrike Sales/SE teams to overcome obstacles, assist with deal cycle, and identify opportunity for partners to add value


****What You’ll Need:****
* Comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment on multiple engagements with the ability to work autonomously, establish clear priorities and focus on objectives with minimal supervision
* Self\-motivated and excellent organisational skills
* Strong communication skills (written and verbal) and presentation skills, for both restricted or wider groups with the ability to adapt the message to the audience
* Strong problem\-solving skills, ability to analyse complex scenarios and use a systematic approach to gain quick resolution
* Technical knowledge in relevant areas for the CrowdStrike business, such as endpoint security (including anti\-virus solutions), Cloud Workload infrastructure, incident response, computer forensics, network administration \& management, identity protection, zero\-trust, MDR/XDR and data protection
* A curious nature with a desire to learn and a competitive spirit.
* Ability to travel to partner locations for events and business needs and in accordance with local health and safety authorities’ regulations.
* Considerable proven experience in consulting or sales engineering, preferably in roles involving the generation of net new business through Channel Partners and Managed Service Providers.
* Experience with large scale cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, GCP, etc.
* Experience with APIs and/or scripting languages such as PowerShell, Python, and Bash
* Experience with malware, threat intelligence, and sandbox analysis
* Industry certifications such as CEH, CISSP, OSCP, SANS, etc.


****Benefits Of Working At CrowdStrike:****
* Market leader in compensation and equity awards
* Comprehensive physical and mental wellness programs
* Competitive vacation and holidays for recharge
* Paid parental and adoption leaves
* Professional development opportunities for all employees regardless of level or role
* Employee Networks, geographic neighborhood groups, and volunteer opportunities to build connections
* Vibrant office culture with world class amenities
* Great Place to Work Certified™ across the globe


 CrowdStrike is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to fostering a culture of belonging where everyone is valued for who they are and empowered to succeed. We support veterans and individuals with disabilities through our affirmative action program.
   

  

 CrowdStrike is committed to providing equal employment opportunity for all employees and applicants for employment. The Company does not discriminate in employment opportunities or practices on the basis of race, color, creed, ethnicity, religion, sex (including pregnancy or pregnancy\-related medical conditions), sexual orientation, gender identity, marital or family status, veteran status, age, national origin, ancestry, physical disability (including HIV and AIDS), mental disability, medical condition, genetic information, membership or activity in a local human rights commission, status with regard to public assistance, or any other characteristic protected by law. We base all employment decisions\-\-including recruitment, selection, training, compensation, benefits, discipline, promotions, transfers, lay\-offs, return from lay\-off, terminations and social/recreational programs\-\-on valid job requirements.
   

  

 If you need assistance accessing or reviewing the information on this website or need help submitting an application for employment or requesting an accommodation, please contact us at recruiting@crowdstrike.com for further assistance.
   

  

 ,
   

  

****What You’ll Need:****
* Comfortable working in a fast\-paced environment on multiple engagements with the ability to work autonomously, establish clear priorities and focus on objectives with minimal supervision
* Self\-motivated and excellent organisational skills
* Strong communication skills (written and verbal) and presentation skills, for both restricted or wider groups with the ability to adapt the message to the audience
* Strong problem\-solving skills, ability to analyse complex scenarios and use a systematic approach to gain quick resolution
* Technical knowledge in relevant areas for the CrowdStrike business, such as endpoint security (including anti\-virus solutions), Cloud Workload infrastructure, incident response, computer forensics, network administration \& management, identity protection, zero\-trust, MDR/XDR and data protection
* A curious nature with a desire to learn and a competitive spirit.
* Ability to travel to partner locations for events and business needs and in accordance with local health and safety authorities’ regulations.
* Considerable proven experience in consulting or sales engineering, preferably in roles involving the generation of net new business through Channel Partners and Managed Service Providers.
* Experience with large scale cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, GCP, etc.
* Experience with APIs and/or scripting languages such as PowerShell, Python, and Bash
* Experience with malware, threat intelligence, and sandbox analysis
* Industry certifications such as CEH, CISSP, OSCP, SANS, etc.

53cf77a6.title: Solutions Lead
53cf77a6.description:
**Role Overview** 

 We are looking for an experienced Pre\-Sales \& Proof of Concept (PoC) Leader to drive successful client engagements and support complex enterprise sales. The ideal candidate will combine deep insurance domain expertise with strong solution consulting skills to lead PoC initiatives, collaborate with cross\-functional teams, and deliver exceptional client experiences across global markets.
 


**Key Responsibilities** 
* Build trusted relationships with prospective and existing clients during the pre\-sales and Proof of Concept (PoC) lifecycle.
* Lead and manage the India PoC team, coordinating insurance SMEs, technical experts, analysts, and other stakeholders to deliver successful PoCs.
* Collaborate with regional solution leaders to understand client requirements and translate them into structured execution plans.
* Design and execute multiple PoCs aligned with client objectives, demonstrating the value of the organization's products and solutions.
* Provide real\-time solutioning by leveraging insurance domain knowledge and product expertise to address client challenges.
* Coordinate cross\-functional teams, ensuring timely execution, effective communication, and successful delivery across global time zones.
* Prepare customized demonstrations, evaluation scenarios, supporting data, and presentation materials for client engagements.
* Monitor PoC outcomes, capture client feedback, and implement continuous improvements for future engagements.
* Work closely with Sales, Product, Delivery, and Technical teams to ensure seamless collaboration throughout the sales cycle.
* Mentor and guide internal teams by sharing best practices in product demonstrations, solution storytelling, and PoC execution.


**Required Qualifications** 
* 15\+ years of experience in Pre\-Sales, Solution Consulting, or Client\-Facing Enterprise Software roles.
* Proven experience leading Proof of Concept (PoC) teams and managing multiple client engagements simultaneously.
* Strong background in solution consulting, consultative selling, and enterprise sales support.
* Deep understanding of insurance operations, workflows, and business processes.
* Experience presenting to executive stakeholders, conducting discovery sessions, and delivering impactful product demonstrations.
* Excellent stakeholder management, communication, presentation, and leadership skills.
* Ability to work independently in a fast\-paced, global environment across multiple time zones.
* Strong organizational, planning, and problem\-solving capabilities.
* Experience collaborating with Sales, Product, Delivery, and Technical teams.
* Background in SaaS, Enterprise Software, AI, Automation, Insurance Technology, or similar solution\-based industries.


**Preferred Qualifications** 
* Experience in Insurance, InsurTech, FinTech, or other regulated industries.
* Knowledge of AI, Automation, Analytics, or Data\-Driven Solutions.
* Demonstrated success in improving client\-facing processes, products, or operational workflows in high\-growth environments.

011ef88c.title: Lead Consultant - Presales
011ef88c.description:
**Description** 




 The Presales – Bid Management professional is responsible for managing the complete bid lifecycle, ensuring the delivery of high\-quality, compliant, and competitive proposals. This role works closely with Sales, Business Units, Solution Architects, and other cross\-functional teams to coordinate bid activities, drive collaboration, and ensure timely submissions. The ideal candidate possesses strong project management, stakeholder management, and communication skills, with the ability to manage multiple bids in a fast\-paced environment.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Manage the end\-to\-end bid lifecycle, including qualification, planning, proposal development, submission, and post\-submission activities.
* Coordinate bid/no\-bid decision\-making by collaborating with Business Unit leaders, Sales teams, and key stakeholders.
* Analyse RFPs, RFIs, and related documents to identify customer requirements and engage Solution Architects for technical inputs.
* Lead and coordinate cross\-functional bid teams to gather, review, and consolidate proposal content.
* Schedule and facilitate bid planning, review, and governance meetings to ensure timely progress.
* Monitor bid status, proactively identify risks, and communicate updates, escalations, and mitigation plans to Business Units and leadership.
* Ensure all proposals comply with customer requirements, organizational standards, and submission guidelines.
* Obtain all required internal approvals and governance sign\-offs prior to proposal submission.
* Maintain bid documentation, proposal repositories, and reusable knowledge assets to improve efficiency and consistency.
* Track bid performance, analyse win/loss outcomes, and develop quality metrics to support continuous improvement.



  





**Requirements** 



* Bachelor's degree in Business, Engineering, Management, or a related discipline.
* 3–9 years of experience in Presales, Bid Management, Proposal Management, or a similar role.
* Proven experience managing complex RFP/RFI/RFQ response processes and bid submissions.
* Strong understanding of bid governance, proposal development, and compliance requirements.
* Excellent project management and organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple concurrent bids.
* Strong stakeholder management and cross\-functional coordination abilities.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills with strong attention to detail.
* Ability to analyse customer requirements and collaborate effectively with technical and business teams.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint) and proposal management/document collaboration tools.
* Strong analytical mindset with the ability to track bid metrics, generate reports, and drive process improvements.
* APMP certification or equivalent proposal management certification is an added advantage.

0be6ccad.title: Pre Sales Associate
0be6ccad.description:
Role Overview

The Pre\-Sales Consultant will play a critical role in supporting the sales team by providing technical expertise, solution demonstrations, and client engagement during the pre\-sales cycle. The role requires strong communication skills, a customer\-centric approach, and the ability to translate business needs into technical solutions.

Key Responsibilities

* Client Engagement**:** Collaborate with prospective clients to understand their business requirements and challenges.
* Solution Design**:** Develop tailored solutions and proposals that align with client needs and company offerings.
* Product Demonstrations**:** Conduct presentations, demos, and proof\-of\-concepts to showcase product capabilities.
* Technical Support**:** Assist the sales team with technical queries, RFP/RFI responses, and solution documentation.
* Collaboration**:** Work closely with internal teams (sales, delivery, and product development) to ensure seamless client experience.
* Market Insights**:** Stay updated on industry trends, competitor offerings, and emerging technologies to strengthen solution positioning.

Required Skills \& Qualifications

* Educational Background**:** Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Business, or related field.
* Experience**:** 0–5 years of experience in pre\-sales, solution consulting, or technical sales.
* Technical Knowledge**:** Strong understanding of IT solutions, software products, and enterprise technologies.
* Communication Skills**:** Excellent verbal, written, and presentation skills.
* Analytical Ability**:** Ability to analyze client needs and propose effective solutions.
* Team Player**:** Strong collaboration skills with cross\-functional teams.

Preferred Skills

* Certifications**:** Relevant certifications in cloud, ERP, CRM, or other enterprise solutions.
* Industry Knowledge**:** Familiarity with IT services, digital transformation, and consulting practices.
* Problem\-Solving**:** Innovative approach to addressing client challenges.

Pay: ₹20,000\.00 \- ₹25,000\.00 per month

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Provident Fund

Work Location: In person

01c6ec65.title: MDM Solution Consultant
01c6ec65.description:
\- \- \- \- \- \- \- \- \- \- \- \-
   

  

**Mission**
 As a
 **Solution Consultant in MDM team** 
 within Michelin Supply Chain Business Solutions, you will work with a global, dynamic team focused on MDM (Customer) processes You will collaborate closely with Product Architects, Product Owners, and cross\-functional stakeholders to define scalable, high\-performance solutions that drive business value while maintaining standardization and operational excellence.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**Solution Design \& Architecture**
* Contribute to defining IT solutions based on business ambitions.
* Provide an optimal balance between standardization, simplification, and necessary customization.
* Create and share design documents with development teams to ensure clear understanding.
* Ensure proposed IT solutions support maintainability, scalability, operability, and performance.


**Functional \& Technical Analysis**
* Gather requirements and perform gap analysis to translate business needs into functional and technical specifications.
* Ensure expected business benefits are achieved as defined in the business case.
* Participate in user story creation and refine requirements with stakeholders.
* Consider FMEA (Failure Modes and Effects Analysis) and performance requirements in solution design.


**Agile Team Collaboration**
* Participate actively in Agile Team routines (Daily standups, refinements, reviews, etc.)
* Work effectively with stakeholders at all organizational levels.
* Support applications at L2/L3
* Participating in Test Strategy definition and execution
* Implement scalable technical solutions aligned with architectural patterns


**Primary Skills**
* Proven experience in business and functional analysis for Oracle MDM \-CDM or any other MDM.
* Hands on Oracle fusion Cloud\- Customer data Hub ( Or similar )
* Good understanding of TCA (Trading community architecture) ,BI Reports
* Ability to translate complex business requirements into clear technical specifications
* Knowledge of API design, REST APIs, and API Manager configurations
* Knowledge of integration architectures: EDI, API, and event\-driven architecture (ideally Kafka)


**Secondary Skills**
* Knowledge of supply chain processes
* Experience with FMEA (Failure Modes and Effects Analysis)
* Basic knowledge of architectural patterns and design principles
* Basic knowledge of core technologies: Java, git, cloud, SQL
* Understanding of microservices and cloud\-native architectures (Kubernetes)


**COMMUNICATION \& COLLABORATION**
* Excellent verbal and written communication skills
* Ability to simplify complex technical topics
* Strong interpersonal and presentation skills
* Customer\-oriented mindset with focus on business value delivery
* Ability to work effectively in decentralized, global team environments across time zones


**PERSONAL ATTRIBUTES**
* Adaptability: Able to excel in fast\-paced, dynamic environments
* Support Orientation: Focus on operability, maintainability, and runtime excellence
* Customer Focus: Commitment to understanding and delivering business benefits
* Self\-Directed: Works independently while collaborating effectively
* Solution Mindset: Proactive problem\-solving with long\-term scalability in view


**WORKING CONDITIONS**
* Must be available to work in a shift accommodating French time zone (11:30 AM – 8:30 PM IST)
* Comfortable working in a global, truly international team environment
* Able to balance multiple concurrent projects and processes
