 We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.
   

  

 Inclusive Team Culture
   

  

 Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.
   

  

 Mentorship and Career Growth
   

  

 We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* Bachelor's degree in business administration, finance, economics, computer science, data science, engineering, or other related field
* 8\+ years of programming in Python, Ruby, Go, Swift, Java, .Net, C\+\+ or similar object oriented language experience
* Experience leading highly\-available and fault\-tolerant enterprise and web\-scale software deployments
* Knowledge of the primary aws services (ec2, elb, rds, route53 \& s3\)
* Experience with any combination of the following: application security frameworks, identity and access controls, incident response, mobile security, cloud computing and security, AI security, threat intelligence, and penetration testing


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience with compliance \& security standards including PCI DSS, ISO 27001, HIPAA, and NIST
* Experience leading the design, development and deployment of business software at scale or recent hands\-on technology infrastructure, network, compute, storage, and virtualization experience
* Experience facilitating discussions with senior leadership regarding technical / architectural trade\-offs, best practices, and risk mitigation

3a8b7494.title: Solution Architect- Workday
3a8b7494.description:
Our client is looking for an experienced
 **Workday Solution Architect** 
 to lead enterprise\-wide Workday transformation initiatives and define scalable, secure, and future\-ready solutions across multiple Workday modules. This is a strategic role requiring strong expertise in architecture, integrations, governance, and stakeholder management, with the ability to drive large\-scale digital transformation programs.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Define end\-to\-end Workday solution architecture across multiple modules.
* Design scalable, secure, and high\-performing Workday solutions aligned with enterprise architecture standards.
* Lead large\-scale Workday implementations and transformation programs.
* Serve as a trusted advisor to business leaders and senior stakeholders.
* Drive architecture governance, design reviews, and solution quality.
* Define integration architecture using APIs, middleware, PECI, Core Connectors, and Workday Studio.
* Oversee data architecture, reporting frameworks, and Prism Analytics strategy.
* Establish standards, best practices, and governance models.
* Identify opportunities for AI, automation, and innovation within the Workday ecosystem.
* Review and approve solution configurations and technical deliverables.
* Mentor senior consultants and functional leads.
* Ensure security, compliance, and audit readiness across Workday solutions.



**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* 10\+ years of experience in Workday and enterprise HCM/ERP solutions.
* Deep expertise across multiple Workday modules including HCM, Integrations, Payroll, Talent, and Analytics.
* Strong experience in enterprise architecture and large\-scale implementations.
* Proven ability to lead complex transformation programs.
* Hands\-on expertise in integration architecture, APIs, middleware, and data frameworks.
* Strong client advisory and executive stakeholder management skills.
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Engineering, Information Technology, Business, or related discipline.



**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Workday certifications.
* Experience with global or multi\-country Workday deployments.
* Exposure to cloud and digital transformation initiatives.
* Understanding of AI, automation, and analytics within enterprise platforms.
* Experience with Workday Prism Analytics and advanced reporting frameworks.



**Core Competencies** 



* Enterprise Architecture \& Strategy
* Cross\-Module Workday Expertise
* Integration \& Data Architecture
* Strategic Thinking \& Innovation
* Executive Stakeholder Management
* Governance, Risk \& Compliance
* Leadership \& Team Development

862c0744.title: Senior Cloud/Infrastructure Consultant (Remote)
862c0744.description:
* **Job Title:** 
 Senior Cloud/Infrastructure Consultant (Remote)
* **Work Mode:** 
 Fully Remote
* **Schedule:** 
 Flexible (up to 40 hours per week, based on project availability)



  





**Role Overview:** 




 We are looking for Senior DevOps Engineers to join a paid remote AI training program focused on Infrastructure as Code (IaC). In this role, you will write realistic engineering\-ticket\-style prompts, configure LocalStack sandboxes, and build golden solutions with passing end\-to\-end tests to help AI models master Terraform, AWS CDK, and CloudFormation. This is a flexible, remote opportunity well\-suited for senior\-level DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure engineers seeking project\-based, asynchronous work.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* **Task Creation:** 
 Write natural language prompts that read like real engineering tickets, including realistic ambiguity and professional context, so AI can handle real\-world scenarios.
* **Environment Configuration:** 
 Set up and configure LocalStack sandboxes (local AWS mocks) to validate infrastructure tasks
* **Golden Solution Development:** 
 Craft the initial infrastructure state and a "golden solution" that includes passing automated end\-to\-end tests
* **Quality Benchmarking:** 
 Ensure tasks meet a high quality bar; simple or poorly formatted tasks will be rejected.
* **Response Evaluation:** 
 Choose the correct response between two AI\-generated answers to a given infrastructure question
* **Prompt Writing:** 
 Draft simple prompts that act as a starting point for AI models to build upon



  





**Qualifications** 



* **Seniority** 
 : Must be a Senior\-level practitioner in DevOps, Cloud, or Infrastructure Engineering
* **IaC Platform Expertise** 
 : Professional, hands\-on experience with at least one of the following — High Priority: AWS CDK, Terraform (HCL), or CloudFormation; Medium/Low Priority: Pulumi, AzureRM, Ansible, Chef, or Puppet
* **Programming Languages:** 
 Strong proficiency in at least one of the following for infrastructure scripting and testing: TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, or Java
* **Communication** 
 : Ability to articulate complex technical concepts fluently in written English, following strict style guidelines



  





**Eligibility Requirements** 



* Candidates must be legally authorised to work in one of the following locations: Argentina, Australia, Austria, Belgium, Brazil, Canada, Colombia, Denmark, Finland, France, Germany, India, Ireland, Italy, Japan, Luxembourg, Mexico, Netherlands, New Zealand, Norway, Peru, Puerto Rico, Singapore, Spain, Sweden, Switzerland, United Arab Emirates, United Kingdom, United States



  





**Compensation** 



* Earn up to $50 USD/hr — plus additional incentives; rates vary based on expertise and project requirements
* Paid via PayPal and AirTM



  





**Work Arrangement** 



* Fully remote; choose your own schedule
* Flexible workload depending on project availability, most experts spend 5–10 hrs/week, up to 40 hours
* Free access to leading AI tools (GPT, Claude, and more) worth over $200/month included at no extra cost



  





**Equal Opportunity Statement** 




 Selection decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and project requirements. We are committed to inclusive and fair engagement practices and consider all qualified applicants without regard to legally protected characteristics.
 



  





*Ready to put your infrastructure expertise to work on AI? Apply now — interviews begin within days of application.*

c6e38fa9.title: Principal Data and Agentic Architect , Professional Services
c6e38fa9.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


AWS Sales, Marketing, and Global Services (SMGS) is responsible for driving revenue, adoption, and growth from the largest and fastest growing small\- and mid\-market accounts to enterprise\-level customers including public sector.  

The Amazon Web Services Professional Services (ProServe) team is seeking a skilled Delivery  

Consultant to join our team at Amazon Web Services (AWS). In this role, you'll work closely  

with customers to design, implement, and manage AWS solutions that meet their technical  

requirements and business objectives. You'll be a key player in driving customer success  

through their cloud journey, providing technical expertise and best practices throughout the  

project lifecycle.  

Possessing a deep understanding of AWS products and services, as a Delivery Consultant  

you will be proficient in architecting complex, scalable, and secure solutions tailored to  

meet the specific needs of each customer. You'll work closely with stakeholders to gather  

requirements, assess current infrastructure, and propose effective migration strategies to  

AWS. As trusted advisors to our customers, providing guidance on industry trends, emerging  

technologies, and innovative solutions, you will be responsible for leading the  

implementation process, ensuring adherence to best practices, optimizing performance, and  

managing risks throughout the project.  

The AWS Professional Services organization is a global team of experts that help customers  

realize their desired business outcomes when using the AWS Cloud. We work together with  

customer teams and the AWS Partner Network (APN) to execute enterprise cloud  

computing initiatives. Our team provides assistance through a collection of offerings which  

help customers achieve specific outcomes related to enterprise cloud adoption. We also  

deliver focused guidance through our global specialty practices, which cover a variety of  

solutions, technologies, and industries.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

As an experienced technology professional, you will be responsible for:  

1\. Designing and implementing complex, scalable, and secure AWS solutions tailored to  

customer needs  

2\. Providing technical guidance and troubleshooting support throughout project  

delivery  

3\. Collaborating with stakeholders to gather requirements and propose effective  

migration strategies  

4\. Acting as a trusted advisor to customers on industry trends and emerging  

technologies  

5\. Sharing knowledge within the organization through mentoring, training, and creating  

reusable artifacts  

  

About the team  

Diverse Experiences  

AWS values diverse experiences. Even if you do not meet all of the qualifications and skills listed in the job description, we encourage candidates to apply. If your career is just starting, hasn’t followed a traditional path, or includes alternative experiences, don’t let it stop you from applying.  

  

Why AWS?  

Amazon Web Services (AWS) is the world’s most comprehensive and broadly adopted cloud platform. We pioneered cloud computing and never stopped innovating — that’s why customers from the most successful startups to Global 500 companies trust our robust suite of products and services to power their businesses.  

  

Inclusive Team Culture  

Here at AWS, it’s in our nature to learn and be curious. Our employee\-led affinity groups foster a culture of inclusion that empower us to be proud of our differences. Ongoing events and learning experiences, including our Conversations on Race and Ethnicity (CORE) and AmazeCon conferences, inspire us to never stop embracing our uniqueness.  

  

Mentorship \& Career Growth  

We’re continuously raising our performance bar as we strive to become Earth’s Best Employer. That’s why you’ll find endless knowledge\-sharing, mentorship and other career\-advancing resources here to help you develop into a better\-rounded professional.  

  

Work/Life Balance  

We value work\-life harmony. Achieving success at work should never come at the expense of sacrifices at home, which is why we strive for flexibility as part of our working culture. When we feel supported in the workplace and at home, there’s nothing we can’t achieve in the cloud.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Physics, Engineering or Math
* 5\+ years of practical work applying ML to solve complex problems for large\-scale applications experience
* 8\+ years of processing data with a massively parallel technology (such as Redshift, Teradata, Netezza, Spark or Hadoop based big data solution) experience
* Knowledge of at least one programming language such as Java, C\#, JavaScript, Python, Ruby or Perl
* Experience in written and verbal communication with the ability to present complex technical information in a clear and concise manner to executives and non\-technical leaders
* 7\+ years of IT platform implementation in a technical and analytical role experience

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Master's degree or equivalent in engineering, technology, computer science, machine learning, robotics, operations research, statistics, mathematics or equivalent quantitative field, or experience with AWS Solutions, including EC2, S3, Redshift, EMR (or Hadoop)
* Experience using managed ML/AI solutions
* Experience with Machine Learning and Large Language Model fundamentals, including architecture, training/inference lifecycles, and optimization of model execution, or experience with vLLM, SGLang, TensorRT or similar platforms in production environments
* AWS Professional level certification, or Bachelor's degree in business administration, finance, economics, computer science, data science, engineering, or other related field
* 4\+ years of professional work experience, or experience with AWS services or other cloud offerings
* Generative AI trends, patterns, anti\-patterns

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

2cae3b60.title: GMx - Managed Services Solution Architect
2cae3b60.description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**Managed Services Solution Architect, Manager \- GMx Solutioning, Global Managed Services**
 At EY GDS – a member of the global integrated service delivery centre network by EY, Managed Services (MS) is a significant part of our business, comprising more than $7b in revenue with major clients across the globe. We help clients with people based, asset based \& integrated solutions, leveraging our deep sector and domain expertise to deliver enhanced value to our clients. In MS we are also ambitious, seeking to more than double our success in the future.
   

  

**The opportunity**
 Global Managed Services at EY is entering a phase of accelerated growth, with increasing demand for integrated, multi\-tower managed services across Technology, Finance, Risk, and Data.
   

  

 As a
 **Technology Managed Services Solution Architect** 
 , you will play a central role in shaping and articulating differentiated managed services solutions. Beyond designing the solution, you will be responsible for ensuring the solution is
 **clearly understood, commercially compelling, and operationally credible** 
 to clients.
   

  

 You will work across global pursuit teams, collaborating with Sales, Delivery, Pricing, and domain solution leaders to bring together complex service offerings into a
 **cohesive, client\-ready narrative** 
 .
   

  

**Your Key Responsibilities**
* Solution strategy and narrative development
+ Translate client requirements, business context, and evaluation criteria into a clear and structured solution storyline
+ Define the solution spine across technology managed services, ensuring alignment with client priorities such as stability, cost, transformation, and risk reduction
+ Develop compelling value propositions that connect service design to measurable business outcomes
+ Convert complex delivery constructs into simple, intuitive messaging for executive stakeholders

* End\-to\-end Tech Managed Services solution design
+ Design integrated Technology Managed Services solutions across applications, cloud, data, platforms, and service operations
+ Define scope, service catalogue, operating model, delivery model, governance, and continuous improvement approach
+ Incorporate automation, AI/GenAI, and platform\-led efficiencies into the solution
+ Ensure solution decisions are grounded in delivery feasibility, available data, and market competitiveness

* Articulation and client engagement
+ Actively participate in the Articulate phase of pursuits, contributing to proposal development, solution documentation, and oral presentations
+ Structure and communicate the solution across five dimensions: Client context, Design intent, Service operating model, Transition and stabilization approach and Value realization
+ Support or lead solution walkthroughs, workshops, and client discussions, ensuring clarity and confidence in the proposed model
+ Partner with Sales and deal leadership to ensure the client narrative and solution design remain aligned

* Transition, stabilization, and delivery model design
+ Design transition and onboarding strategies, including knowledge transfer, phased migration, and stabilization
+ Define early\-stage risk mitigation levers such as SWAT teams, command centre, and backlog reduction
+ Ensure transition plans are practical, sequenced, and aligned to client readiness
+ Support delivery teams in mobilization and early lifecycle stages

* Estimation and commercial input
+ Translate solution design into effort drivers, staffing models, and productivity assumptions
+ Work closely with Pricing teams to ensure commercial models reflect solution realities
+ Validate alignment between service commitments, SLAs, and cost structures
+ Highlight risks, contingencies, and dependencies that impact commercial viability

* Solution assurance and risk management
+ Identify and address risks across scope, delivery, transition, tooling, and governance
+ Ensure solution integrity across proposal content, pricing assumptions, and client messaging
+ Participate in solution reviews, challenge sessions, and leadership governance forums
+ Maintain clarity on assumptions, exclusions, and dependencies to avoid downstream risk


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
* Ability to translate complex managed services solutions into clear, client\-relevant narratives
* Strong understanding of end\-to\-end Managed Services lifecycle (pursuit to steady state)
* Experience aligning delivery reality with client\-facing messaging
* Structured thinking with the ability to connect business outcomes, service design, and commercial models
* Confidence to engage and influence senior stakeholders across Sales, Delivery, and domain teams
* Strong collaboration skills to work across global, multi\-disciplinary pursuit teams
* Comfort operating in ambiguous, multi\-owner environments and driving alignment


**To qualify for the role, you must have**
* 10\+ years of experience in Technology Managed Services, Application Management, or TechOps
* Proven experience in solutioning and/or leading complex managed services pursuits
* Hands\-on experience in one or more areas:
+ Enterprise applications (SAP, ServiceNow, MS Dynamics, Guidewire, etc.)
+ Cloud and platform operations
+ Data and analytics platforms
+ Service management and ITSM environments (e.g., ServiceNow)

* Experience working across multi\-tower or integrated managed services deals
* Strong exposure to transition, service delivery, and operating model design


**Ideally, you’ll also have**
* Experience participating in or leading solution articulation, proposals, or orals
* Understanding of integrated business and technology managed services models
* Familiarity with commercial constructs and pricing drivers in managed services
* Exposure to design thinking, structured problem solving, or agile ways of working
* Architecture or service management certifications (e.g., TOGAF, ITIL)


**What We Offer**
 EY Global Delivery Services (GDS) is a dynamic and truly global delivery network. We work across six locations – Argentina, China, India, the Philippines, Poland and the UK – and with teams from all EY service lines, geographies and sectors, playing a vital role in the delivery of the EY growth strategy. From accountants to coders to advisory consultants, we offer a wide variety of fulfilling career opportunities that span all business disciplines. In GDS, you will collaborate with EY teams on exciting projects and work with well\-known brands from across the globe. We’ll introduce you to an ever\-expanding ecosystem of people, learning, skills and insights that will stay with you throughout your career.
   

  

* Continuous learning: You’ll develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.
* Success as defined by you: We’ll provide the tools and flexibility, so you can make a meaningful impact, your way.
* Transformative leadership: We’ll give you the insights, coaching and confidence to be the leader the you may aspire to become.
* Diverse and inclusive culture: You’ll be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.


**EY \| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

ec5dfc51.title: Team Lead, Managed Services Operations
ec5dfc51.description:
**Make an impact with NTT DATA**
 Join a company that is pushing the boundaries of what is possible. We are renowned for our technical excellence and leading innovations, and for making a difference to our clients and society. Our workplace embraces diversity and inclusion – it’s a place where you can grow, belong and thrive.
   

  

**Your day at NTT DATA**
 The Team Lead, Managed Services Operations is an entry level management role, responsible for ensuring managed service is provided to all clients, to ensure that their IT infrastructure and systems remain operational.
   

  

 This is done through proactively managing, overseeing, monitoring, investigating, and resolving escalated technical incidents and problems to ensure the restoration of these services to the clients to ensure compliance to the agreed service level agreement.
   

  

 The primary objective of this role is to ensure contracted Managed Services outcomes are delivered to the client and assists with the planning, building and supporting of delivering managed services to meet business objectives.
   

  

**Key responsibilities:**
* Monitors the work queues and provides support to clients where the ticket is highly technical or sophisticated in nature.
* Works independently, with general direction from the client, stakeholders, team lead, or senior manager, to perform operational tasks to resolve all escalated incidents/requests in a timely manner within the agreed SLA.
* Provides support to all escalated incidents.
* Shares such knowledge, to resolve issues, document them, and push the knowledge down to other engineers.
* Acts as emergency support contact as needed, for critical client and business\-impacting issues.
* Ensures that the shift handover process highlight any key escalated open tickets to be focussed on along with a handover of upcoming operation critical tasks to be carried out in the next shift.
* Timely escalation of all tickets to management with ensuing updates, where applicable.
* Proactively identifies, contributes, implements, and works with automation teams for effort optimization and automating routine tasks.
* Systematically gathers relevant information and apply technical knowledge to analyze and use highly technical troubleshooting tools and content and analytical practices.
* Uses operational and diagnostic procedures to resolve escalated tickers in unique and complex client environments.
* Performs quality audits, covering process, service experience, ticket updates as required.
* Drives service delivery to clients and applies standardized service management service operations (SMSO) to deliver managed services.
* Provides operational support and continuous service improvement post client handover from Technical Services (or other) teams.
* Implements training and development initiatives for direct reports.
* Engages with clients for technical operations as part of routine operations.
* Constantly measures and analyze team’s delivery capabilities.


**To thrive in this role, you need to have:**
* Good organizational and team management skills.
* Good communication skills – both verbal and written coupled with excellent ability to collaborate with internal stakeholders and external clients.
* Developing understanding of budgets and cost management.
* Good time management, prioritization and delegation abilities.
* Good focus on client centricity.
* Highly focused on business outcomes.
* Ability to guide the team through transformational objectives set out by the business.
* Ability to work across different cultures and social groups.
* Ability to work well in a pressurized environment and adapt to changing circumstances.


**Academic qualifications and certifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent degree in Information Technology or Computing or related field.
* ITIL certification is desirable.


**Required experience:**
* Demonstrated experience in coaching and mentoring engineering team(s) gained within an information technology services organization.
* Demonstrated experience implementing continual service improvement initiatives (through automation, process enhancements).
* Demonstrated experience in organizational change management (transformational experience).
* Relevant demonstrated experience in domain towers such as Network, Collaboration/Customer experience, Cloud, Security, Data Center.


**Workplace type:**
 On\-site Working
   

  

**About NTT DATA**
 NTT DATA is a $30\+ billion business and technology services leader, serving 75% of the Fortune Global 100\. We are committed to accelerating client success and positively impacting society through responsible innovation. We are one of the world’s leading AI and digital infrastructure providers, with unmatched capabilities in enterprise\-scale AI, cloud, security, connectivity, data centers and application services. Our consulting and industry solutions help organizations and society move confidently and sustainably into the digital future. As a Global Top Employer, we have experts in more than 50 countries. We also offer clients access to a robust ecosystem of innovation centers as well as established and start\-up partners. NTT DATA is part of NTT Group, which invests over $3 billion each year in R\&D.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 NTT DATA is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer with a global culture that embraces diversity. We are committed to providing an environment free of unfair discrimination and harassment. We do not discriminate based on age, race, colour, gender, sexual orientation, religion, nationality, disability, pregnancy, marital status, veteran status, or any other protected category. Join our growing global team and accelerate your career with us. Apply today.
   

  

**Third parties fraudulently posing as NTT DATA recruiters**
 NTT DATA recruiters will never ask job seekers or candidates for payment or banking information during the recruitment process, for any reason. Please remain vigilant of third parties who may attempt to impersonate NTT DATA recruiters—whether in writing or by phone—in order to deceptively obtain personal data or money from you. All email communications from an NTT DATA recruiter will come from an
 **@nttdata.com** 
 email address. If you suspect any fraudulent activity, please
 *contact us* 
 .

cbdd72b3.title: Bid Manager
cbdd72b3.description:
**Job Description**
-------------------


We are looking for an experienced **Bid Manager / Proposal Manager** to support end\-to\-end bid management, proposal development, response management, and pricing activities for Digital Customer Experience (DCX) opportunities. In this role, you will work closely with Sales, Solution, Delivery, and Account teams to develop winning proposals, customer presentations, and sales pitches for global clients.


**Your Role:**


* Manage end\-to\-end bid and proposal processes, including RFPs, RFIs, RFQs, and proactive pursuits.
* Drive bid planning, bid/no\-bid decisions, response integration, and submission management.
* Collaborate with Sales, Solution Architects, Delivery Teams, SMEs, and Account Teams to develop high\-quality proposals.
* Support commercial and pricing discussions by coordinating with deal analysts and stakeholders.
* Create compelling customer presentations, sales pitches, and proposal collateral.
* Maintain proposal repositories, standard templates, boilerplate content, and rate cards.
* Track pursuit progress, provide status updates, and ensure timely completion of deliverables.
* Support the development of case studies, capability presentations, and market intelligence research.

**Required Skills \& Experience:**


* Experience in Bid Management, Proposal Management, or Presales within a Tier\-1 or Tier\-2 IT Services organization.
* Strong understanding of proposal development, bid governance, and solution selling.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to coordinate with technical SMEs and cross\-functional stakeholders globally.
* Exposure to Digital Experience, CRM, Commerce, Mobile, or Enterprise Technology solutions is preferred.

**Preferred Technical Exposure:** Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Sitecore, Pega, B2B/B2C Commerce, Mobile Applications, Java, and Microsoft technologies.

-------------------------------------

In this role, you will work closely with Sales, Solution, Delivery, and Account teams to develop winning proposals, customer presentations, and sales pitches for global clients.


**Your Role:**

* Support commercial and pricing discussions by coordinating with deal analysts and stakeholders.
* Create compelling customer presentations, sales pitches, and proposal collateral.
* Maintain proposal repositories, standard templates, boilerplate content, and rate cards.
* Track pursuit progress, provide status updates, and ensure timely completion of deliverables.
* Support the development of case studies, capability presentations, and market intelligence research.

**Required Skills \& Experience:**


* Experience in Bid Management, Proposal Management, or Presales within a Tier\-1 or Tier\-2 IT Services organization.
* Strong understanding of proposal development, bid governance, and solution selling.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills.
* Ability to coordinate with technical SMEs and cross\-functional stakeholders globally.
* Exposure to Digital Experience, CRM, Commerce, Mobile, or Enterprise Technology solutions is preferred.

**Preferred Technical Exposure:** Salesforce, Microsoft Dynamics CRM, Adobe Experience Manager (AEM), Sitecore, Pega, B2B/B2C Commerce, Mobile Applications, Java, and Microsoft technologies.

f5acb572.description:

 We are hiring a
 **Customer Focused Delivery Lead** 
 to drive end\-to\-end delivery and customer adoption of Workflow Management System (WFMS) solutions across Insurance, Healthcare, and BFSI domains.

0470e8d8.title: Delivery Manager / Scrum master
0470e8d8.description:
**Job Title:** 
 Delivery Manager/Scrum Master
   

  

**Department** 
 : IFS \- IRP
   

  

**About Business line/Function:** 
 BP2S\-IFS/IRP\-ADM
   

  

**Position Purpose:** 
 IRP business is established across various geographies with a main location in Paris. IT teams should reinforce the growth of the business. Besides implementing a market\-leading vendor solution as the core calculation engine, the IRP\-RISE program also involves recasting of the IRP information system exploiting innovation tracks offered by the IRP Data Platform (IDP) as the new Data Warehouse.
   

  

 The Delivery Manager operates within a matrix structure, overseeing the end‑to‑end delivery of solutions across all platforms. They are accountable for coordinating development teams, steering delivery schedules, and ensuring that agreed‑upon service levels and quality standards are met.
   

  

 In this role, the Delivery Manager blends technical understanding with strong project‑management discipline to guarantee that solutions are delivered on time, within scope, and to the required standards, while fostering collaboration across the organization’s matrixed teams.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Direct Responsibilities
   

  

* Planning –Planning activities include:
* Produce the Detailed Project Plan
* Develop the project budget
* Develop the resource plan
* Risk analysis
* Adhere to the policies and procedures to support the achievement of project objectives.
* Organising – setting up the project team structure, activities to include:
* Determining the organisational structure of the project team
* Identify roles and positions
* Identify services to be provided by external companies
* Staff project positions
* Leading – carrying out the project plan in order to achieve the project objectives, activities include:
* Setting team direction
* Co\-ordinating activities across different organisational functions
* Motivating team members
* Assigning work
* Controlling – keeping the project on track by:
* Measuring: checking project progress toward meeting its objectives
* Evaluating: determining the cause of deviations from the plan
* Correcting: Taking corrective actions to address deviations by managing risks and issues
* Achieving the above by defining project baselines, tracking project progress and project status reporting, determining and taking corrective actions.


 Contributing Responsibilities
   

  

* Stakeholder Management:
* Business partnering
* Working with client and vendors
* Quality Management:
* Ensure appropriate corporate tool is used for change requests, support and incident tracking
* Benefits realisation
* Throughout the life of the project conducting a regular review ensuring project benefits will be achieved and reporting benefits status.
* Obtain actuals for benefits realization


**Technical \& Behavioral Competencies**
* 15\+ years project management/Scrum Master experience
* Experience in an Information Technology \& Change capacity in the Financial Services Industry


**Specific Qualifications**
* Experience in the financial services industry will be a distinct advantage
* Inclination to understand and learn application/business functionality
* Good communicator, fast learner \& a Team player
* Attention to detail, disciplined and reliable
* High motivation and confidence levels
* Can do attitude and attention to detail


**Technical Skills**
**Skills Referential** 
**(Required knowledge, skills and abilities)**
* Deep understanding of Scrum Guide \& Agile Manifesto
* Ability to run all Scrum events (Sprint Planning, Daily Scrum, Review, Retrospective)
* Definition \& tracking of Agile metrics (Velocity, Lead‑time, Cycle‑time, Burndown/Burn‑up, Cumulative Flow)
* Dashboard creation and KPI communication


**Behavioral Skills**
* Planning, Organising \& Coordinating: Establishes courses of action for self and others to ensure that work if completed efficiently
* Strategic Thinking: Understands the business and anticipates business needs, reflecting this in the approach to current projects
* Drive for Results: Continually focuses on achieving positive, concrete results contributing to business success
* Decision Making: Identifies and understands issues, problems and opportunities; uses effective approaches for choosing a course of action or developing appropriate solutions; taking action that is consistent with available facts, constraints and probable consequences.
* Customer Focus: Making efforts to listen and understand the customer; anticipating customer needs; giving high priority to customer satisfaction.
* Negotiation \& Conflict Resolution: Negotiates \& mediates sound agreements in situations where there is disagreements or differences in interests
* Building Team Spirit: Building a supportive environment, where staff understands and work together to achieve team goals, in an atmosphere of mutual respect and enthusiasm.


**Education Level**
 First class Graduate in any discipline (Computer Science preferred) from a reputed university with a good background of software Management and IT experience of 10\-15 years
   

  

 Resource who is Enthusiastic, Energetic and with a lot of interest to learn and adapt to new Project management tools.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Chennai
   

  

**About BNP Paribas Group**
 BNP Paribas is the European Union’s leading bank and key player in international banking. It operates in 65 countries and has nearly 185,000 employees, including more than 145,000 in Europe. The Group has key positions in its three main fields of activity: Commercial, Personal Banking \& Services for the Group’s commercial \& personal banking and several specialized businesses including BNP Paribas Personal Finance and Arval; Investment \& Protection Services for savings, investment, and protection solutions; and Corporate \& Institutional Banking, focused on corporate and institutional clients. Based on its strong diversified and integrated model, the Group helps all its clients (individuals, community associations, entrepreneurs, SMEs, corporates and institutional clients) to realize their projects through solutions spanning financing, investment, savings and protection insurance. In Europe, BNP Paribas has four domestic markets: Belgium, France, Italy, and Luxembourg. The Group is rolling out its integrated commercial \& personal banking model across several Mediterranean countries, Turkey, and Eastern Europe. As a key player in international banking, the Group has leading platforms and business lines in Europe, a strong presence in the Americas as well as a solid and fast\-growing business in Asia\-Pacific. BNP Paribas has implemented a Corporate Social Responsibility approach in all its activities, enabling it to contribute to the construction of a sustainable future, while ensuring the Group's performance and stability.
   

  

**About BNP Paribas India Solutions**
 Established in 2005, BNP Paribas India Solutions is a wholly owned subsidiary of BNP Paribas SA, European Union’s leading bank with an international reach. With delivery centers located in Bengaluru, Chennai and Mumbai, we are a 24x7 global delivery center. India Solutions services three business lines: Corporate and Institutional Banking, Investment Solutions and Retail Banking for BNP Paribas across the Group. Driving innovation and growth, we are harnessing the potential of over 10000 employees, to provide support and develop best\-in\-class solutions.
   

  

**Commitment to Diversity and Inclusion**
 At BNP Paribas, we passionately embrace diversity and are committed to fostering an inclusive workplace where all employees are valued, respected and can bring their authentic selves to work. We prohibit Discrimination and Harassment of any kind and our policies promote equal employment opportunity for all employees and applicants, irrespective of, but not limited to their gender, gender identity, sex, sexual orientation, ethnicity, race, colour, national origin, age, religion, social status, mental or physical disabilities, veteran status etc. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in. As a global Bank, we truly believe that inclusion and diversity of our teams is key to our success in serving our clients and the communities we operate in.

4aae99f2.title: OSS Technical Delivery Lead - PuneVOIS
4aae99f2.description:
**Who We Are**
 VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
   

  

 As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
   

  

 We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
   

  

 \#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture
   

  

**About This Role**
 We are seeking an experienced OSS Technical Delivery Lead to drive the aggregation, governance, and execution of OSS assurance demands across multiple markets. This role acts as the central demand “front door” for OSS assurance, ensuring alignment with digital portfolios, network operations, and local market needs while delivering against strategic 2025 transformation objectives.
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
* Act as a single point of contact for Assurance SMEs for all demand and delivery requests across markets
* Manage OSS delivery projects aligned with transformation and integration of UK networks and local markets
* Own and track budgets (typically £250k–£1m), ensuring delivery within capex/opex forecasts
* Coordinate impact assessments, prioritisation, and demand mobilisation processes
* Maintain governance trackers including SCM approvals, mobilisation, and demand reviews
* Consolidate all OSS work packages into a rolling 18\-month delivery plan
* Manage demand intake, collaborating with digital, network, and OSS teams
* Lead OSS resource planning with internal teams and suppliers
* Publish KPI dashboards (e.g., Kanban boards) for demand and delivery transparency
* Identify and manage OSS risks in alignment with Technology Operations
* Oversee portfolio management for group business areas
* Track OSS budgets and supplier SOW approvals
* Manage external vendors and supplier coordination across OSS domains
* Drive cross\-market demand delivery and cross\-charging processes
* Utilise tools such as JIRA, PEGA, and Azure DevOps for workflow management


 Coordinate with geographically distributed teams, including European markets
   

  

**Who You Are**
* Extensive experience (10\+ years) in OSS and telecom domains
* Strong knowledge of software delivery lifecycle, particularly in Agile environments
* Proven expertise in demand and delivery management and governance
* Skilled in stakeholder and supplier management across global teams
* Proficient in tools such as Azure DevOps, PEGA, and JIRA
* Demonstrated ability to manage budgets and financial planning
* Experience working in multinational and geographically dispersed environments
* Strong communication and interpersonal skills
* Ability to navigate complex organisational structures and deliver outcomes collaboratively
* Professional certifications such as PMP or SAFe are desirable


**Not a perfect fit?**
 Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.
   

  

**What's In It For You**
* Opportunity to lead large\-scale OSS transformation initiatives across global markets
* Exposure to strategic programmes within Vodafone’s network and digital ecosystem
* Collaboration with cross\-functional teams, including technology, operations, and suppliers
* Development of leadership capabilities in a complex, multinational environment
* Involvement in high\-value budget management and decision\-making processes
* Access to a collaborative and innovation\-driven work culture


**What Skills You Will Learn**
* Advanced OSS demand and delivery governance
* Strategic portfolio and stakeholder management at a global level
* Financial planning and budget optimisation in telecom environments
* Vendor and supplier negotiation and management
* Agile delivery practices using enterprise tools (JIRA, PEGA, Azure DevOps)
* Cross\-market collaboration and international programme coordination


**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
 Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.
   

  

**Join Us**
 At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
   

  

 We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
   

  

 With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.
   

  

**Alert**
 Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
   

  

 \#JDEnhancedByTARA
   

  

**Follow us on social media**
* LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vois/
* Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/voisglobal
* Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/voisglobal/
* You can also chat with our employees to learn more about our projects: https://lnkd.in/dpkrcvR2

357faa3a.title: Program Manager
357faa3a.description:
**Overview**
 Program Manager
   

  

**Job Description**
**About the Role**
 We're looking for a Program Manager who brings structure, clarity, and momentum to cross\-functional technical programs. You'll partner with engineering, product, and business teams to keep programs organized and moving, while driving execution, coordination, and on\-time delivery.This is a hands\-on role for someone who is comfortable in the details, keeps multiple workstreams OnTrack, and builds trust and alignment across teams.
   

  

**Your Impact \-** 
 Program Delivery \& Execution (45%)
   

  

* Manage cross\-functional programs from planning and initiation through execution and closure.
* Coordinate one or more concurrent programs, maintaining scope, quality, and delivery timelines.
* Maintain program plans, roadmaps, and success metrics aligned to team and business goals.
* Track risks and dependencies, escalate issues early, and help keep at\-risk work on course.


**Stakeholder \& Communication (30%)**
* Serve as a key point of contact for program status, keeping stakeholders informed on progress,risks, and decisions.
* Build and maintain strong working relationships across Engineering, Product, QA, DevOps, and Operations.
* Drive accountability and alignment across teams without relying on direct authority.
* Support governance structures, escalation paths, and communication rhythms.


**Process, Governance \& Tooling (20%)**
* Apply and help improve program management practices, planning templates, and reporting standards.
* Support program governance: milestone planning, dependency mapping, critical path tracking, and risk management.
* Use metrics, KPIs, and dashboards to monitor program health and surface insights for decisions.


**Collaboration \& Growth (5%)**
* Share knowledge and delivery practices with peers and project leads.
* Help identify gaps in process maturity and contribute to improving delivery across teams.


**What You Bring**
* 5\+ years of program management experience, including coordinating cross\-functional technical programs.
* Track record of delivering programs with meaningful visibility and business impact.
* Background in SaaS product delivery, enterprise platforms, or healthcare technology is a strong plus.
* Able to engage in technical discussions and understand how engineering decisions affect delivery timelines.
* Experience partnering with tech leads on release readiness, sequencing, and mitigation strategies.
* Comfortable managing competing priorities and navigating ambiguity.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills, with the ability to present clearly to stakeholders and leadership.
* Working knowledge of program governance, dependency mapping, critical path analysis, and risk mitigation.
* Familiarity with Agile, Scrum, SAFe, Kanban, and Waterfall and the judgment to apply the right approach.
* Proficient in Jira and Confluence, with working knowledge of planning tools such as MS Project, Smartsheet, or Excel.
* Familiarity with release management and CI/CD delivery models in technical environments.
* Comfortable building and maintaining reporting dashboards.
* PMP or SAFe certification is a plus. Equivalent real\-world experience is equally valued

4e966dc9.title: Technical Program Manager, Data Intelligence
4e966dc9.description:
### **Minimum qualifications:**

* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in program management.

  

### **Preferred qualifications:**

* 5 years of experience managing cross\-functional or cross\-team projects.
* Ability to design process improvements that are tailored to the needs of a specific project (rather than knowledge of standard processes).
* Excellent analytical abilities, to communicate across a wide variety of functions (engineering, product management) and levels.

**About the job**
-----------------


A problem isn’t truly solved until it’s solved for all. That’s why Googlers build products that help create opportunities for everyone, whether down the street or across the globe. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you’ll use your technical expertise to lead complex, multi\-disciplinary projects from start to finish. You’ll work with stakeholders to plan requirements, identify risks, manage project schedules, and communicate clearly with cross\-functional partners across the company. You're equally comfortable explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical tradeoffs in product development with engineers.


In this role, you will drive the end\-to\-end planning, tracking, and execution of complex ML storage infrastructure programs (including Napa priorities like materialization, pushing, and sovereignty/compliance). You will serve as the structural bridge between the centralized Napa team and the horizontal File Formats (Artus) team to prevent technical silos, manage cross\-team dependencies, and ensure frictionless integration. Exercise strong technical judgment to translate high\-level business requirements and architectural recommendations into actionable engineering roadmaps; proactively identify and mitigate systemic risks stemming from platform shifts and infrastructure shortages. You will design, implement, and optimize lightweight project management processes, tracking frameworks and dashboard solutions to help a rapidly evolving site organization scale efficiently. You will navigate ambiguous environments and rapidly resolve cross\-functional or inter\-team dependencies to preserve timeline velocity on business\-critical client commitments.

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Collaborate with team members and stakeholders to understand or identify defined work problems and program goals, obtain prioritized deliverables, and discuss program impact.
* Prioritize program goals, understand and translate other stakeholders’ needs into program goals and prioritized deliverables with minimal assistance, and contribute to decisions on prioritizing goals and deliverables.
* Define the scope of projects and develop, execute, or manage project plans for supported programs.
* Review key metrics pertaining to a program, monitor potential metric deviations, and define corrective actions for critical deviations.
* Identify, communicate, and collaborate with relevant stakeholders within one or more teams to drive impact and work toward mutual goals. Build, maintain and enhance business, operational, and management dashboards.
Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form.

5164265c.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, RBS Tech - DIQ
5164265c.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Drive transformative technical programs that solve complex retail challenges by bridging science, data engineering, and business operations at Amazon scale. You'll own end\-to\-end delivery of ML/AI\-powered solutions that impact billions in gross merchandise sales and hundreds of millions of customers worldwide, while collaborating with Applied Science, Data Engineering, Finance, and Retail leadership across the organization.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

Lead end\-to\-end technical program delivery across ML/AI development, data pipeline architecture, and science\-driven solutions that address critical retail challenges including catalog enrichment, defect root\-cause analysis, cost allocation, and profitability modeling  

  

Partner across retail organizations to identify customer problems, define technical solutions, and deliver measurable improvements in collaboration with Selection, Supply Chain, Category, and Marketplace teams  

  

Serve as technical liaison between Applied Science, Data Engineering, and Business teams, translating business requirements into technical specifications and ensuring models are production\-ready for scale  

  

Drive architecture and system design discussions that evaluate trade\-offs and ensure solutions support scalability, reliability, and cost\-efficiency across large\-scale retail operations  

  

Manage cross\-functional dependencies and competing priorities across Science, Engineering, Finance, Operations, and Retail organizations, driving alignment at executive leadership levels and implementing risk mitigations  

  

A day in the life  

As a Senior Technical Program Manager in Retail Business Services, you'll navigate the intersection of machine learning innovation and retail operations. Your day might include facilitating a design discussion with our Applied Science team to evaluate trade\-offs in a new catalog enrichment model, then pivoting to align cross\-functional stakeholders on data pipeline architecture for supply chain defect elimination. You'll translate complex technical requirements into clear specifications, work with Data Engineering to ensure models are production\-ready, and build measurement frameworks that quantify business impact. You'll also prepare executive narratives for leadership forums, manage competing priorities across multiple retail organizations, and identify risks early to keep large\-scale programs on track. Throughout it all, you're solving problems that directly affect how millions of products are discovered and purchased by customers globally.  

  

About the team  

We are a team of technical leaders and builders focused on scaling Amazon's retail operations through intelligent automation. Our mission is to ensure that Amazon's catalog is complete, correct, and comprehensive—enabling customers to find exactly what they need every time. We work at the intersection of science, data, and retail business, tackling challenges that span catalog quality, inventory optimization, cost allocation, and supply chain efficiency.  

  

Our team collaborates closely with Applied Science, Data Engineering, Finance, Operations, and Retail organizations worldwide. We operate with visibility into senior leadership forums, giving us the opportunity to influence strategy at the highest levels. We're looking for someone who thrives in this complex, multi\-stakeholder environment and can translate ambiguous problems into clear technical solutions. If you're energized by working on problems that impact billions of dollars in business value and hundreds of millions of customers, this is the place for you.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers.
