ef71c446.title: Technical Program Manager - Cloud (TAM)
ef71c446.description:
**Netradyne** 
 harnesses the power of Computer Vision and Edge Computing to revolutionize the modern\-day transportation ecosystem. We are a leader in fleet safety solutions. With growth exceeding 4x year over year, our solution is quickly being recognized as a significant disruptive technology. Our team is growing, and we need forward\-thinking, uncompromising, competitive team members to continue to facilitate our growth.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Job Title**
 Technical Program Manager (Technical Account Management)
   

  

**Company**
 Netradyne
   

  

**Location**
 Whitefield, Bangalore
   

  

**Employment Type**
 Full\-Time
   

  

**Work Model**
 On\-site (5 days WFO)
   

  

**Shift**
 General Shift/Evening Shift
   

  

**Experience Required**
 8 to 12 years
   

  

**About Netradyne:**
 Netradyne provides AI\-powered technologies for fleet management and safer roads. An award\-winning industry leader in fleet safety and video telematics solutions, Netradyne empowers thousands of commercial fleet customers across North America, Europe, and Asia to enhance their driver performance, reduce risk, and optimize operations.
   

  

 Netradyne sets the standard among transportation technology companies for enhancing and sustaining road safety, with an industry\-leading 25\+ billion miles vision\-analyzed for risk and an industry\-first driver scoring system that reinforces safe behaviors. Founded in 2015, Netradyne is headquartered in San Diego with offices in San Francisco, Nashville, the UK and Bangalore.
   

  

 For more details visit: www.netradyne.com
   

  

**Job Overview:** 
 Cloud Group at Netradyne builds and continuously enhances Netradyne’s SaaS product and Driver.i Platform. Technical Program Managers play important role in ensuring various programs are run delivered with optimal solution in timely manner. The programs range across building new products, reducing technical debts and to serve customer requirements. We are looking to add super star players to our Technical Program Managers team.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Manage critical customer facing programs.
* Ensure success of key account deliverables by being the bridge between business requirements and Netradyne engineering.
* Understand technical requirements from customer and/or partner, and identify potential architectural solutions to achieve the same, given knowledge of Netradyne product architecture. Collaborate internally to conclude on the architecture as necessary
* Develop deep understanding of Netradyne Product and Architecture. Be the SME on published and unpublished product functionalities
* Provide inputs to the Engineering teams on improvement areas
* Communicate extensively with key customer account stakeholders (business and technical) and internal stakeholders (Engineering, Operations, Business) via all modes and all geographies
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including engineering, data analytics, and customer success teams, to define project scope, goals and deliverables
* Identify and proactively remove any potential roadblocks to customer success.
* Use interpersonal skills to develop strong internal and external relationships, and leverage those to improve collaboration and coordination
* Monitor the performance of projects and make necessary corrections to ensure their successful completion
* Provide regular and proactive updates to Netradyne Senior Management on Program progress


**Mandatory Skills:**
* Strong communication skills \- verbal and written
* Ability to develop strong working relationships with all stakeholders
* At least 5 years of prior hands on experience with developing, testing and releasing scalable software projects
* At least 4 years of experience in customer facing roles and delivery management
* Prior experience working with teams and stakeholders in multiple geographies
* Must have the capability of data\-driven decision making by using metrics, logs, dashboards, and KPIs to guide decisions and communicate to stakeholders
* Translate customer business needs into clear technical requirements, feature proposals, and architectural direction
* Strong knowledge of architectural patterns, esp. related to server\-side software
* Conversant with APIs / Webhooks / Scalable Servers / Technical Feasibility / Public Cloud and related concepts
* Good understanding of software development lifecycle (SDLC)
* Reasonable understanding of product and cloud security
* Exceptional organizational skills and attention to detail
* Ability to lead teams without managing
* Anticipates technical challenges, constraints, dependencies, and can explain trade\-offs to customers
* Must be able to build trust, handle escalation, and balances customer asks with internal constraints


**Qualifications And Education Requirements**
**BTech/MTech, MBA (will be a preferred).**
**Equal Opportunity Employer Statement** 
 : Netradyne is an equal opportunity employer and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees.
   

  

**Additional Information:** 
 This position is based out in HM Tech Park, Whitefield Bangalore.
   

  

**Contact Information:** 
 For inquiries, please contact Recruiter at Jeffin.varghese.c@Netradyne.com.
   

  

**Follow us on LinkedIn: For more information on our work culture, follow us on** 
**Netradyne: My Company \| LinkedIn**
 We are committed to an inclusive and diverse team. Netradyne is an equal\-opportunity employer. We do not discriminate based on race, color, ethnicity, ancestry, national origin, religion, sex, gender, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, age, disability, veteran status, genetic information, marital status, or any legally protected status.
   

  

 If there is a match between your experiences/skills and the Company's needs, we will contact you directly.
   

  

 Netradyne is an equal\-opportunity employer.
   

  

**Applicants only \- Recruiting agencies do not contact.**
**Recruitment Fraud Alert!**
 There has been an increase in fraud that targets job seekers. Scammers may present themselves to job seekers as Netradyne employees or recruiters. Please be aware that Netradyne does not request sensitive personal data from applicants via text/instant message or any unsecured method; does not promise any advance payment for work equipment set\-up and does not use recruitment or job\-sourcing agencies that charge candidates an advance fee of any kind. Official communication about your application will only come from emails ending in ‘@netradyne.com’ or ‘@us\-greenhouse\-mail.io’.
   

  

 Please review and apply to our available job openings at Netradyne.com/company/careers. For more information on avoiding and reporting scams, please visit the Federal Trade Commission's job scams website.

8bd8e073.title: Technical Program Manager
8bd8e073.description:
At eBay, we're more than a global ecommerce leader — we’re changing the way the world shops and sells. Our platform empowers millions of buyers and sellers in more than 190 markets around the world. We’re committed to pushing boundaries and leaving our mark as we reinvent the future of ecommerce for enthusiasts.
   

  

 Our customers are our compass, authenticity thrives, bold ideas are welcome, and everyone can bring their unique selves to work — every day. We're in this together, sustaining the future of our customers, our company, and our planet.
   

  

 Join a team of passionate thinkers, innovators, and dreamers — and help us connect people and build communities to create economic opportunity for all.
   

  

 Cloud Data Technoloigies (CDT) builds and operates on\-premise cloud\-native data platforms and services that power eBay. The CDT PMO provides governance, planning, and delivery rigor.
   

  

 The Sr. Program Manager owns delivery of complex, multi\-team CDT initiatives, typically within a single platform or product area. You will plan and execute workstreams, coordinate cross\-functional teams, manage risks and dependencies, and establish reliable delivery mechanisms. The role requires strong program execution, stakeholder communication, and practical technical fluency in modern cloud and data technologies.
   

  

 Key responsibilities
   

  

* Program planning and execution
+ Translate product/platform goals into scoped plans, milestones, and success metrics.
+ Break down epics into clear workstreams and track progress; manage dependencies and sequencing.
+ Run program ceremonies (kickoffs, standups, weekly status, risk/dependency reviews).

* Risk and issue management
+ Identify technical and delivery risks early; maintain risk registers; drive mitigations.
+ Escalate issues with clear context, options, and impacts; facilitate trade\-off decisions.

* Cross\-functional collaboration and stakeholder communication
+ Align requirements with Product, Engineering, and partner/customer teams.
+ Provide clear, concise status updates, dashboards, and narratives; represent the program in reviews.

* Process improvement and PMO governance
+ Apply PMO frameworks for intake, prioritization, and benefits tracking; maintain auditable plans and reporting.
+ Lead retrospectives for the program; implement tooling/process improvements; share playbooks.

* Team leadership and culture
+ Mentor project managers/analysts and partner engineers on estimation, planning, and risk practices.
+ Model ownership, accountability, and continuous improvement; foster respectful, collaborative dynamics.


**Required Qualifications**
* 5–8\+ years of project/program management in cloud, data platforms, or enterprise software; delivered multi\-team initiatives.
* Technical fluency in relevant and modern cloud and data technologies.
* Experience translating requirements into executable technical plans.
* Strong planning, estimation, dependency management, and risk mitigation within agile/hybrid delivery frameworks.
* Excellent communication skills: clear status/risk reporting and stakeholder alignment across product and engineering.
* Familiarity with relevant security, compliance, and data governance processes (e.g., GDPR).


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working within a PMO\-led environment, including portfolio governance and benefits realization.
* Hands\-on familiarity with major cloud providers and data services (AWS/Azure/GCP; e.g., S3/ADLS/GCS, BigQuery/Snowflake/Redshift, Databricks).
* Relevant certifications (PMP, PgMP, SAFe, CSM, ITIL) or equivalent experience.
* Experience with geographically distributed teams and data privacy requirements.


 Core leadership behaviors
   

  

* Outcome\-focused planning and delivery oversight within a defined domain.
* Systems thinking and architectural stewardship in partnership with tech leads.
* Transparent coordination, crisp narratives, and executive\-ready status at the program level.
* Risk identification, mitigation, and timely escalation.
* Expectation management with product and engineering stakeholders.
* Technical coaching and a culture of learning within the program team.
* Continuous improvement and retrospective leadership.
* Compliance alignment and operational excellence for owned scope.
* Ownership and accountability.


 Success metrics
   

  

* Program scope, timeline, and budget met; defined benefits realized (reliability, performance, cost, compliance).
* Improved delivery predictability and velocity; reduced carryover and unplanned work.
* Adoption of CDT standards, tooling, and governance within the program.
* Positive stakeholder feedback and sustained communication cadence.


**Additional Details**
 eBay is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, veteran status, and disability, or other legally protected status. If you have a need that requires accommodation, please contact us at talent@ebay.com. We will make every effort to respond to your request for accommodation as soon as possible. View our accessibility statement to learn more about eBay's commitment to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities.
   

  

 We use cookies to enhance your experience and may use AI tools for administrative tasks in the hiring process. To learn how we handle your personal data and use AI responsibly, please visit our Talent Privacy Notice, Privacy Center, and AI Hiring Guidelines.

2ac248e6.title: Senior Staff Technical Program Manager (Video Engineering)
2ac248e6.description:
**Job Summary:**
 As a Senior Staff Technical Program Manager, you will lead media programs, influencing the teams' roadmap priorities and technical direction. This role combines strong technical understanding, program leadership, and agile delivery excellence. You will own end\-to\-end execution of critical programs, influence roadmap direction, manage cross\-team dependencies and senior stakeholders, and mentor teams to raise execution maturity across the organization.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities:**
* Foster a culture of accountability, ownership, and collaboration
* Lead large, complex technical programs from planning through delivery independently
* Influence roadmap priorities by aligning stakeholders on objectives and outcomes
* Coordinate across engineering, product, and business teams to manage dependencies and ensure timely execution
* Facilitate cross\-pod collaboration and alignment to maintain delivery momentum
* Proactively plan for and mitigate risks, evaluating alternatives, quantifying trade\-offs, and structuring communication plans
* Apply Agile methodologies for iterative delivery, adaptive planning, and continuous improvement
* Coach teams on Agile best practices and foster high Scrum maturity
* Maintain sprint cadence and rigor through reviews, retrospectives, and OKR alignment
* Drive pod\-level accountability for JIRA hygiene, analytics reporting, and milestone tracking
* Ensure data\-driven decision\-making using clear metrics, dashboards, and visual progress reporting
* Regularly communicate program updates, decisions, and risks to leadership concisely and visually
* Continuously improve internal processes to enhance team efficiency and delivery velocity
* Act as a mentor for junior TPMs and team members to scale program management maturity


**Skills \& Attributes for success:**
* Deep technical understanding of scalable systems, with the ability to dive into architecture reviews, ask second\-order questions, and push for scalable, resilient solutions
* Highly structured thinker with the ability to break down ambiguous goals into executable plans, identify blind spots, and push for clarity in both direction and detail
* Strong grasp of risk/reward tradeoffs, and comfort operating in fast\-moving, high\-stakes environments with shifting priorities and evolving context
* Exceptional communicator, skilled in managing stakeholder expectations and aligning diverse teams on shared timelines, goals, and impact
* Strong program management experience managing cross functional initiatives end to end and driving influence without authority
* Strong experience leading complex cross\-functional programs involving AI/ML and GenAI systems at scale.
* Should have deep technical understanding of AI platforms, execution rigor, stakeholder management, and the ability to drive AI initiatives from strategy to production.
* Experience with LLMs, AI infrastructure, model lifecycle management, and scalable delivery processes is highly preferred.
* Expertise in Agile frameworks (Scrum, SAFe) and tools like JIRA, Confluence


**Preferred education \& qualification:**
* A Bachelor's/Master’s degree with a minimum of 12 years of experience, including 3 to 4 years in a Program Management role within the consumer technology sector

5af8c439.title: Lead Technical Program Manager
5af8c439.description:
**Job Description**
 Job Description
   

  

**Experience: 10\+ years**
**Job Summary**
 We are seeking a Senior Technical Program Manager / Functional Lead with strong functional understanding, technical depth, and excellent technical writing skills. The ideal candidate will bridge business, ERP, SCM, and engineering teams, driving complex programs involving web development, AI agents, and enterprise integrations. This role emphasizes functional clarity, execution discipline, and communication over pure hands\-on coding.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Own and drive end\-to\-end technical programs across web, AI agent, and enterprise systems
* Translate business and SCM requirements into clear functional and technical specifications
* Act as a bridge between business stakeholders, ERP teams, and engineering teams
* Define system workflows, integration patterns, and data flows
* Lead planning, prioritization, and execution of multi\-team technical initiatives
* Ensure alignment across architecture, security, scalability, and compliance requirements
* Review designs and code at a high level to ensure quality and standards
* Support AI agent and automation initiatives from a functional and orchestration perspective
* Drive risk management, dependency tracking, and delivery timelines
* Mentor engineers and junior program managers


**Technical \& Functional Skills**
**Functional \& Program Management:**
* Strong experience in Technical Program Management or Technical Product roles
* Proven ability to manage complex, cross\-functional initiatives
* Strong understanding of SDLC, Agile, and DevOps delivery models
* Excellent stakeholder management and communication skills


**Enterprise \& Domain Knowledge**
* Strong functional understanding of Oracle ERP (NetSuite / Oracle ERP)
* Solid understanding of Supply Chain Management (SCM) processes including:
* Order management
* Logistics \& transportation
* Inventory and planning
* Experience working on ERP integrations and enterprise platforms


**Technical Knowledge (Hands\-on Not Mandatory But Preferred)**
* Good understanding of Python and .NET based systems
* Familiarity with cloud\-native architectures in Microsoft Azure
* Working knowledge of Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and cloud operations
* Awareness of AI agent architectures, automation workflows, and orchestration patterns
* Understanding of web architectures and modern UI frameworks


**Technical Writing \& Documentation**
* Strong experience creating:
* Functional requirement documents (FRDs)
* Technical design documents (TDDs)
* Architecture diagrams and integration specs
* API and interface documentation
* Ability to document complex systems clearly for both technical and non\-technical audiences
* Experience driving documentation standards and best practices


**Nice To Have**
* Experience with Azure Fabric or data platforms
* Background in logistics, energy, or large\-scale enterprise systems
* Experience supporting AI\-driven automation initiatives
* Prior experience working with globally distributed teams


**Candidate Profile**
* Strong functional thinker with technical credibility
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Comfortable operating at the intersection of business, technology, and delivery
* Detail\-oriented with strong execution discipline


 At Nextpower, we are driving the global energy transition with an integrated clean energy technology platform that combines intelligent structural, electrical, and digital solutions for utility\-scale power plants. Our comprehensive portfolio enables faster project delivery, higher performance, and greater reliability, helping our customers capture the full value of solar power. Our talented worldwide teams are redefining how solar power plants are designed, built, and operated every day with smart technology, data\-driven insights, and advanced automation. Together, we’re building the foundation for the world’s next generation of clean energy infrastructure.
   

  

**We are Nextpower**

With a global presence and focus on Software \& Platforms, Life sciences and Healthcare, Retail, CPG, financial services and supply chain, CLOUDSUFI is positioned to meet customers where they are in their data monetization journey.

**Equal Opportunity Statement**

All qualified candidates receive consideration for employment without regard to race, colour, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation and national origin status. We provide equal opportunities in employment, advancement, and all other areas of our workplace. Please explore more at https://www.cloudsufi.com/
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**

 reports/dashboards

418e093e.title: Senior Technical Program Manager, Amazon Now, Supply Chain
418e093e.description:
**Description**
 Come build the supply chain brain for Amazon's fastest\-growing quick commerce business.
   

  

 Amazon Now's SCOPE (Supply Chain Operations, Planning \& Efficiency) team is looking for a Technical Program Manager who wants to own two of the most foundational pillars of our supply chain — Buying and Forecasting. This isn't a "track and report" TPM role. You'll be the strategic anchor connecting AI/ML\-powered demand intelligence with automated procurement systems, directly shaping how thousands of dark stores across India stay stocked, efficient, and ready for customers in under 15 minutes.
   

  

**Here's Why This Role Is Different**
 You'll own the full lifecycle — from roadmap planning to GTM adoption — across programs that touch 20\+ stakeholders, 10\+ external systems, and thousands of stores
   

  

 You'll drive a forecasting accuracy leap from 55% MAPE to under 20% — a transformation that directly impacts instock rates, cost efficiency, and customer experience
   

  

 You'll take buying automation from baseline to 95%\+ PO automation, fundamentally changing how Amazon Now procures at scale
   

  

 You'll operate at the rare intersection of program rigor, technical depth (ML/Science systems, distributed pipelines), and business acumen — all three matter here
   

  

 You'll build lasting institutional muscle — governance frameworks, adoption playbooks, and review mechanisms that become the operating system for how we scale supply chain programs
   

  

 This is a high\-ambiguity, high\-impact space. If you thrive on connecting dots across complex systems, influencing without authority across worldwide teams, and turning chaos into repeatable execution — This is for you.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

 End\-to\-End Program Ownership \& Delivery
   

  

 Own full lifecycle delivery of complex, cross\-organizational supply chain programs across Buying and Forecasting charters
   

  

 Drive roadmap \& OKR planning with 2\-month rolling cycles
   

  

 Co\-own P0/P1 metrics and establish program health mechanisms
   

  

 Cross\-Org Alignment \& Dependency Governance
   

  

 Manage 20\+ internal and external stakeholders across Tech, Product, Ops, Science, Seller Managers, and WW Teams
   

  

 Govern 10\+ external system dependencies concurrently (forecasting pipelines, vendor portals, WW platforms)
   

  

 Drive alignment across organizations including AFT, SCOT, Wombat, GPI, Category, ISMs, and Ops
   

  

 GTM Strategy \& Adoption Execution
   

  

 Design and execute multi\-phase Go\-to\-Market rollouts across DG and P3 hubs
   

  

 Drive adoption across thousands of dark stores in India and emerging markets
   

  

 Achieve 100% adoption within 30 days post\-launch (current baseline: 60\+ days)
   

  

 Buying Charter — Procurement Systems
   

  

 Drive automated PO generation \& optimization toward 95%\+ automation
   

  

 Own Multi Hub ASIN sourcing strategy and MOQ/MOV configuration
   

  

 Enable vendor ordering intelligence and Manual Buying UI tools
   

  

 Forecasting Charter — Demand Intelligence
   

  

 Drive MAPE improvement from 55% to \<20%
   

  

 Scale ASIN automation rate from 35% to \>90%
   

  

 Own S\&OP integrated planning framework, seasonal/high\-velocity event forecast models, and forecast tools (View/Download, Override, Explainability \& Analytics)
   

  

 Stakeholder Management \& Leadership Representation
   

  

 Serve as the program anchor and strategic voice for Buying \& Forecasting in leadership reviews
   

  

 Focus on strategic alignments, external dependencies, and GTM/adoption strategies while SDMs handle project execution and internal alignment
   

  

**About The Team**
 Amazon Now is Amazon's quick commerce business, delivering essentials to customers in under 15 minutes across India and emerging markets. At the heart of this promise is our Supply Chain Operations, Planning \& Efficiency (SCOPE) organization — the team that ensures thousands of dark stores stay optimally stocked, cost\-efficient, and ready to serve. We build AI/ML\-powered forecasting systems, automated procurement engines, and intelligent sourcing strategies that operate at massive scale. From demand prediction to purchase order generation to multi\-hub fulfillment, our supply chain systems are the backbone that turns speed into a sustainable, repeatable customer experience.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 5\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- Karnataka

9d6bc3c8.title: Senior Technical Program Manager - Amazon Lending, Amazon Lending
9d6bc3c8.description:
**Description**
 The mission of Amazon Lending is to provide fast and convenient access to working capital for micro, small, and medium\-sized businesses on Amazon. Small businesses continue to be underserved by traditional lenders. We are passionate about enabling the growth of these small businesses by removing a critical barrier – access to capital. We want to do so by delivering a differentiated and superior customer experience to let small businesses focus on their trade versus worrying about capital.
   

  

 Amazon Lending is seeking a passionate and talented Senior TPM to join the team. You will have the opportunity to influence technical architecture, establish and own a roadmap. This role requires working with Product teams as well as Marketing, Business Development and Partners to define strategy and requirements, and lead cross functional development teams from design through delivery.
   

  

 You will be accountable for driving the entire product lifecycle, from product definition through specification, coding, quality assurance and launch to the world. This position involves regular communication with senior management on status, risks and change control. Cross\-team coordination, agile project management and executive presentation skills are essential.
   

  

 The ideal candidate is a creative and has demonstrated leadership with superior analytical abilities. This opportunity requires excellent technical, problem\-solving, and communication skills. The candidate is not just a policy maker/spokesperson but drives to get the right things done. At the core of the position is delivery.
   

  

 Qualified candidates have experience defining projects, collecting requirements, writing detailed functional and test specifications, coordinating efforts to scope, schedule, and deploy new features sets as well as analyzing cost/benefit of feature selection and communicating results throughout the organization.
   

  

 Knowledge of the following is required service\-oriented architecture, product development , build processes, agile project management, release schedules.

* 5\+ years of technical product or program management experience
* 7\+ years of working directly with engineering teams experience
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules

0da1602d.title: Bid Manager
0da1602d.description:
**Role Purpose** 




 To establish centralized proposal\-to\-order governance by driving techno\-commercial validation, bid governance, margin protection, and cross\-functional alignment across strategic opportunities, ensuring reduction in revenue leakages, commercial exposure, and execution\-stage escalations.
 



  





**Location** 
 : Airoli, Navi Mumbai
 



**Work Mode** 
 : Work from office, 5 day week
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 




**Bid \& Proposal Governance** 



* Review and govern all strategic bids/proposals before customer submission.
* Ensure alignment between Sales, Presales, Delivery, Finance, SCM, and Legal teams.
* Validate commercials, solution scope, assumptions, dependencies, and delivery commitments.
* Ensure mandatory stakeholder sign\-offs prior to proposal release and order booking.



  





**Commercial \& Margin Governance** 



* Validate pricing, margin assumptions, payment terms, LD clauses, penalties, warranties, and commercial risks.
* Ensure adherence to minimum margin thresholds and governance policies.
* Identify and prevent potential revenue leakages and unplanned cost exposures.



  





**SOW \& Contract Governance** 



* Ensure detailed SOW, SLA, deliverables, exclusions, and dependencies are documented and approved.
* Review contractual terms for execution feasibility and commercial protection.
* Drive proposal\-to\-order hygiene and governance discipline.



  





**Cross\-functional Coordination** 




 Act as central governance interface between:
 


* Sales
* Presales
* Service Delivery
* Finance
* Legal
* SCM
* OEM/Alliance teams
* Conduct governance reviews for strategic and high\-value opportunities.



  





**Risk \& Escalation Management** 



* Identify bid\-stage execution risks, dependency gaps, and commercial concerns.
* Drive corrective actions before order booking.
* Minimize post\-order escalations, cost overruns, and customer disputes.



  





**Governance \& Reporting** 



* Maintain governance dashboards and approval trackers.
* Conduct periodic governance reviews with leadership.
* Support creation of standardized proposal, costing, and SOW templates.



  





**Desired candidate profile** 



* 8–15 years of experience in System Integration / IT Infrastructure / Managed Services environment.
* Strong understanding of:
* Techno\-commercial bid management
* Proposal governance
* Managed services commercials
* Delivery execution lifecycle
* Contract \& SOW governance
* Exposure to large enterprise/Govt/PSU projects preferred.



  





**Key Skills** 




  




* Techno\-Commercial Evaluation
* Proposal \& SOW Management
* Margin \& Cost Governance
* Contract Review
* Revenue Assurance
* Stakeholder Management
* Risk Assessment
* Delivery Governance
* Commercial Negotiation
* Bid Governance

67e5d121.title: Solution Architect
67e5d121.description:
**About RightCrowd**
 RightCrowd (A portfolio company of Bloom Equity Partners, is a leader in Physical Identity and Access Management (PIAM) solutions, helping organizations worldwide secure their facilities and manage who has access to what, where, and when. We work with major global enterprises across energy, manufacturing, financial services, and other critical industries to implement sophisticated access control and security systems.
   

  

**The Opportunity**
 We're looking for a seasoned Solution Architect to join our project delivery team \- someone who thrives at the intersection of cutting\-edge technology and direct customer engagement. This isn't your typical behind\-the\-scenes technical role.
   

  

**What Makes This Role Unique:**
**You're the Technical Leader** 
 \- You'll own the technical relationship with customers from initial requirements through successful deployment. You're not just implementing solutions; you're architecting them to meet specific customer needs.
   

  

**Direct Customer Impact** 
 \- Work directly with enterprise clients' project teams, building relationships while solving complex integration challenges. You'll see your technical expertise translate into real business value for major organizations.
   

  

**Diverse Technical Challenges** 
 \- Every project is different. One day you're integrating with Lenel OnGuard access control systems, the next you're troubleshooting Active Directory authentication, or configuring cloud\-based deployments.
   

  

**Growth \& Learning** 
 \- PIAM is a specialized, growing field. You'll become an expert in an area that combines traditional IT skills with cutting\-edge security technology.
   

  

**What You'll Be Doing:**
* Solution Design \& Implementation \- Lead technical delivery of PIAM solutions for enterprise customers
* Customer Collaboration \- Work directly with client teams to gather requirements, manage expectations, and ensure successful outcomes
* Technical Problem Solving \- Troubleshoot complex integrations involving SQL Server, Active Directory, web services, and various access control platforms
* Project Leadership \- Manage technical scope, timelines, and deliverables while mentoring junior team members
* System Integration \- Configure and deploy solutions that integrate with existing enterprise infrastructure


**Ideal Candidate Profile:**
* Experienced Professional (10\+ years) who doesn't need hand\-holding on basic IT concepts
* Strong SQL skills and comfort with Microsoft technologies (Windows Server, Active Directory, IIS)
* Customer\-focused with excellent communication skills \- you can explain complex technical concepts to both IT teams and business stakeholders
* Integration experience with applications, databases, and enterprise systems
* Willing to work US hours and collaborate with global teams


**Why This Role is Special:**
**High Visibility \& Impact** 
 \- Your work directly affects how major organizations secure their facilities and manage access for thousands of employees and contractors.
   

  

**Technical Breadth** 
 \- You'll work across the full technology stack: databases, applications, cloud platforms, networking, and specialized security systems.
   

  

**Customer Relationships** 
 \- Build lasting partnerships with enterprise clients rather than working on anonymous internal projects.
   

  

**Professional Growth** 
 \- Develop expertise in a specialized, high\-demand field while working with the latest technologies and enterprise\-scale challenges.
   

  

**Variety** 
 \- No two projects are the same. You might work with an energy company securing offshore facilities one month and a financial institution managing headquarters access the next.
   

  

**The Bottom Line:**
 If you're a seasoned IT professional who wants to combine deep technical skills with meaningful customer relationships, lead complex enterprise projects, and become an expert in a growing field, this Solution Architect role offers exactly that opportunity. You'll be joining a company that's already established in the PIAM space with room to grow your career while making a real impact on how major organizations approach physical security.
   

  

**Ready to take your technical expertise to the next level while building direct customer relationships?**
 Powered by JazzHR
   

  

 DlAu7I0DC0

2a7b7e25.title: Solution Architect
2a7b7e25.description:
Siemens Digital Industries Software is a leading provider of solutions for the design, simulation, and manufacture of products across many different industries. Formula 1 cars, skyscrapers, ships, space exploration vehicles, and many of the objects we see in our daily lives are being conceived and manufactured using our Product Lifecycle Management (PLM) software.
   

  

**About The Role**
 The Deployment Success Services team, a vital part of the Cloud Application Services organization within Siemens Software, is dedicated to ensuring the successful implementation of projects for both Siemens Services and Partner teams. This role plays a crucial part in guiding our partners and internal teams through the nuances of cloud application processes and fostering a smooth transition to cloud\-based operations.
   

  

**What We're Looking For (Key Responsibilities):**
* Mentorship and Support: Guide Siemens Services and Partner teams on Cloud Application Services (CApS) processes and standard methodologies for cloud\-based working.
* Escalation Management: Serve as a primary point of contact for service and partner customer concerns, leading expectations and driving resolutions.
* Enablement and Quality Assurance: Conduct enablement sessions, review customization and configuration guardrails, and ensure alignment to standard methodologies.
* Performance Tracking: Maintain and analyze Partner and Services scorecards, driving actionable insights and improvements.
* launch Milestones: Track customer release landmarks and provide crucial mentorship to Services and Partner teams.
* Process Ownership: Actively participate in process discussions and serve as a process owner for Teamcenter\-related topics.
* Communication \& Training: Apply strong communication skills to optimally enable customer teams on processes and technical guidelines.
* Japanese Language Skill: Person should have Japanese proficiency and able to converse with customers in local Japanese language.


**Required Technical Expertise:**
* Teamcenter Foundation: Strong foundational skills in Teamcenter, including AWC, Administration, Data Modeling, BOM, and Document Management.
* Teamcenter Development: Knowledge of BMIDE, ITK, SOA development, and Work Package management.
* MCAD Integrations: Working experience with MCAD integrations is a significant advantage.
* Enterprise Integrations: Knowledge of enterprise integrations (T4S, T4O, T4EA) is an added advantage.
* Programming Skills: Strong proficiency in programming languages such as C, C\+\+, Java, JavaScript, and Python.
* Business Process Knowledge: Proven understanding of business processes in Compose Data Management, Model\-Based Systems Engineering, and Manufacturing Process Planning.


**Leadership \& Development**
* Continuous Improvement: Contribute to the development and continuous improvement of methods, standards, tools, and governance structures crucial for successful SaaS implementation.
* Team Culture: Develop a high\-performing, customer focused, and ambitious team culture.
* Knowledge Transfer: Support knowledge transfer initiatives through training courses, user guides, and mentor of Teamcenter Implementation teams.
* Stakeholder Management
* Teamwork: Collaborate optimally with multiple collaborators (Field, Partners, LCS, CSMs, OMs, ZLs, TechOps) to accelerate Teamcenter X implementation cycles.
* Critical issue Leadership: Lead sophisticated customer concerns by providing detailed analysis, structured approaches, and clear recommendations for action.
* Visibility: Ensure transparency regarding project status, risks, opportunities, and key performance indicators (critical metrics).
* Effective Communication: Ability to represent sophisticated topics in a structured and convincing manner to diverse audiences. Japanese skills are required.


**Experience:**
 8\-10 years of experience with Teamcenter Implementation, Upgrades \& Data Migration
   

  

**Why us?**
 Working at Siemens Software means flexibility \- Choosing between working at home and the office at other times is the norm here. We offer great benefits and rewards, as you'd expect from a world leader in industrial software.
   

  

 A collection of over 377,000 minds building the future, one day at a time in over 200 countries. We're dedicated to equality, and we welcome applications that reflect the diversity of the communities we Work in. All employment decisions at Siemens are based on qualifications, merit, and business need. Bring your curiosity and creativity and help us shape tomorrow!
   

  

 Siemens Software. Transform the Everyday
   

  

 \#SWSaaS

 implementations

The Company is developing infrastructure to introduce newer and smarter technologies, making both retail and enterprise customers future ready with innovative offerings, conveniently accessible through an ecosystem of digital channels as well as extensive on\-ground presence. We're proud to be an equal opportunity employer. At VIL, we know that diversity makes us stronger. Consequently, our recruiting efforts are directed towards attracting and retaining best and brightest talents. Our endeavour is to be First Choice for prospective employees.
  
  

VIL ensures equal employment opportunity without discrimination or harassment based on race, colour, religion, creed, age, sex, sex stereotype, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, citizenship, disability, marital and civil partnership/union status, pregnancy, veteran or military service status, genetic information, or any other characteristic protected by law.

b843d662.description:
**Description and Requirements**
**"At BMC trust is not just a word \- it's a way of life!"** 
**Hybrid**
 Description and Requirements
   

  

 BMC empowers nearly 80% of the Forbes Global 100 to accelerate business value, faster than humanly possible. Our industry\-leading portfolio unlocks human and machine potential to drive business growth, innovation, and sustainable success. BMC does this in a simple and optimized way by connecting people, systems, and data that power the world’s largest organizations so they can seize a competitive advantage.
   

  

 BMC empowers nearly 80% of the Forbes Global 100 to accelerate business value, faster than humanly possible. Our industry\-leading portfolio unlocks human and machine potential to drive business growth, innovation, and sustainable success. BMC does this in a simple and optimized way by connecting people, systems, and data that power the world’s largest organizations so they can seize a competitive advantage.
   

  

 The Sales Innovation, Growth and Market Acceleration (SIGMA) group partners with the Sales organization to deliver impactful customer experiences by combining in\-depth knowledge of BMC solutions with a deep understanding of the customer’s business. By leveraging their technical expertise, value\-based selling techniques, and Engagement Excellence deliverables, Presales Engineers helps the customers discover and realize the value that BMC provides to their organizations.
   

  

 The Sales Innovation, Growth and Market Acceleration (SIGMA) group partners with the Sales organization to deliver impactful customer experiences by combining in\-depth knowledge of BMC solutions with a deep understanding of the customer’s business. By leveraging their technical expertise, value\-based selling techniques, and Engagement Excellence deliverables, Presales Engineers helps the customers discover and realize the value that BMC provides to their organizations.
   

  

 Join us as a Solution Engineer on our DBA Presales team! As a Solution Engineer, you will be working directly with Sales and Presales organizations in order to create strategy, timelines and deliverables to align customers initiatives to BMC's solutions.
   

  

 Here is how, through this exciting role, you will contribute to BMC's and your own success:
   

  

* Through a consultative approach, partner with sales teams to interpret often complex customer needs and develop innovative solutions delivering both business and technical value.
* Simplify the communication of both technical and business content to a varied audience (technical and non\-technical customers).

* Challenge oneself and be the innovator when it comes to solving everyday problems.

 To ensure you’re set up for success, you will bring the following skillset and experience:
   

  

* You can embrace, live and breathe our BMC values every day!

* BMC Software product knowledge


 CA\-DNP
   

  

**Our commitment to you!**
 BMC’s culture is built around its people. We have 6000\+ brilliant minds working together across the globe. You won’t be known just by your employee number, but for your true authentic self. BMC lets you be YOU!
   

  

 If after reading the above, You’re unsure if you meet the qualifications of this role but are deeply excited about BMC and this team, we still encourage you to apply! We want to attract talents from diverse backgrounds and experience to ensure we face the world together with the best ideas!
   

  

 BMC is committed to equal opportunity employment regardless of race, age, sex, creed, color, religion, citizenship status, sexual orientation, gender, gender expression, gender identity, national origin, disability, marital status, pregnancy, disabled veteran or status as a protected veteran. If you need a reasonable accommodation for any part of the application and hiring process, visit the accommodation request page.
   

  

 BMC Software maintains a strict policy of not requesting any form of payment in exchange for employment opportunities, upholding a fair and ethical hiring process.
   

  

 At BMC we believe in pay transparency and have set the midpoint of the salary band for this role at 3,398,800 INR. Actual salaries depend on a wide range of factors that are considered in making compensation decisions, including but not limited to skill sets; experience and training, licensure, and certifications; and other business and organizational needs.
   

  

 The salary listed is just one component of BMC's employee compensation package. Other rewards may include a variable plan and country specific benefits.
   

  

 We are committed to ensuring that our employees are paid fairly and equitably, and that we are transparent about our compensation practices.

**About Our Company**


Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise Financial Inc., a US financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and diversified financial services leader with more than $1\.5 trillion in assets under management, administration and advisement as of year\-end 2024\. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection.


Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions, and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So, if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong, ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

**Job Description**


We are seeking a highly experienced (15\+ years) and strategic leader with deep expertise in the Asset Management domain, particularly in Performance Analytics and Attribution, combined with strong capabilities in solution engineering, data engineering, modern data platforms, and AI\-led transformation.
This role will act as the primary liaison between Business and Technology, driving solution design, enabling data\-driven decision\-making, and leading the transformation of the analytics ecosystem through AI, automation, and advanced data platforms.

3\. Business–Technology Liaison

* Translate complex business requirements into clear technical solutions and vice versa.
* Communicate effectively with senior stakeholders, including executives and leadership teams.
* Drive alignment across cross\-functional teams and ensure successful delivery outcomes.

**Required Qualifications**

def90fc4.title: Senior Solutions Architect, Global SI (India)
def90fc4.description:
GitLab is the intelligent orchestration platform for DevSecOps. GitLab enables organizations to increase developer productivity, improve operational efficiency, reduce security and compliance risk, and accelerate digital transformation. More than 50 million registered users and more than 50% of the Fortune 100\* trust GitLab to ship better, more secure software faster.
   

  

 The same principles built into our products are reflected in how our team works: we embrace AI as a core productivity multiplier, with all team members expected to incorporate AI into their daily workflows to drive efficiency, innovation, and impact. GitLab is where careers accelerate, innovation flourishes, and every voice is valued. Our high\-performance culture is driven by our values and continuous knowledge exchange, enabling our team members to reach their full potential while collaborating with industry leaders to solve complex problems. Co\-create the future with us as we build technology that transforms how the world develops software.
   

  

* Fortune 500® is a registered trademark of Fortune Media IP Limited, used under license. Claim based on GitLab data. Fortune 100 refers to the top 20% ranked companies in the 2025 Fortune 500 list, published in June 2025\. Fortune and Fortune Media IP Limited are not affiliated with, and do not endorse products or services of GitLab.


 Overview of the Role
   

  

 As an Ecosystem Solutions Architect, you'll be a trusted advisor to GitLab's partners, helping them understand how GitLab's DevSecOps platform can power differentiated, services\-led solutions and generate repeatable, partner\-sourced revenue. You'll support the Ecosystem Sales Managers, whose role is to work with field account teams to achieve their revenue goals by leveraging partners to scale the quantity, value, and strategic relevance of deals.
   

  

 Like all GitLab Solutions Architects, you are a trusted technical advisor who drives and manages the technology evaluation and validation stages, speaks about technology in industry\-standard terms rather than GitLab\-specific language, and creates reusable technical assets that scale across the region. The differentiator in this seat is the GSI lens: you build with and through the integrator, not only for an end customer.
   

  

 What you'll do
   

  

* Collaborate with Ecosystem Sales Managers and partner sales leaders to shape and execute Partner Activation Plans that drive partner\-sourced pipeline and GitLab adoption.
* Own the technical aspects of partner activation, including building and delivering demos, reference architectures, and workshops that support contribution, commitment, and capability activation.
* Serve as the Directly Responsible Individual on partner technical activation plans, ensuring technical risks and gaps are identified, addressed, and aligned to mutual GitLab, partner, and customer outcomes.
* Build and maintain strong relationships with technical and business stakeholders at partners so they progress from awareness to actively leading high\-value activities like deal registrations and solution development.
* Act as the partner advocate to internal teams by sharing field feedback and insights with Product, Engineering, Sales, Marketing, and Partner Enablement to influence roadmap and programs.


 Must Haves
   

  

* India\-based and authorized to work in India (Bangalore, Mumbai, or Delhi).
* Senior\-level technical pre\-sales / Solutions Architect / sales engineering experience; able to guide stakeholders through solution design and evaluation.
* Proficiency across the end\-to\-end software development lifecycle, modern DevSecOps practices, and CI/CD workflows; hands\-on experience with GitLab or a comparable source\-control / CI\-CD / DevSecOps platform, with the ability to map platform capabilities to customer use cases.
* Demonstrated experience working with or leadership roles inside India\-based GSIs — partner\-facing or delivery/practice side. This is the line that makes it a GSI hire, not a generic SA.
* Channel / cloud / partner\-ecosystem fluency: understands partner\-sourced motion, deal registration, co\-sell, and services\-led GTM — not a direct\-sales\-only background.
* Communicates credibly from practitioner to executive; can own a technical activation plan as the DRI.
* Embraces AI as a core productivity multiplier and incorporates it into daily workflow.


 Nice To Haves
   

  

* An existing network inside one or more of the named GSIs. \- not merely as a line\-worker, though
* Experience standing up partner delivery practices, enablement tracks, or certification programs.
* Cloud\-marketplace / hyperscaler co\-sell familiarity (AWS or GCP) — a plus, not a requirement.
* Depth in GitLab, AI development, Kubernetes, infrastructure\-as\-code, or application security (SAST/DAST).
* Coverage value beyond India proper (APAC GSI delivery hubs).


 How GitLab will support you
   

  

* Benefits to support your health, finances, and well\-being
* Flexible Paid Time Off
* Team Member Resource Groups
* Equity Compensation \& Employee Stock Purchase Plan
* Growth and Development Fund
* Parental leave
* Home office support


 Hiring process
   

  

 Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from underrepresented groups are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.
   

  

**How GitLab Supports Full\-Time Employees**
* Benefits to support your health, finances, and well\-being
* Flexible Paid Time Off
* Team Member Resource Groups
* Equity Compensation \& Employee Stock Purchase Plan
* Growth and Development Fund
* Parental Leave


 Please note that we welcome interest from candidates with varying levels of experience; many successful candidates do not meet every single requirement. Additionally, studies have shown that people from underrepresented groups are less likely to apply to a job unless they meet every single qualification. If you're excited about this role, please apply and allow our recruiters to assess your application.
   

  

**Country Hiring Guidelines:** 
 GitLab hires new team members in countries around the world. All of our roles are remote, however some roles may carry specific location\-based eligibility requirements. Our Talent Acquisition team can help answer any questions about location after starting the recruiting process.
   

  

**Privacy Policy:** 
 Please review our Recruitment Privacy Policy. Your privacy is important to us.
   

  

 GitLab is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. GitLab’s policies and practices relating to recruitment, employment, career development and advancement, promotion, and retirement are based solely on merit, regardless of race, color, religion, ancestry, sex (including pregnancy, lactation, sexual orientation, gender identity, or gender expression), national origin, age, citizenship, marital status, mental or physical disability, genetic information (including family medical history), discharge status from the military, protected veteran status (which includes disabled veterans, recently separated veterans, active duty wartime or campaign badge veterans, and Armed Forces service medal veterans), or any other basis protected by law. GitLab will not tolerate discrimination or harassment based on any of these characteristics. See also GitLab’s EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know during the recruiting process.

06e9b8a9.title: ITSE Solution Engineer
06e9b8a9.description:
You may know McCormick as a leader in herbs, spices, seasonings, and condiments – and we’re only getting started. At McCormick, we’re always looking for new people to bring their unique flavor to our team.
   

  

 McCormick employees – all 14,000 of us across the world – are what makes this company a great place to work.
   

  

 We are hiring immediately for a ITSE Solution Engineer
   

  

**What We Bring To The Table**
 The best people deserve the best rewards. In addition to the benefits you’d expect from a global leader (health insurance, paid time off, etc.) we also offer:
   

  

* Competitive compensation
* Career growth opportunities
* Flexibility and Support for Diverse Life Stages and Choices
* Wellbeing programs including Physical and Mental wellness


**Primary Purpose**
 We are seeking a highly skilled ServiceNow ITSM Solution Engineer to serve as a critical bridge between business needs and technical implementation. In this role, you will partner closely with stakeholders, product teams, and service organizations to understand complex business challenges and translate them into scalable, cost\-effective ServiceNow solutions. This position plays a key role in shaping solution design, ensuring alignment with ITSM product strategies, and delivering measurable value through a customer\-centric approach.
   

  

 The ideal candidate brings a strong blend of consulting mindset, technical expertise, and business acumen—capable of gathering and prioritizing requirements, architecting tailored solutions, and producing clear, actionable design documentation. You will be responsible for guiding solution delivery from concept through implementation, ensuring alignment with enterprise architecture, ITIL best practices, and platform capabilities.
   

  

 As a trusted advisor, the ServiceNow Solution Engineer will collaborate across cross\-functional teams to drive successful project outcomes, optimize IT service workflows, and enable digital transformation. This role requires the ability to communicate complex technical concepts to non\-technical stakeholders, while maintaining a focus on delivering intuitive, high\-quality user experiences that enhance operational efficiency and long\-term platform scalability.
   

  

**Primary Duties**
 (E.g., those duties that are considered essential functions of the job)
   

  

**Key Responsibilities \& Functions**
* Requirements Engineering: Actively listening to customers to uncover, analyze, and document technical needs and pain points.
* Solution Design: Creating customized technical blueprints, architectures, and integration plans.
* Technical Consulting: Evaluating feasibility, researching best practices, and proposing cost\-effective solutions.
* Product Demonstration/POC: Developing proof\-of\-concept models to visualize value and reduce risk for buyers.
* Documentation: Creating detailed technical specifications, proposals, and project documentation.
* Communicate with internal and external stakeholders in an open and timely manner, providing all needed information and support.
* Demonstrations \& Proof of Concepts (POCs) to Minimum Viable Product (MVP): Tailoring product demos and developing POCs to demonstrate how the solution solves the client's specific problems.
* Prepares and presents comprehensive technical and administrative solutions to interpret requirements, identify alternatives, and recommendations\-based experience and other findings.
* Product Feedback Loop: Working with internal product and engineering teams to relay client requirements and influence product improvements.
* Performs other related duties as assigned.


 This position will collaborate with multiple internal teams to design integrations with interfacing processes, enabling automated capabilities with procurement, finance, and third parties.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
**%**
 1
   

  

 Convert business requirements into technical solutions—covering data models, workflows, integrations, and security.
   

  

 20
   

  

 2
   

  

 Ensure platform scalability, resilience, and compliance with security and regulatory requirements.
   

  

 20
   

  

 3
   

  

 Design and develop and engineer robust ServiceNow architectures aligned with business objectives and IT strategies while adhering to the product line model and SAFe Agile controls/process.
   

  

 20
   

  

 4
   

  

 Communication with peers and upper management, as appropriate, relative to issues, problems, and general status
   

  

 20
   

  

 5
   

  

 Leverage insights to advise on actionable areas for improvement or other actions to ensure operational value is maintained
   

  

 20
   

  

**Additional/Secondary Responsibilities**
* Contributing to the development and refinement of the ITSM product line roadmap, management policies and schedules as needed for future enhancements.
* Engaging with internal and external resources to ensure clarification, changes, resolution, are addressed.
* Resolve stakeholder related issues and escalate to manager or Director of Strategy and Value Optimization as appropriate.


**Required Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in IT or business equivalent
* Technical Expertise: Strong background in software, hardware, or systems architecture.


 Must have worked in similar environments within the last two years
   

  

* ITIL Foundation
* ITSM Foundation
* ServiceNow certifications CTA, CSA; other
* 8\+ years of experience supporting development and management of IT services relative to similar roles.
* Demonstrated capabilities with ITSM, ITIL and SAFeAgile factory models.
* Demonstrated success in large scale capability development and deployment.
* Working knowledge of ITIL and ITSM principles
* Understanding of SAFe Agile methodologies and practices, specifically within ServiceNow SPM (Service Portfolio Management) in planning and execution.
* Ability to problem solve issues to resolution
* Strong attention to detail, accuracy and processes
* Highly flexible and adaptable to change
* Proficient in ITSM Foundation and experience with ServiceNow ITOM, ITSM, CMDB, KB etc.
* Microsoft Office and other productivity tools
* Global/international experience or exposure a plus
* Experience working with people and teams across various functions and regions.
* Demonstrated ability to create innovative solutions and think outside the box to solve complex and analytical problems.
* Demonstrated verbal, written and interpersonal communication skills
* Highly flexible and adaptable to change


 McCormick \& Company is an equal opportunity/affirmative action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to sex, gender identity, sexual orientation, race, color, religion, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, age, or any other characteristic protected by law. As a general policy, McCormick does not offer employment visa sponsorships upon hire or in the future.

9b45722e.title: Technical Architect
9b45722e.description:
**About Our Company**


Ameriprise India LLP has been providing client based financial solutions to help clients plan and achieve their financial objectives for 20 years. We are part of Ameriprise Financial Inc., a US financial planning company headquartered in Minneapolis with a global presence and diversified financial services leader with more than $1\.5 trillion in assets under management, administration and advisement as of year\-end 2024\. The firm’s focus areas include Asset Management and Advice, Retirement Planning and Insurance Protection.


Be part of an inclusive, collaborative culture that rewards you for your contributions, and work with other talented individuals who share your passion for doing great work. You’ll also have plenty of opportunities to make your mark at the office and a difference in your community. So, if you're talented, driven and want to work for a strong, ethical company that cares, take the next step and create a career at Ameriprise India LLP.

**Job Description**


We are seeking a skilled AWS Cloud DevOps Hands\-on Architect to design, implement, and manage scalable cloud infrastructure and CI/CD pipelines. The role requires strong expertise in AWS, automation, and DevOps practices, along with working knowledge of networking and security.**Key Responsibilities**

**???? CI/CD \& Automation**

* Design and manage CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, GitHub, Harness

**???? Security**

* Manage security groups and access controls

* Depth of experience in the architecture, design, implementation and support of complex enterprise solutions.
* Exposure to multiple, diverse technical configurations, technologies and process improvements.
