b3aa64d5.title: CLOUD MACHINE LEARNING ENGINEER (AWS)
b3aa64d5.description:
**Who we are**
--------------



VOIS (Vodafone Intelligent Solutions) is a strategic arm of Vodafone Group Plc, creating value for customers by delivering intelligent solutions through Talent, Technology \& Transformation.
  

As the largest shared services organisation in the global telco industry with 30,000 FTE, our portfolio of next\-generation solutions and services are designed in partnership with customers across Vodafone Group, local markets, and partner markets to simplify and drive growth. With our strategic partner Accenture, we work alongside our Vodafone customers, other Telco and tech companies to drive transformation, meet the challenges of our industry and ensure we stay relevant and resilient. This partnership is a unique, industry\-first model which brings together the best of in\-house and 3rd party capability.
  

We work with customers across 28 countries from 10 VOIS locations: Albania, Egypt, Hungary, India, Romania, Spain, Turkey, UK, Germany, Ireland, and with a network of teams in Czech Republic, Italy, Greece, and Portugal.
  

\#VOIS \#BeUnrivalled \#CreateTheFuture

**About this Role**
-------------------



We are seeking a Cloud ML Engineer (AWS) within Data \& Analytics GSL to use ML/AI expertise alongside strong programming and software engineering skills to make machine learning models and analyses easier to use and access. The role supports local markets and group functions to obtain business value from machine learning, and focuses on designing ML systems, productionising prototypes, enabling robust data flows, and evolving Big Data capabilities through reusable assets and patterns.

**What you’ll do**
------------------


* Design and develop machine learning systems and implementation patterns.
* Automate predictive model software, including model training.
* Productionise data science prototypes and develop machine learning applications aligned to data science requirements.
* Facilitate the flow of data between ML/AI models and the organisation’s data systems.
* Enhance data pipelines to ensure data is clean, accurate, and optimised for machine learning models.
* Partner with the architecture team to evolve Big Data platform capabilities (reusable assets/patterns) and components to meet business requirements and objectives.
* Research, investigate, and evaluate new technologies and methods to improve delivery and sustainability of machine learning applications and services.
* Contribute to defining best practice for agile development of applications running on the Big Data platform.
**Who you are**
---------------


* Experience managing the development lifecycle for agile software development projects (Kanban or Scrum exposure).
* Robust data modelling and data architecture skills.
* Knowledge of Big Data frameworks such as Hadoop, Spark, Hive, Yarn, and Airflow.
* Experience with distributed ML frameworks (for example H2O and/or TensorFlow) and various ML libraries.
* Proven experience creating and deploying end\-to\-end ML pipelines in production, including MLOps.
* Programming experience in **Java** and **Python**.
* Experience with containerisation (Docker/Kubernetes) or cloud alternatives is advantageous.
* **Mandatory** working experience with AWS services including: **SageMaker Pipelines, SageMaker Studio, CloudFormation, CloudTrail, SNS, EventBridge, CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeCommit**.
* Experience with other distributed technologies, NoSQL databases, and streaming technologies is desirable.
* Strong written and verbal communication, with excellent interpersonal and collaboration skills.
* Must have technical / professional qualifications:
* + 3\-year IT or IS degree or diploma (or related field) is essential; an advanced degree in Computer Science/Math/Statistics (or related discipline) is an advantage.
	+ Relevant cloud certification at professional or associate level.
	+ 3\+ years of relevant experience as an AI/ML Engineer.
	+ 3\+ years of BI or related software development experience.
**Not a perfect fit?**
----------------------



Concerned you may not meet every requirement? Vodafone is committed to creating an inclusive workplace where everyone can thrive. If you are excited about this role but your experience does not align exactly with every aspect of the job description, you are encouraged to apply. You may be the right candidate for this or another opportunity, and the recruitment team will support you in exploring where your skills fit best.

**What's in it for you**
------------------------


* Opportunities to deliver business value by enabling scalable ML capabilities for local markets and group functions.
* The chance to work on production\-grade ML systems, end\-to\-end pipelines, and MLOps practices on AWS.
* Collaboration with architecture teams to shape reusable Big Data platform assets and engineering patterns.
* Scope to explore and evaluate new technologies and methods to improve sustainability and delivery of ML applications and services.
**What skills you will learn**
------------------------------


* Strengthening best practices for productionising data science prototypes into reliable ML applications.
* Deepening hands\-on expertise in AWS\-native MLOps and pipeline automation (including SageMaker and AWS developer tools).
* Enhancing Big Data platform design skills through reusable patterns, components, and data pipeline optimisation.
* Improving cost and resource efficiency approaches across compute, network usage, and platform objectives.
**VOIS Equal Opportunity Employer Commitment**
----------------------------------------------



Vodafone recognises and celebrates the value of diversity in building a workforce that reflects the customers and communities it serves. No form of discrimination is tolerated. This includes, but is not limited to, discrimination based on race, colour, age, veteran status, gender identity, gender expression, sexual orientation, pregnancy, maternity or parental status, ethnicity, disability, religion or belief, political affiliation, trade union membership, nationality, citizenship, indigenous status, medical condition, HIV status, neurodiversity, social origin, cultural background, marital or civil partnership status, or socio\-economic background.

**Join Us**
-----------



At Vodafone, we’re working hard to build a better future. A more connected, inclusive and sustainable world. As a dynamic global community, it's our human spirit, together with technology, that empowers us to achieve this.
  

We challenge and innovate in order to connect people, businesses, and communities across the world. Delighting our customers and earning their loyalty drive us, and we experiment, learn fast and get it done, together.
  

With us, you can truly be yourself and belong, share inspiration, embrace new opportunities, thrive, and make a real difference.

Apply for Vodafone jobs only through the official Vodafone Careers website to avoid job scams and fraud.
  

\#JDEnhancedByTARA

This is how we enable sustainable mobility and help to prevent accidents caused by human error.


We’re hiring an Electrical/Electronics Engineer to design and develop our automotive products in the areas of Active Safety and User\-Experience. This position is located at TCI Bengaluru.

e11d5f6d.title: Solutions Engineer
e11d5f6d.description:
**Meet the Team**
 You will be part of an outstanding technical pre\-sales team in our Global Security Sales Organization (GSSO), responsible for driving the success of Cisco’s Security Portfolio and focusing on protecting Customer Application Environments across on\-prem and cloud platforms. Our mission is to democratize security by making it easy and effective for everyone.
   

  

**Your Impact**
**Role**
 As a key player in the team, you will have the opportunity to influence the security landscape by crafting tailored solutions that address specific customer needs. This role offers the excitement of working with cutting\-edge technology and the fulfillment of building long\-lasting relationships with customers. You will:
   

  

* Provide guidance and assist account teams in building solutions to address specific customer security needs.
* Understand business requirements and translate them into technical solutions.
* Create, present, and document technical solutions to customers, partners, and prospects.
* Lead technical consulting and upper\-level management presentations.
* Drive major account opportunities while enabling local account teams to maintain long\-term ownership.


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Minimum of 7 years of technical sales or pre\-sales experience with 4\+ years in Security specialization in Network Security and technologies including NGFW/NGIPS, Network Analytics, Content \& Cloud Security (i.e. Email, Web, Anti\-Spam, DNS security, CASB, SASE, SSE), Advanced Threat Solutions and Endpoint Security.
* Bachelor's degree in Cybersecurity, Computer Science, or a related field.
* Proven track record of successful quota achievement.
* Strong knowledge of cybersecurity concepts, technologies, and best practices.
* Industry certifications such as CISSP, CISM, or CCSP are preferred.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Excellent presentation and interpersonal skills.
* Commercial awareness and strong communication skills.
* Highly motivated self\-starter who excels without day\-to\-day management.
* Experience with Cisco security technologies and programming languages such as UNIX shell, Perl, or C.
* Willingness to travel and work from a home office.


 Why Cisco?
   

  

 At Cisco, we’re revolutionizing how data and infrastructure connect and protect organizations in the AI era – and beyond. We’ve been innovating fearlessly for 40 years to create solutions that power how humans and technology work together across the physical and digital worlds. These solutions provide customers with unparalleled security, visibility, and insights across the entire digital footprint.
   

  

 Fueled by the depth and breadth of our technology, we experiment and create meaningful solutions. Add to that our worldwide network of doers and experts, and you’ll see that the opportunities to grow and build are limitless. We work as a team, collaborating with empathy to make really big things happen on a global scale. Because our solutions are everywhere, our impact is everywhere.
   

  

 We are Cisco, and our power starts with you.

d7ac48d8.title: Product Solutions Engineer, Ads API
d7ac48d8.description:
Note: By applying to this position you will have an opportunity to share your preferred working location from the following:
 **Hyderabad, Telangana, India; Gurugram, Haryana, India** 
 .
 **Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor’s degree or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience troubleshooting technical issues for internal/external partners or customers.
* Experience in either system design or reading code (e.g., Java, C\+\+, Python).


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience resolving technical issues and managing customer support within a tech organization, using Ads or other APIs.
* Familiarity with the digital advertising ecosystem or Google Ads, with proficiency in languages like Python, Java, PHP, or JavaScript.
* Demonstrated ability to solve problems and collaborate effectively within varied, global team environments.
* Strong customer\-facing skills to clearly convey complex technical concepts to both highly technical and non\-technical audiences.
* An empathetic, customer\-first mindset with proven critical thinking to own end\-to\-end strategic solutions for advertisers and developers.


**About The Job**
 As a Technical Solutions Consultant, you will be responsible for the technical relationship of our largest advertising clients and/or product partners. You will lead cross\-functional teams in Engineering, Sales and Product Management to leverage emerging technologies for our external clients/partners. From concept design and testing to data analysis and support, you will oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's online advertising platforms and/or product partnerships.
   

  

 You will be able to balance business and partner needs with technical constraints, develop innovative, cutting edge solutions and act as a partner and consultant to those you are working with. You will also be able to build tools and automate products, oversee the technical execution and business operations of Google's partnerships, as well as develop product strategy and prioritize projects and resources.
   

  

 As a Product Support Engineer for Ads Application Programming Interface (API), you will have deep API knowledge, provide high\-quality support, and own end\-to\-end customer and developer solutioning. You will focus on managing troubleshooting tasks, using investigative and problem\-solving skills to detect and resolve issues, while advising customers on effective API implementations. You will also be a critical link between external API developers and internal stakeholders like sales and engineering, actively shaping API quality with customer feedback.
   

  

 In this role, you will understand the technical complexities of online advertising, particularly Google Ads products, and possess a passion for helping customers succeed. You will solve challenging issues, acting as a technical consultant and trusted advisor for Google Ads customers.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Deliver outstanding support across the customer journey by troubleshooting and resolving complex technical issues and escalations for advertisers, sales, agencies, partners, and third\-party developers who use Ads APIs.
* Provide expert consultation to API developers to guide effective API integration, ensure integration best practices, and lead strategic technical projects to enhance the overall developer experience.
* Develop diagnostic tools and automations on their own or in close partnership with Product and Engineering teams to streamline debugging, implement data fixes, and scale operational efficiency.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional partners including sales, product management, and engineering to deeply understand client pain points, eliminate friction, and continuously improve the end\-to\-end user experience.
* Analyze data and insights to build proactive root\-cause action plans for top customers, focusing on knowledge management, operational improvements, and product adoption.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

d1ba0308.title: Java Architect
d1ba0308.description:
**Job Description**

**About Persistent**

  

We are an AI\-led, platform\-driven Digital Engineering and Enterprise Modernization partner, combining deep technical expertise and industry experience to help our clients anticipate what’s next. Our offerings and proven solutions create a unique competitive advantage for our clients by giving them the power to see beyond and rise above. We work with many industry\-leading organizations across the world, including 20 Fortune 50 companies and 4 of the 5 top banks in both the US and India, and numerous innovators across the healthcare ecosystem.

  

Our disruptor’s mindset, commitment to client success, and agility to thrive in the dynamic environment have enabled us to sustain our growth momentum. Persistent has been recognized across top industry platforms for innovation, leadership, and inclusion. We reported $1,654\.4M FY26 revenue with 17\.4% Y\-o\-Y growth. We have delivered 24 sequential quarters of growth with $436\.0M in Q4 FY26 revenue, up 3\.2% Q\-o\-Q and 16\.2% Y\-o\-Y growth. Our 27,500\+ global team members, located in 18 countries, have been instrumental in helping the market leaders transform their industries. We have been recognized as the Fastest Growing IT Services Brand Globally in the 2026 Brand Finance IT Services 25 Report. We named a Leader in the Everest Group Private Equity (PE) Services PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026 and Software Product Engineering PEAK Matrix® Assessment 2026\.

 **About Position:**

  

We are seeking a highly experienced Architect with strong expertise in Solution Architecture, Enterprise Architecture, and Java\-based Enterprise Platforms. The ideal candidate will be responsible for defining architecture strategy, designing scalable and resilient enterprise solutions, and leading modernization initiatives across cloud\-native platforms. This role requires deep technical expertise in Java, Microservices, API\-led architectures, cloud technologies, and enterprise integration patterns while driving governance, engineering excellence, and business transformation.

* **Role: Architect**
* **Location: All Persistent Locations**
* **Experience: 15 \+yrs**
* **Job Type: Full Time Employment**

 **What You'll Do:**

  

* Application Architecture \& Design
* Strong hands\-on experience in enterprise application architecture using Java and Spring Boot
* Expertise in designing microservices\-based, API\-first, and domain\-driven architectures
* Strong understanding of React\-based frontend architecture and frontend\-backend integration patterns
* Experience in integrating, extending, and architecting solutions around Veeva Vault and enterprise platforms
* Define, implement, and enforce architecture standards, design patterns, and engineering best practices
* Integration, APIs \& Data Engineering
* Expertise in event\-driven architecture, Pub/Sub models, asynchronous processing, and real\-time systems
* Strong experience with RESTful APIs, JSON payloads, API contracts, and service orchestration
* Solid understanding of data modelling, SQL query design, and database performance optimization
* Design and govern resilient, scalable integration patterns and data flow mechanisms
* Code Quality, Performance \& Scalability
* Ensure high standards for code quality, security, scalability, performance, and maintainability
* Architect high\-performance, fault\-tolerant, and distributed systems
* Implement robust error handling, retry mechanisms, observability, logging, and monitoring frameworks
* Lead performance engineering, system optimization, and scalability initiatives.
* Cloud, Security \& Platform Strategy
* Strong experience with AWS and/or Azure cloud platforms and cloud\-native architectural patterns
* Knowledge of API security (OAuth2, JWT), identity management, and secure service communication
* Evaluate and recommend modern frameworks, cloud services, and reusable solution components
* Experience designing distributed, resilient, and scalable cloud\-based systems.

 **Expertise You'll Bring:**

  

* Architecture Governance \& Documentation
* Lead and own architecture reviews (HLD, LLD) and technical design governance
* Maintain comprehensive architecture documentation, system diagrams, and decision logs
* Define and enforce integration standards, governance frameworks, and reusable assets Key Responsibilities
* Define and own end\-to\-end solution architecture across Java, React, .NET, and Veeva Vault ecosystems
* Lead architecture discussions, design reviews.

 **Benefits:**

  

* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents

 **Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:**

  

Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.

  

* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.
* Our office is accessibility\-friendly, with ergonomic setups and assistive technologies to support employees with physical disabilities.
* If you are a person with disabilities and have specific requirements, please inform us during the application process or at any time during your employment

 **Let’s unleash your full potential at Persistent \-** **persistent.com/careers**

 ***“Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind.”***

b31ac8ac.title: Cloud Architect | Remote
b31ac8ac.description:
**Position:** 
 Solutions Architect
 



**Type:** 
 Contract
 



**Compensation:** 
 $40 \- $100/hour
 



**Location:** 
 Remote
 



**Commitment:** 
 10\-40 hrs/week
 



  





**Role Responsibilities** 



* Architect and implement scalable microservices\-based solutions on AWS to enhance system performance and reliability.
* Collaborate with engineering, DevOps, and product teams to translate business requirements into comprehensive technical blueprints.
* Design and maintain infrastructure using Docker, Kubernetes, and related tools to ensure efficient deployment and management.
* Ensure solutions meet both functional and non\-functional requirements, including reliability, security, and performance standards.
* Mentor stakeholders on cloud architecture best practices and emerging trends to foster knowledge sharing and skill development.
* Document architecture decisions and communicate complex concepts clearly to diverse audiences throughout the project lifecycle.



  





**Requirements** 



* Have strong relevant experience architecting and deploying microservices\-based applications.
* Possess deep hands\-on experience with AWS core services and infrastructure as code.
* Demonstrate mastery of Docker and cloud\-native container orchestration with Kubernetes.
* Have strong problem\-solving abilities and analytical skills to address complex challenges.
* Exhibit exceptional written and verbal communication skills to convey technical concepts effectively.
* Have a Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent relevant experience.



  





**Application Process** 



* Easy Apply on LinkedIn
* Check email for next steps
* Participate in resume evaluation \& interview stage

37dace1c.title: Enterprise Architect
37dace1c.description:
**About Position:** 




  





 We are looking for an experienced Enterprise Architect with 15\+ years of expertise in defining, governing, and implementing enterprise\-scale technology architectures. The ideal candidate will have strong experience in TOGAF, Enterprise Architecture, Architecture Design, and AI\-driven transformation initiatives. This role will be responsible for designing secure, scalable, and compliant AI and GenAI solutions, driving architecture governance, and enabling business transformation through modern enterprise platforms and intelligent systems. The candidate will work closely with business and technology stakeholders to create strategic roadmaps, establish architectural standards, and accelerate innovation across the enterprise.
 



  




* **Role: Enterprise Architect**
* **Location: Pune**
* **Experience: 15\+ Yrs**
* **Job Type: Full Time Employment**



  





**What You'll Do:** 




  




* 12 \-18\+ years overall Enterprise Architecture Role Overview The Enterprise AI Architect will define, design, and govern end\-to\-end AI and GenAI architectures for large\-scale enterprise programs.
* This role combines AI strategy, platform architecture, Responsible AI, cloud\-native design, and delivery governance, ensuring AI solutions are secure, scalable, compliant, and outcome\-driven.
* The architect will work closely with client stakeholders, product owners, data teams, and engineering leads to translate business problems into production\-ready AI/Agentic AI solutions.



  





**Expertise You'll Bring:** 




  




* AI Strategy Enterprise Architecture Define enterprise AI reference architectures covering GenAI, ML, Agentic AI, data, and integrations aligned to business outcomes.
* Translate business use cases into AI solution blueprints, roadmaps, and target\-state architectures.
* Drive AI operating model alignment governance, platforms, skills, and tooling across teams.
* GenAI Agentic AI Design Architect GenAI solutions using LLMs (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI, Anthropic, LLaMA, etc.).
* Design Agentic AI workflows integrating tools, enterprise data, APIs, and business processes.



  





**Benefits:** 




  




* Competitive salary and benefits package
* Culture focused on talent development with quarterly growth opportunities and company\-sponsored higher education and certifications
* Opportunity to work with cutting\-edge technologies
* Employee engagement initiatives such as project parties, flexible work hours, and Long Service awards
* Annual health check\-ups
* Insurance coverage: group term life, personal accident, and Mediclaim hospitalization for self, spouse, two children, and parents



  





**Values\-Driven, People\-Centric \& Inclusive Work Environment:** 




  





 Persistent is dedicated to fostering diversity and inclusion in the workplace. We invite applications from all qualified individuals, including those with disabilities, and regardless of gender or gender preference. We welcome diverse candidates from all backgrounds.
 



  




* We support hybrid work and flexible hours to fit diverse lifestyles.
* Our office is accessibility\-friendly, with ergonomic setups and assistive technologies to support employees with physical disabilities.
* If you are a person with disabilities and have specific requirements, please inform us during the application process or at any time during your employment



  





**Let's unleash your full potential at Persistent \-** 
**persistent.com/careers** 




  





***"Persistent is an Equal Opportunity Employer and prohibits discrimination and harassment of any kind."***

170972a3.title: Solutions Architect
170972a3.description:
**Description**
 AWS is hiring for Solutions Architects, who embeds directly inside India's most strategic enterprise accounts to architect production AI systems that deliver measurable business impact. The role will support complete engagement from discovery and scoping, through architecture and help build/co\-build.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* End\-to\-End Agentic AI Deployment
* Lead discovery workshops with customer CTO / engineering teams to map high\-value AI use cases across multiple industry verticals.
* Own technical scoping, solution architecture for agentic AI workloads on Amazon Bedrock and AgentCore.
* Build PoCs leveraging Amazon Bedrock, Strands Agents SDK, Amazon AgentCore
* Design and implement multi\-agent orchestrations, MCP tool servers, RAG pipelines (Knowledge Bases for Bedrock, OpenSearch Serverless, Aurora pgvector), and LLM\-as\-judge evaluation frameworks.
* Deliver IaC (AWS CDK / CloudFormation / Terraform) for repeatable, production\-grade deployment patterns that the customer can own post\-engagement.
* Regulated Industry Delivery
* Navigate India's regulatory and translate requirements into Bedrock Guardrails, Automated Reasoning Checks, and data residency configurations.
* Architect AI systems for auditability: model version pinning, prompt logging, PII redaction, inference geography (ap\-south\-1\), and compliance artifact generation.
* Deliver eval\-driven acceptance criteria: define benchmark suites, run eval loops against domain\-specific test sets, and produce launch\-evidence packages that satisfy customer risk / model governance teams.
* Customer Engineering Partnership
* Run structured discovery (jobs\-to\-be\-done, process mining, failure mode analysis) to identify AI leverage points and sequence delivery for maximum early impact.
* Build long\-term technical relationships with customer engineering leadership and proactively surface new AI deployment opportunities across the account lifecycle.
* AWS Field Signal \& Product Influence
* Codify repeatable deployment patterns into AWS\-wide playbooks, reference architectures, and GitHub samples that scale insights across hundreds of customers.
* Feed structured field signal (model gaps, tooling friction, feature requests, eval results) to AWS Engineering teams
* Collaborate with AWS SA leadership, Specialists, Partner SA, and ISV teams to deliver joint engagements and avoid duplicating effort.
* Represent AWS AI at customer EBCs, industry conferences, and CXO briefings — you are the technical face of AWS's GenAI capability in the field.


**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of working with or evaluating AI systems experience
* Experience working directly in customer implementations
* Experience in a technical position
* 
* Production experience with LLMs: advanced prompt engineering, multi\-agent architectures, RAG pipeline design, evaluation frameworks, and inference optimization.
* 
* Strong programming skills in Python; proficiency in at least one of TypeScript/Java/Golang. Comfortable writing production\-grade code, not just notebooks.
* 
* Hands\-on experience with AWS AI/ML services: Amazon Bedrock (Knowledge Bases, Guardrails, Model Customization), SageMaker, and the broader AWS stack (Lambda, ECS/EKS, RDS/Aurora, OpenSearch, Step Functions).
* 
* Experience designing distributed systems at enterprise scale: API design, async patterns, event\-driven architectures, security (IAM, VPC, KMS), and observability (CloudWatch, X\-Ray, OTEL).
* 
* Demonstrated ability to embed with enterprise customer teams and deliver working prototypes under ambiguity, time pressure, and evolving requirements.
* 
* Strong communication skills: able to run technical discovery with engineering teams and translate tradeoffs into decisions for CTO/CIO audiences.
* 
* You identify the right next action without waiting for direction, and you drive clarity rather than seeking it.


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Experience working within software development or Internet\-related industries
* Experience migrating or transforming legacy customer solutions to the cloud
* Experience working with AWS technologies from a dev/ops perspective


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- AWS India \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10456171

a56648f4.title: Cloud Network Architect
a56648f4.description:
**Network Architect with Implementation** 




  





**Years of Experience:** 
 12\+ Years
 



  





**Roles \& Responsibilities:** 



* Network Architect to fulfil business requirements, strong experience in creating detailed network architecture designs (HLD \& LLD), both OnPrem and Cloud (Azure or AWS).
* Understand an existing customer network landscape, analyze the gaps and improvements, suggest improvements with the help of latest tools and technologies
* Design network solutions that are scalable, secure, and reliable and can meet the current and future needs of the organization. Assess and suggest hardware and software solutions to support network infrastructure.
* Interact with the Global customers directly, Lead the implementation of network solutions, providing seamless integration with existing systems. Work together with IT teams to set up and install network equipment and software.
* Conduct complete testing to identify and resolve potential issues before deployment. Execute and enforce security measures to protect the organization's network infrastructure.
* Ensure compliance with industry standards and regulations related to network security. Monitor and analyze network performance, identifying and addressing bottlenecks or areas for improvement. Implement optimization strategies to enhance network efficiency and reliability.
* Establishing strong relationships with potential customers is a key aspect of presales. This involves effective communication, building trust, and ensuring that the proposed solutions align with the customer's goals.
* Work closely with cross\-functional teams, sales teams, internal stakeholders including system administrators, developers, and business stakeholders to ensure a smooth transition from lead generation to sales. Provide technical expertise and guidance to support teams during troubleshooting and issue resolution.
* Stay ahead of industry trends and emerging technologies to recommend innovative solutions. Evaluate and implement new technologies that can enhance the organization's network capabilities.
* Provide networking products /solutions demonstration and Proof\-of\-concept (PoC). \- Create a trusted technical advisor relationship with customers and internal teams. \- Lead the meetings and present the network infrastructure solution design to prospective customers.
* The presales team is responsible for reviewing the requirements, preparing responses, and demonstrating how their solution meets the criteria outlined in the RFP
* Design, implement, and manage cloud networking solutions at on\-premises and Microsoft Azure environments, ensuring scalability, security, and high availability.
* Architect and implement networking solutions using Azure networking services such as Virtual Networks (VNets), Load Balancers, VPN Gateway, ExpressRoute, Application Gateway, and Network Security Groups (NSGs).
* Collaborate with stakeholders, including developers, security teams, and DevOps, to create solutions that meet business and technical requirements.
* Ensure cloud networking solutions are designed for resilience, redundancy, and high availability while maintaining cost efficiency.
* Lead the design and implementation of secure network infrastructures, following best practices for security, compliance, and governance.
* Troubleshoot and optimize network performance within the Azure cloud environment, identifying and addressing potential bottlenecks and issues.
* Participate in cloud migration projects, advising on network\-related best practices.
* Develop and maintain documentation for network architecture, configurations, and troubleshooting guides.



  





**Qualifications:** 



* Bachelor’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.
* Proven experience as a Network Solutions Architect or a similar role. In\-depth knowledge of networking protocols, hardware, and software. Strong understanding of security principles and best practices.
* Experience with cloud networking, cloud migrations (preferably Azure), network implementations, enhancements and virtualization technologies.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
* Products: Cisco core Routing and Switching, Load Balancers, IDS/IPS, Firewalls (PaloAlto, FortiGate, Cisco ASA, Juniper, Azure, AWS), SD\-WAN.
* Certifications: CCNP, JNCIP, Azure Networking or equivalent are desirable
* 7\+ years of experience in network architecture designing, with at least 3\+ years focused on Azure cloud environments.
* In\-depth experience with Azure networking components including VNets, VPN Gateway, ExpressRoute, Load Balancers, NSGs, Application Gateway, and Firewall configurations.
* Strong understanding of cloud security best practices, including identity and access management (IAM), network security, and encryption protocols in the Azure environment.
* Experience with network automation tools and scripting (e.g., PowerShell, ARM templates, Azure CLI).
* Hands\-on experience with hybrid cloud architectures, connectivity (VPN, ExpressRoute), and on premises/cloud integrations.
* Familiarity with networking protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/S, BGP, etc.).
* Strong problem\-solving skills with the ability to troubleshoot complex network issues.
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work with diverse teams and stakeholders.
* Azure certifications, such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Network Engineer Associate or Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert, are highly desirable.

c4a41438.title: Senior Cloud Security Engineer
c4a41438.description:
**Requirements** 



* 3\-5 years of dedicated experience in cloud security engineering, demonstrating a proven ability for independent ownership of complex engagements and deliverables.
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related technical field (B.Tech/M.Tech or BCA/MCA).
* Demonstrable expertise in Cloud Threat Detection and Response methodologies, including practical experience with incident investigation and remediation in cloud\-native environments.
* Strong hands\-on experience with Kubernetes and OpenShift, including deep knowledge of securing containerized applications, orchestration, and service mesh architectures.
* Proficiency in at least one major cloud platform (AWS, Azure, or GCP) with a solid understanding of its security services and architecture.
* Experience with scripting or automation for security tasks (e.g., Python, PowerShell, Go, Terraform) to streamline operations and enforce security policies.



  





**Nice\-to\-Have** 



* Direct experience with specific cloud\-managed Kubernetes services such as GCP Kubernetes Engine (GKE), Amazon Elastic Kubernetes Service (EKS), or Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).
* Advanced experience implementing and managing cloud workload protection (CWPP) and cloud threat detection solutions, leveraging AI\-augmented capabilities.
* Familiarity with enterprise vulnerability management and scanning tools like Tenable (Nessus) or Wiz, specifically for cloud asset discovery and assessment.
* Relevant security certifications such as CCSP, CCSK, AWS Certified Security \- Specialty, Azure Security Engineer Associate, or GCP Professional Cloud Security Engineer.
* Experience with digital forensics and incident response (DFIR) tools and techniques in cloud environments (e.g., OpenText EnCase, Magnet Forensics).



  






 🔔

e624fdd6.title: Perceptive Content Support – Managed Services (AMS)
e624fdd6.description:
Hello All,
 



  





 Greetings from
 **ZettaMine!!!** 




  





**Perceptive Content Support –** 
 Managed Services (AMS)
 



**Location:** 
 PAN India
 



**Experience:** 
 7\+ Years
 



**Notice Period:** 
 Immediate Joiners
 



  





**Detailed Job Description** 




**Role Objective** 




 Provide reliable, secure, and cost\-effective managed services for the Perceptive Content platform by transitioning from a single\-person dependency model to a shared AMS delivery model. The role ensures platform stability, regulatory compliance, and consistent service quality through standardized operations, proactive maintenance, and controlled change management.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Administer the Perceptive Content platform to ensure high availability, stability, and performance.
* Perform day\-to\-day platform operations in alignment with defined SLAs and AMS governance processes.
* Proactively monitor system health and resolve operational issues before they impact business users.
* Manage user and group access at the application layer, ensuring role\-based access control and segregation of duties.
* Enforce security policies and compliance requirements related to user provisioning, de\-provisioning, and access reviews.
* Support audits by providing access reports and ensuring traceability of changes.
* Workflows
* Queues
* Drawers
* Views
* iScripts
* Retention Policies
* Ensure configurations align with business processes, compliance guidelines, and document lifecycle requirements.
* Support minor enhancements and configuration changes through a controlled change management process.
* Patch impact analysis
* Scheduling and deployment support
* Post\-patch validation and rollback planning
* Conduct periodic health checks to assess system performance, storage usage, and configuration integrity.
* Work with infrastructure and vendor teams to resolve environment\-related issues.
* Support the transition from a single\-person dependency model to a scalable shared AMS support model.
* Develop and maintain operational documentation, runbooks, and standard operating procedures (SOPs).
* Ensure knowledge is distributed across the AMS team to reduce key\-person risk and improve operational resilience.
* Adhere to defined SLAs, incident management, problem management, and change management processes.
* Participate in service reviews, audits, and governance meetings.
* Continuously identify opportunities to improve service efficiency, platform stability, and cost optimization.



**Required Experience \& Skills** 



* 7\+ years of experience in Perceptive Content Administration \& Support.
* Strong understanding of workflow management, retention policies, and document lifecycle management.
* Experience in user access management, security controls, and audit support.
* Hands\-on experience with patch management, health checks, and environment support.
* Familiarity with AMS delivery models, SLA management, and ITIL\-based support processes.
* Excellent documentation, communication, and stakeholder management skills.



  





 If you are interested kindly share your updated CV to
 **aruna.m@zettamine.com** 
 or WhatsApp to
 **6302404863\.** 




  





**Thanks \& Regards,** 




**Aruna.M**

ba226963.title: Delivery Manager
ba226963.description:
**About Unified** 




 For over 15 years, Unified Infotech has been at the forefront of technology consulting and software
 



 development. We specialize in distributed custom software, web, mobile, software, data \& user
 



 experience based solutions/services. We cater to a diverse clientele, including emerging startups, MSMEs,
 



 and established enterprises. We help businesses engineer groundbreaking digital products that tackle
 



 complex challenges and redefine the digital landscape.
 



 At Unified, a job isn’t just a job — it’s an ongoing pursuit of excellence. We exist to build and create, to
 



 understand and consult, to imagine and be creative, to reformulate UX, to invent and redefine, to code for
 



 performance, to collaborate and communicate.
 



  





**The Opportunity** 




 Are you a visionary in the Services delivery world with a flair for driving growth in the software
 



 development services sector? We're seeking a forward\-looking leader with sound business acumen,
 



 departmental leadership experience, strong technical aptitude, and natural group project management
 



 instincts to lead our Engineering team into both charted and uncharted territories of growth and
 



 recognition. This is an opportunity for a dynamic leader to inspire and lead our software development, risk
 



 management \& project management strategies, making a tangible impact on our brand's legacy. Your
 



 mission will be to orchestrate coordinated dev team efforts while nurturing a positive customer journey
 



 that doesn't just deliver results but also creates a lasting impact and long term association. You'll be
 



 among the architects of our business growth, blending creativity with vision, focus, strategy, and analytics
 



 to propel our brand into new horizons while being innovative and ROI\-driven. You'll work closely with our
 



 leaders, marketing team, Engineering team, Sales team, operations team, support teams, and external
 



 partners.
 



  





**Your Mission, Your Impact** 




 The candidate will oversee all facets of service delivery operations. This role involves managing budgeting,
 



 profit and loss reporting, capacity planning, forecasting, fluctuations in manpower requirements,
 



 providing project management leadership, upholding technology best practices, and ensuring continuous
 



 improvement initiatives to enhance system availability, performance, and reliability.
 



 ➔ Service Delivery Leadership: Oversee the concurrent end\-to\-end delivery of multiple projects
 



 (with multiple engagement models). Coordinate with cross\-functional teams to ensure projects
 



 are delivered on time, within scope, and within budget. Monitor project progress, identify risks,
 



 and implement mitigation strategies as needed. Get an in\-depth understanding of the entire
 



 delivery cycle from project sales handover and kickoff through discovery and development \+ QA to
 



 Deployment and Support with the customer success team.
 



 ➔ Team Mobilization and Management: Build and lead a high\- caliber team of engineers,
 



 designers, and professionals to surpass operational targets. Mentor and develop your team,
 



 fostering an environment of excellence and continuous learning.
 



  





**Job Description** 




 ➔ Client Pulse \& Engagement: Collaborate with Customer Success Managers to proactively engage
 



 clients, ensuring high satisfaction, addressing concerns/ escalations and identifying opportunities
 



 for additional business. Act as a trusted advisor to key clients, providing strategic guidance and
 



 insights to help them achieve their business goals.
 



 ➔ Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs) \& PM Process Management: Develop and implement
 



 SOPs/ Processes/ Guidelines/ Formats/ Checklists/ Templates across departments to streamline
 



 processes, improve efficiency, and ensure consistency in service delivery that aligns with our
 



 business objectives. Build on top of our existing process database and QMS. Work closely with
 



 Team Heads and Subject Matter Experts to document existing processes and identify areas for
 



 improvement. Champion adoption of best practices, tools, and techniques to enhance project
 



 delivery effectiveness and efficiency.
 



 ➔ Resource Management \& Optimization: Effectively allocate resources on projects to ensure
 



 optimal project staffing and utilization. Effectively predict and manage team sizes by skill groups,
 



 bench team size, and manpower budgets to fuel pipeline growth and strategic resource allocation.
 



 Use data\-driven insights to predict and enhance our ROI. Work closely with resource managers to
 



 identify resource requirements and address resource constraints. Mentor and coach project
 



 management team members to enhance their skills and capabilities.
 



 ➔ Financial Management: Monitor project financials, including budget, expenses, and revenue, to
 



 ensure projects are delivered within budget and achieve optimal profitability targets. Identify
 



 opportunities to optimize project profitability and drive cost\-saving initiatives rationally.
 



 ➔ Stakeholder Communication: Facilitate effective communication and collaboration among
 



 relevant internal and external project stakeholders, including clients, project teams, senior
 



 management, and Leadership. Organize and lead project status meetings, steering committee
 



 meetings, escalation meetings, retrospectives, and other relevant forums to ensure forward
 



 momentum, alignment, and transparency.
 



 ➔ Strategic Competitive Lookout: Gain a comprehensive understanding of the competitive
 



 landscape and industry best practices/ trends/SOPs to refine delivery strategies. Utilize advanced
 



 analytical tools and techniques to monitor engineering operations and adjust tactics accordingly.
 



 ➔ Risk Management: Identify and assess project risks and develop tangible risk
 



 mitigation/contingency strategies to minimize potential impacts on project delivery. Regularly
 



 review and communicate risk status to relevant internal and external stakeholders.
 



  





**We're Searching for Someone who is** 




 ➔ An Experienced Leader: Boasting at least 10 years in software service delivery within the IT
 



 industry, with at least 3 years in a leadership role managing processes, projects, and teams. Your
 



 expertise should encompass overseeing comprehensive delivery operations.
 



 ➔ An Achiever of Targets: A track record that showcases your ability to consistently meet and
 



 exceed service delivery goals by effectively managing resources and timelines. You should have
 



 demonstrated success in executing complex projects within stipulated timelines and budgets and
 



 scaling customer accounts.
 



 ➔ A Delivery Subject Matter Expert: Profound knowledge of software development activities and
 



 project management principles, including tailored Agile/hybrid methodologies, capacity planning,
 



 bench strength, and resource allocation. You are expected to have a thorough understanding of
 



  





**Job Description** 




 workflow dynamics and be skilled in crafting and implementing SOPs, Protocols, and Process
 



 improvement initiatives.
 



 ➔ Data Driven Analytical Strategist: Proficient in adopting a data\-centric approach to define and
 



 manage KPIs, project metrics, and balanced scorecards. Your expertise should extend to utilizing
 



 data analysis to refine service execution, optimize training, and manage resources efficiently.
 



 ➔ Communicator \& Relationship Expert: Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills are
 



 crucial for building, maintaining, and expanding client relationships. Your ability to establish trust
 



 and rapport with both clients and internal teams is essential. Along with skills, capable of engaging
 



 with internal cross\-functional teams, senior executives, and other stakeholders through clear and
 



 compelling presentations.
 



 ➔ Technological Proficiency: Solid understanding of IT technologies, frameworks, systems, and
 



 architectures essential for effective service delivery management. This knowledge will enable you
 



 to interface seamlessly with technical teams and align service solutions with business
 



 requirements.
 



 ➔ Adaptable and Inspirational: A dynamic leadership style that motivates, guides, and mentors
 



 teams toward achieving operational excellence. You should be an effective educator and
 



 adaptable to ever\-changing client demands and market conditions.
 



 ➔ Self\-driven and Multitasker: Demonstrates self\-drive and determination while being flexible
 



 enough to wear multiple hats in a dynamic environment.
 



 ➔ Possession of PMP, ITIL, SAFE, or Agile/Scrum certifications is considered advantageous.
 



 ➔ Good proficiency with Microsoft Word, advanced Excel, and PowerPoint.
 



  





**Why Unified Infotech?** 




 ➔ Enjoy flexibility in your work setup within a growth\-oriented phase of our business.
 



 ➔ Receive a package that reflects your worth and is designed to attract the best in the industry.
 



 ➔ Thrive in a culture that values fresh ideas, inclusivity, personal development, collective
 



 achievement, and the relentless pursuit of excellence.
 



 ➔ Stay on the cutting edge with access to the latest digital operational tools, services, and
 



 technologies.
 



 ➔ Get the opportunity to collaborate with and mentor some of the brightest minds in our team.
 



 ➔ Engage with diverse markets across the USA, India, APAC, LATAM, Europe, and the Middle East
 



 and contribute to initiatives that blend business success with social and environmental
 



 responsibility.
 



 ➔ Together, we serve communities. We take steps, small and large, so we can do good for social and
 



 environmental causes, weaving sustainability and social change into our endeavors.

f0f23036.title: Delivery Manager
f0f23036.description:
**Department:** 
 Development
 



**Location:** 
 Pune, India
   

  




**Description**
 ParentPay Group is Europe’s leading software product company and the UK’s largest education technology business. We are on a mission to bring next\-generation innovation to positively impact on the lives of millions of parents, teachers, and students every day in over 49 countries.
   

  

 Our market leading products use cutting edge cloud\-based technology to streamline school processes, including secure web and mobile apps that enable secure online payments for school items such as meals, trips, clubs and uniform, improve parental engagement, simplify meal management and \- through our product SIMS \- collect and manage a database of student information and core school operations.
   

  

 ParentPay Group’s new offices in Pune are a fantastic tech hub for those looking to boost their careers in software product development.
   

  

 Our bright team FastTrack their career with international exposure and ways of working based on agile development best practices from globally renowned technology consultancies.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* An inspired sense of shared purpose within the programme team
* A defined programme roadmap and well understood success criteria aligned to delivery needs
* Consistent transparent, and accessible communications to all stakeholders internal and external
* Realistic and regular expectation setting and negotiation with teams
* Programme Risk mitigation
* People support and growth
* Creation of deployment systems/processes to reduce\-friction\-with external dependencies
* Reduced cycle time of stories from grooming through deployment
* Clear escalation paths for issue management through programme stakeholders
* Clear “definition of done”
* Continuous team reflection and improvement.
* Creation of cross\-functional teams that have the right balance of skills and capacity to be autonomous and performant.
* Programme Delivery Management: Manage and ensure the progress of project work, "continuous flow" and adherence to programme commitments. Includes tracking of work, management of risks, and remediation of issues.
* Continuous Programme Delivery Planning: Create a realistic, achievable programme roadmap showing how and when the programme goals will be met along with the required milestones, mitigations, activities and resources required. Continuously evolving the programme plan to reflect current reality of the Project and view of the future
* Scope Management: Embrace Flexibility in requirements change to maximise the stakeholder value whilst balancing management of delivery and expectations of required objectives within a defined timeframe. Understanding which scope management techniques to employ based on the impact of the change. Establish a strong partnership with Lead Product Owner and Tech Architect to ensure effective prioritization that balances business value, quality and other constraints.
* Programme Risk Management: Map and comprehend the risks involved in several dimensions of the work, aiming to prevent them by reducing and mitigating them when possible.
* Stakeholder Management: Identify, analyze, plan and implement actions that engage and build relationships as well as sustain them long term through effective expectation management, so as to enable each party to reach their goals.
* Facilitation: Steer team and stakeholders to work well, both in defining a common vision, making decisions, achieving their goals and creating a relational climate where trust prevails and communication is fluid, empathic and honest.
* Agile \& Lean Principles: Guide and champion lean and agile principles for achieving quality, adaptability, speed \& alignment. This includes the practices, techniques and tools that support those principles, and an understanding of when things may or may not be applicable in a situation or context.
* Build High Performing Teams: Enable a group of people who share a common vision, goals, metrics and who collaborate, challenge and hold each other accountable, to achieve outstanding results. Understand individuals, their motivations and provide them the support needed so they can excel in their roles.
* Servant Leadership: leads by example. Serves the needs of the team by serving its team members. Put the needs of others first and help people develop and perform as highly as possible.
* Giving \& Receiving Feedback: Solicit and engage with feedback on a continuous basis. Having timely, actionable and meaningful conversations about performance for the purpose of shaping behaviors and fostering learning, with the goal of strengthening confidence and improving the effectiveness of self and others.
* Emotional Intelligence: Recognizes, understands and manages their own emotions and recognizes, understands, shares and influences the emotions of others.
* Collaboration: Works jointly with others to co\-create and achieve a common goal. This includes learning, practising and experimenting with tools, techniques and frameworks that foster collaborative working environments.
* Drives to Outcomes: Focuses on results and desired outcomes and how best to achieve them. Able to execute plans through to action. Persistent to complete tasks and a strong commitment to take action that moves things along to ensure delivery of objectives.
* Ownership \& Accountability: Takes personal accountability and ownership for their work. This includes personal follow through, making and defending difficult decisions and tradeoffs, removing blockers, driving collective progress.
* Continuous Improvement: Advances by ongoing, incremental improvement through continuous learning, questioning the status quo and trying out creative and novel ideas. Shows curiosity and has a keen interest to drive learning for themselves and others.


**Skills, Knowledge and Expertise**
* Proven experience in Programme Management, specifically in overseeing complex software delivery projects.
* Strong proficiency in Azure DevOps for programme management.
* Strong understanding of iterative development and delivery
* Strong understanding of managing go\-to market activities in a continuous delivery environment
* Excellent understanding of software development lifecycles and methodologies.
* Demonstrated ability to map out and manage internal / external dependencies across multiple projects.
* Experience in RAID management and mitigation planning.
* Proven ability to maintain delivery velocity while coordinating rapidly changing timelines
* Exceptional communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to engage with stakeholders at various levels.
* Strong organizational and analytical skills.
* Certification in Project Management (e.g., PMP, PRINCE2\) is a plus

364c4b27.title: Salesforce Delivery Manager
364c4b27.description:
What You'll Do:
   

  

 Criteo Internal IT is looking for an Agile Squad Team Lead to manage and grow Salesforce delivery teams based in India.
   

  

 This role is primarily focused on people leadership, team development, and partner management, within a global Agile organization led from France.
   

  

 You will be accountable for building strong, autonomous \& self organized teams, ensuring the right staffing and skills are in place, and acting as a key point of contact between India\-based teams, external partners, and the global product organization.
   

  

 People Management \& Team Leadership
   

  

* Lead, coach, and support Salesforce engineers and QA profiles within Agile squads
* Own career management activities: onboarding, performance feedback, development plans, and skill progression
* Foster a collaborative, inclusive, and high\-performance team culture
* Ensure team engagement, stability, and retention in a competitive local market


 Staffing \& Sourcing
   

  

* Contribute actively to sourcing and hiring of new team members in collaboration with HR and the IIT Director
* Participate in interviews and assess both technical potential and behavioral fit
* Support workforce planning and anticipate staffing needs in line with roadmap evolution


 Partner \& Offshore Management
   

  

* Act as the primary point of contact for offshore delivery partners in India and Poland
* Ensure clear expectations, roles, and ways of working with partners
* Drive assertive communication and escalation when quality, staffing, or engagement issues arise
* Contribute to continuous improvement of the partner model


 Collaboration in a Global Agile Organization
   

  

* Work closely with Product Owners, Scrum Masters, and
* Tech Leads based in France
* Ensure alignment on ways of working, team organization, and Agile standards
* Provide regular visibility on team health, staffing, and people\-related risks


 Who You Are:
   

  

 You are a hands\-on, people\-oriented leader who enjoys growing and enabling engineering teams
   

  

 You are comfortable operating with a high level of autonomy and ownership
   

  

 You demonstrate assertiveness and professionalism when interacting with external partners
   

  

 You are pragmatic, structured, and solution\-oriented
   

  

 You thrive in international environments and cross\-cultural collaboration
   

  

 And last but not least, you enjoy building strong teams and seeing people succeed
   

  

 Experience:
   

  

* 8–12 years of experience in IT environments, with demonstrated people management responsibilities
* Proven experience managing engineers and/or QA profiles in Agile team setups
* Experience working with offshore or external delivery partners is a strong plus
* Prior exposure to Salesforce platforms is highly valued (technical depth not mandatory)


 Skills \& Background
   

  

* Strong understanding of Agile ways of working (Scrum, Kanban, squad\-based organizations)
* Solid experience in managing IT careers and team development
* Excellent communication skills in an international, English\-speaking environment
* Ability to work independently with limited day\-to\-day supervision
* Experience in global organizations or captive centers is a strong advantage


 We acknowledge that many candidates may not meet every single role requirement listed above. If your experience looks a little different from our requirements but you believe that you can still bring value to the role, we’d love to see your application!
   

  

 Who We Are:
   

  

 We’re Criteo, the Commerce Intelligence Platform. Criteo helps businesses turn shopper signals into commerce outcomes while delivering more relevant experiences for shoppers. We use proprietary commerce intelligence and AI decisioning to drive relevance for shoppers and performance for businesses.
   

  

 At Criteo, our culture is as unique as it is diverse. From our offices across the globe or from the comfort of home, our 3,600 Criteos collaborate together to build an open, impactful, and forward\-thinking environment.
   

  

 We foster a workplace where everyone is valued, and employment decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and business needs—never on non\-job\-related factors or legally protected characteristics.
   

  

 What We Offer:
   

  

 🏢 Ways of working – Our hybrid model blends home with in\-office experiences, making space for both.
   

  

 📈 Grow with us – Learning, mentorship \& career development programs.
   

  

 💪 Your wellbeing matters – Health benefits, wellness perks \& mental health support.
   

  

 🤝 A team that cares – Diverse, inclusive, and globally connected.
   

  

 💸 Fair pay \& perks – Attractive salary, with performance\-based rewards and family\-friendly policies, plus the potential for equity depending on role and level.
   

  

 Additional benefits may vary depending on the country where you work and the nature of your employment with Criteo.

c9bc044b.title: Program Manager
c9bc044b.description:
Job ID: 41269
Date: 14 Jul 2026
Location:
Jagiroad, AS, IN


Department: Manufacturing \& Operations
Business: TSAT India
**About The Business:**  

  



Tata Electronics Private Limited (TEPL) is a greenfield venture of the Tata Group with expertise in manufacturing precision components.

  

Tata Electronics (a wholly owned subsidiary of Tata Sons Pvt. Ltd.) is building India’s first AI\-enabled state\-of\-the\-art Semiconductor Foundry. This facility will produce chips for applications such as power management IC, display drivers, microcontrollers (MCU) and high\-performance computing logic, addressing the growing demand in markets such as automotive, computing and data storage, wireless communications and artificial intelligence.

  

Tata Electronics is a subsidiary of the Tata group. The Tata Group operates in more than 100 countries across six continents, with the mission 'To improve the quality of life of the communities we serve globally, through long term stakeholder value creation based on leadership with Trust.’

  

**Job Requirement:**  

The role will be required to work closely with Engineering , Quality , Automation , IE , IT and Operation team to ensure manufacturing systems, process controls , and Operational requirements are fully ready before production release .  

**Key responsibilities:**  

  

**Manufacturing System readiness**
* Drive manufacturing system readiness activities to support NPI and product ramp
* Ensure MES set up and manufacturing process integration meet operational and production requirements
* Coordinate closely with cross functional team to ensure process flow , system transactions, traceability , and manufacturing controls are in place before release
* Support manufacturing readiness reviews and drive of identified gaps and risks
  

**MES and Manufacturing Process Integration**
* Lead MES integration into manufacturing operations to ensure stable and smooth production execution
* Work with Engineering , IT and Mfg teams to identify system or process gaps impacting factory ramp
* Support IDM and DM integration activities to enable smooth product transition and manufacturing ramp
* Ensure manufacturing systems support operational requirements , Lot tracking IDM /DM consumption tracking
  

**NPI Transition and Manufacturing Validation**
* Support NPI transition validation to HVM ramp
* Drive ramp review , issue escalation, and readiness tracking
* Define the non\-Process or Tactical related manufacturing critical jig and fixes or system to improve manufacturability and Poka Yoke solution
* Define and address the need of Non\-technical Material movement process from Raw materials to Finish Good
  

**Essential Attributes:**  

  

* Strong Leadership capabilities with proven experience leading cross\- functional manufacturing and operational readiness program
* Strong understanding of IC Assembly and Test manufacturing process of Wire bond and Flip Chip technology .
* Proven experience supporting HVM ramp and sustaining
* Strong Leadership and stakeholder management skill.
  

**Experience Required:**  

  

  

* Minimum 15 years of experience in manufacturing operation

d3cc1eaa.title: Service Delivery Manager
d3cc1eaa.description:
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
  

The Service Delivery Manager (SDM) is responsible for end‑to‑end delivery, operations, and governance of all in scope services and service towers including Data Centre, Cloud Infrastructure services, Compute, Storage, Backup, Database, Network \& Security and Digital workplace services. The role ensures Governance, Contractual compliance, SLA compliance, operational excellence, cost optimization, risk management, and continuous service improvement while acting as the primary customer interface.
  
  

Key Responsibilities
  
  

Service Delivery \& Operations
  
  

Own end‑to‑end service delivery for Hybrid Cloud and Digital workplace services
  
Drive Periodic governance and review meetings with customer
  
Ensure adherence to SLAs, OLAs, KPIs, and contractual commitments
  
Drive incident, problem, change, and release management as per ITIL
  
Oversight on Major Incident Management (MIM) and RCA reviews
  
Ensure service availability, capacity, performance, and continuity
  
  

Data Centre Management
  
  

Manage on Prem / colocation Data Centre operations
  
Oversee compute (servers), storage (SAN/NAS), backup systems, and network dependencies
  
Coordinate with OEMs and vendors (HPE, Dell, IBM, NetApp, EMC, etc.)
  
Support DC migrations, refresh programs, and DR readiness
  
  

Cloud Platform Management
  
  

Manage Cloud Infrastructure services across AWS / Azure / GCP
  
Ensure compliance with security, audit, and regulatory standards
  
Ensure Ops hygiene, Value adds and continual service improvements
  
Drive cloud cost optimization (FinOps) and resource utilization
  
Oversee provisioning, monitoring, optimization, and governance
  
  

Storage \& Backup
  
  

Own enterprise storage platforms (SAN, NAS, Object Storage)
  
Manage backup and recovery solutions (Veeam, NetBackup, Commvault, etc.)
  
Ensure backup success rates, restore SLAs, and DR testing
  
Capacity planning and lifecycle management
  
  

Database Services
  
  

Manage delivery of Database platforms (Oracle, SQL Server, MySQL, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, etc.)
  
Ensure availability, patching, upgrades, performance tuning (via DBA teams)
  
Coordinate database support for production, DR, and migrations
  
  

Governance \& Stakeholder Management
  
  

Act as single point of contact for customers and internal stakeholders
  
Lead service reviews, operational reviews, and executive governance calls
  
Manage escalations and customer communications
  
Ensure audit readiness and compliance (ISO, SOC, ITGC, etc.)
  
  

Team \& Financial Management
  
  

Lead multi‑tower technical teams (DC, Cloud, Storage, DB)
  
Resource planning, skill management, and performance tracking
  
Manage budgets, cost controls, invoices, and forecasting
  
Driving automation and continuous improvement initiatives
  
  

**Skill Profile:**  

Experience of managing multi\-site IT or multi\-service tower support teams.
  
Own end‑to‑end service delivery for DWP, Data Centre and Cloud Infrastructure services
  
Experience of managing cross functional teams.
  
Able to coach and develop Leads/team members in implementing service management standards and processes.
  
Builds and maintains strong stakeholder relationships.
  
5\+ years' experience of managing IT Service Delivery for hybrid cloud environments and cross functional teams for 1000\+ end users.
  
ITIL Certificate in Managing Across the Lifecycle or equivalent level
  
Prince 2 or PMP Project Management Experience
  
Experience of Service Management Platform.
  
Cloud or DC or Network or EUC or Security certification
  
  

Skill Requirements
  
  

**Experience :** 15 to 18 Years of Relevant Industry Experience
